description_raw: Attribute Level

name: Attribute Bonus
description_raw: Improves all attributes per point spent

name: Backdoor Protection
description_raw: Structure takes reduced damage, and quickly regenerates any damage taken while no enemy creeps are nearby.

name: Backdoor Protection
description_raw: Structure takes reduced damage, and quickly regenerates any damage taken while no enemy creeps are nearby.

name: Last Will
description_raw: Deals damage to the unit that kills the Necronomicon Warrior.

name: True Sight
description_raw: Reveals invisible units.

name: Mana Break
description_raw: Mana burned per hit, a portion of which is dealt as damage.

name: Mana Burn
description_raw: Launches an arrow that burns away the targeted unit's mana, dealing damage equal to the amount of mana burned.

name: Purge
description_raw: Dispels positive buffs from enemies and slows their movement speed.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel

name: Archer Aura
description_raw: Increases movement of nearby units.

name: Auto Deliver
description_raw: Toggle auto delivering of items.

name: Return to Base
description_raw: Returns the courier to base

name: Go To Secret Shop
description_raw: Sends the courier to your team's secret shop

name: Transfer Items
description_raw: Transfer items to hero

name: Return Items
description_raw: Return items to stash

name: Retrieve Items
description_raw: Retrieve items from stash

name: Shield
description_raw: Summons a protective shield around the courier

name: Speed Burst
description_raw: The courier gains a burst of speed for %duration% seconds

name: Spell Block
description_raw: Roshan will block one targeted spell every 15 seconds. Also reduces status effects by 25%.

name: Bash
description_raw: Roshan has a chance to stun on attack.

name: Slam
description_raw: Roshan slams the ground, damaging and slowing all nearby enemies. Slam's damage will increase every minute. Slam does %damage_bonus_creeps%%% increased damage to creeps.

name: Roar of Retribution
description_raw: When facing the team that last killed him, Roshan will release an angry roar, heard everywhere on the map, that damages everyone in a %radius% AoE and disarms them for %disarm_duration% seconds. Units that have been roared take %damage_pct%%% increased incoming damage.

name: Throw
description_raw: Heroes that get in Roshan's way while he's moving between pits will be violently thrown away. Upon landing, heroes take damage and become stunned for %stun_duration% second. Deals additional damage for each throw he's done within one cycle of moving between pits.

name: Strength of the Immortal
description_raw: Roshan possesses numerous protective abilities, including 55%% magic damage resistance, the ability to reduce damage from attacking illusions, and a scaling armor bonus that increases as time goes on.

name: Speed Aura
description_raw: The Kobold Foreman's cruel efficiency increases his movement speed and the movement speed of all nearby allies.

name: Ogre Smash!
description_raw: Ogre slowly charges a big attack stunning for %hero_stun_duration% seconds and dealing %damage% + %damage_pct%%% of their current HP as damage to all units in front of him.

name: Intimidate
description_raw: The Giant Wolf's ferocious roar reduces all nearby enemies total attack damage.

name: Vex
description_raw: Silences target unit.

name: Rally
description_raw: Skeleton's allies gain bonus attack damage. This Aura stacks.

name: Break
description_raw: Whenever Hill Troll Berserker attacks a unit it applies break to it.

name: Desecrate
description_raw: Stomps the ground, dealing damage to nearby units and reducing their base physical armor by %armor_reduction_pct%%%.

name: Petrify
description_raw: Causes the next attack to petrify the enemy, rooting them and dealing %damage% damage per second.

name: Envenomed Weapon
description_raw: The Vhoul Assassin has soaked his weapons in his own blend of painful predator venoms that causes his enemies' natural regeneration to work against themselves. Heroes recover from the poison more quickly.

name: Frost Attack
description_raw: The Ghost launches an eerie attack that chills her enemies to their bones.

name: Spell Immunity
description_raw: This creature does not feel the effects of most magical spells.

name: Shard Split
description_raw: On death, Mud Golems shatter into several Shard Golems.

name: Seed Shot
description_raw: Hucks a seed at a target, slowing and damaging it. The seed can bounce multiple times to nearby targets.

name: Hurl Boulder
description_raw: Hurls a boulder at the target, damaging and stunning them.
lore: "Why do they hesitate? What are they afraid of throwing?"

name: Critical Strike
description_raw: The Giant Wolf's ferocious attacks occasionally tear a vital tendon, inflicting critical damage.

name: Critical Strike
description_raw: The cruel Alpha Wolf attacks his enemy's unprotected vitals at every opportunity, inflicting critical damage.

name: Packleader's Aura
description_raw: The Alpha Wolf's ruthless attacks do extra damage. His commanding presence inspires nearby allies to attack ruthlessly as well.

name: Time Warp Aura
description_raw: Coming from a different era, the Frostbitten Golem has an innate control of time, speeding up the cooldowns of all nearby allies.

name: Swiftness Aura
description_raw: The fearsome Hellbear attacks more quickly and bullies nearby allies into following suit.

name: War Stomp
description_raw: The Centaur Conqueror's powerful hooves stomp the ground, stunning and damaging nearby enemies. Heroes recover more quickly.

name: Icefire Bomb
description_raw: The Ice Shaman chucks a blue flame towards an enemy unit or building, dealing damage over time.

name: Weakening Aura
description_raw: The Rock Golem's imposing figure makes enemies more susceptible to Physical Damage.

name: Magic Amplification Aura
description_raw: The Black Drakes' gaze make enemies more susceptible to Spell Damage.

name: Tempest
description_raw: The Tornado's overpowering winds slow all nearby enemies, flinging debris at them and inflicting damage every second. Enemies closer to the center of the Tornado take more damage.

name: Unyielding Shield
description_raw: Passively grants a regenerating All Damage Barrier. Armor can not go below 0.

name: Reflect
description_raw: Reflects damage received evenly to the attacker and all other heroes within 1200 radius

name: The Shining
description_raw: Deals %aura_damage% damage to all units within %aura_radius% range every second for %attack_timer_duration%s once attacked or damaged.

name: Alleviation
description_raw: After death, the Tormentor leaves behind a verdant dale, increasing the regeneration of everyone nearby by %hp_restoration_pct%%% of their Max Health.

name: Fortification
description_raw: Damage taken is reduced by %damage_reduction_per_tower%%% for each Tier 1 Tower on its team that is still standing.

name: Reinforced
description_raw: Reinforced Units and Buildings Deal Bonus Damage to other Reinforced Units and Buildings and take less attack damage from other units.

name: Piercing
description_raw: Piercing Units Deal Bonus Damage to non-hero, non-heavy units and reduced damage to heroes and heavy units.

name: Runty
description_raw: Runty Units Deal reduced damage to hero units.

name: Tornado
description_raw: CHANNELED - The Wildwing calls on the spirit of the wind, creating a sentient Tornado that he can control. The Tornado slows nearby enemies and does damage. It is invulnerable and can move anywhere.

name: Hurricane
description_raw: The Wildwing Ripper calls on the spirit of the wind, creating a hurricane that can push a unit in the direction of Wildwing Ripper's choice.

name: Steal Weapon
description_raw: Every third attack Kobold Soldier will disarm its target temporarily. Attack counter doesn't increase while ability is on cooldown.

name: Toughness Aura
description_raw: The Wildwing Ripper's fury numbs it to attacks and inspires nearby allies to withstand more blows.

name: Inspiration Aura
description_raw: The Flagbearer inspires all allied creeps, granting them bonus health regeneration and magic resistance.

name: Granite Aura
description_raw: Increases the health capacity of nearby units.

name: Purge
description_raw: The Satyr Banisher knows every trick in the book, allowing him to dispel debuffs from allies or buffs from enemies. His trickery also slows the enemy's movement.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel

name: Mana Burn
description_raw: The Satyr Mindstealer removes a fragment of his enemy's soul, burning away mana equal to %burn_amount% + %int_multiplier%x the target's intelligence, and dealing damage equal to the amount of mana burned.

name: Shockwave
description_raw: The Satyr Tormenter tears open an unstable rift to the underworld, creating a shockwave that travels in a line along the ground, dealing damage to enemies it hits.

name: Unholy Aura
description_raw: The Satyr Tormenter's demonic communion allows him to emanate regenerative power, increasing the health regeneration of himself and all nearby allies.

name: Heal
description_raw: The Hill Troll Priest lays his holy blessing upon the target ally, replenishing some health.

name: Take Off
description_raw: Harpy Scout gains flying movement at the cost of movement speed. Consumes mana while active.

name: Death Throe: Rush
description_raw: When Hellbear dies, all nearby allies go into a frenzy gaining attack speed for a short amount of time.

name: Death Throe: Power
description_raw: When Hellbear Smasher dies, all nearby allies go into a rampage gaining bonus attack damage for a short amount of time.

name: Thunder Clap
description_raw: The Hellbear Smasher claps his massive hands together, creating a deafening blast. The blast damages nearby enemies and throws them off their footing.

name: Prospecting Aura
description_raw: Kobolds are adept at finding gold, increasing nearby allied heroes' GPM.

name: Chain Lightning
description_raw: The Harpy Stormcrafter releases a high-voltage bolt of electricity at the target enemy, dealing damage. The bolt jumps to other nearby enemies, losing power with each jump.

name: War Drums Aura
description_raw: The rhythm of the Thunderhide's heartbeat increases the attack speed and accuracy of nearby allies.

name: Dragonhide Aura
description_raw: The Ancient Black Dragon's dreaded presence grants nearby allies additional armor. This bonus can stack with itself.

name: Fireball
description_raw: Hurls a fire blast on the ground, igniting the area in a %radius% radius for %duration% seconds. Enemies caught in the fire will take %damage% damage per second.

name: Cloak Aura
description_raw: This creature protects its allies with a Magic resistance aura. Creeps are better protected.

name: Splash Attack
description_raw: The Black Dragon's explosive attacks are felt by all nearby enemies.

name: Prowler Aura
description_raw: Gives lifesteal and health regeneration to nearby allies.

name: Slam
description_raw: The Ancient Thunderhide slams his mammoth body against the ground. The shock damages nearby enemies and throws them off their footing. Heroes regain their balance more quickly.

name: Frenzy
description_raw: The Ancient Thunderhide works an ally into a frenzy, causing his ally to have increased attack speed.

name: Mana Aura
description_raw: Provides bonus mana regeneration to all nearby allies.

name: Heal Amplification Aura
description_raw: Provides bonus Heal Amplification to all nearby allies.

name: Riverborn Aura
description_raw: Whenever the Frog is in water, it increases all allied movement speed and outgoing damage.

name: Arm of the Deep
description_raw: Sends out a slew of tentacles in the target direction, stunning and damaging enemies.

name: Tendrils of the Deep
description_raw: Sends out a cone-shaped slew of tentacles in the target direction, stunning and damaging enemies.

name: Congregations of the Deep
description_raw: Sends out a slew of tentacles in all directions, stunning and damaging enemies.

name: Water Bubble (Small)
description_raw: Creates a barrier bubble that protects the target from magic damage for %duration%s.

name: Water Bubble (Medium)
description_raw: Creates a barrier bubble that protects the target from magic damage for %duration%s. After it expires, it heals the target for %heal_pct%%% of the absorb amount.

name: Water Bubble (Large)
description_raw: Creates a barrier bubble that protects the target from magic damage for %duration%s. After it expires, it heals the target and all allies in the radius for %heal_pct%%% of the absorb amount.

name: Throw Snowball
description_raw: Throw a snowball at an ally or enemy.
lore: Hand crafted at the perfect temperature.

name: Build Snowman
description_raw: Construct a jolly snowman.
lore: He'll stay friends as long as he can.

name: Summon Penguin
description_raw: Summon a friendly penguin who slides around. Each time a hero bumps the penguin, it gains speed and lasts a bit longer.
lore: Nothing gets age-old enemies to set aside their differences quite like a penguin to play with.

name: Decorate Tree
description_raw: Give any tree a delightfully seasonal touch.
lore: Festive trappings for even the bloodiest of battlefields.

name: Festive Firework
description_raw: Shoot a firework into the air.
lore: There's nothing more festive than explosions!

name: Spirit of Frostivus
description_raw: CHANNELED. Steals an enemy hero's stack of Frostivus hats, or gives your stack to an allied hero.
scepter: Spirit of Frostivus becomes an Area of Effect ability, affecting units within a radius of %aoe_scepter% in the target area. Hats are taken from enemies first, then evenly distributed amongst allies.

name: High Five
description_raw: Throw your hand (or handy appendage) in the air!

name: Guild Banner
description_raw: Plant your guild's banner to mark this battleground for you all!

name: Carnival Balloon
description_raw: Release a balloon
lore: Prizes!

name: Carnival Firework
description_raw: Shoot a firework into the air.
lore: Boom!

name: Carnival Pie
description_raw: Throw a pie
lore: Splat!

name: Mist Coil
description_raw: Abaddon releases a coil of deathly mist that can damage an enemy unit or heal a friendly unit at the cost of some of Abaddon's health.
lore: A mysterious vapor from the Font of Avernus now infuses the breath of Abaddon, who releases it at will.

name: Aphotic Shield
description_raw: Summons dark energies around an ally unit, dispelling them and creating an all damage barrier that absorbs a set amount of damage before expiring. When the barrier is destroyed it will burst and deal damage equal to the amount it could absorb to an area around it.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel
lore: The powers of the black mist rise to absorb attacks like the black mist absorbs light.
shard: %absorb_to_damage%%% of absorbed damage is dealt to nearby enemies.

name: Withering Mist
description_raw: Damaging enemies applies the Withering Mist debuff for %duration%s. Affected enemies have their Health Restoration reduced by %heal_reduction_pct%%% if they are below %hp_threshold_pct%%% HP.

name: Curse of Avernus
description_raw: Abaddon strikes an enemy, affecting them by a chilling curse, slowing them, causing them to take damage over time, and all attacks against them gain an attack speed boost. Damage over time component to buildings is reduced by %tower_dps_pct%%%.
lore: While the baptized draw strength from the Font, the gifts of Avernus are debilitating to the uninitiated.

name: Borrowed Time
description_raw: When activated, dispels you and all damage dealt to you will heal instead of harm. If the ability is not on cooldown, it will automatically activate if your health falls below %hp_threshold%.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel
lore: The most unnatural of all the gifts of the Font of Avernus, this power defies mortal understanding.  What should hurt, instead heals; and what should kill gives strength anew.
scepter: Increases duration. While Borrowed Time is active, anytime an ally takes more than %ally_threshold_scepter% damage while within Mist Coil's cast range of Abaddon, an individual Mist Coil will automatically fire towards that ally.

name: +{s:bonus_curse_attack_speed} Curse of Avernus Attack Speed Bonus
{s:bonus_immolate_damage} Borrowed Time Immolation DPS
description_raw: Affects Abaddon and all enemies in a {s:bonus_immolate_aoe} AoE.

name: Firestorm
description_raw: Calls down waves of fire that damage enemy units in the target area, burning for additional damage over time.
lore: The flames of conquest blaze forth from the darkest depths of the abyss.
shard: Firestorm can be allied targeted. When used that way, the Firestorm follows the hero around.  The wave count is increased, and tick rate / duration time occur more quickly.

name: Pit of Malice
description_raw: A deadly pit is conjured at the target location; any unit that enters will be damaged and rooted. Each enemy unit within the pit are affected by the root only every %pit_interval% seconds.
lore: Twisting into the seams of reality itself, Vrogros' manifest hatred paralyzes those who defy his will.
scepter: Increases radius of the Pit of Malice.

name: Atrophy Aura
description_raw: Nearby enemy units are weakened, losing a portion of their base damage. If an enemy dies while under this effect, Underlord gains temporary bonus damage.
lore: To merely stand in the presence of the Underlord is to feel the conviction of battle sapped from one's soul.

name: Fiend's Gate
description_raw: Opens 2 portals, one next to Underlord and one in the target location. Heroes can channel a portal for %warp_channel_duration% seconds to teleport to the other side. Portals have to be at least %minimum_distance% away from each other.
lore: They come without warning, leaving fire and blood where kingdoms once flourished.
scepter: Summons a Pit of Malice around each of the portals. Reduces cooldown.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_UNIT_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_CHANNELLED | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_DONT_RESUME_ATTACK | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_DONT_CANCEL_CHANNEL | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_SILENCE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_ROOT_DISABLES | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE

name: Invading Force
description_raw: After an allied hero Teleports, they temporarily gain Damage Reduction and Movement Speed. Allies receive %dark_portal_multiplier%x bonuses if teleporting via Fiend's Gate.

name: Abyssal Horde
description_raw:
After teleporting through the Fiend's Gate, Underlord brings forth a Warrior or an Archer to aid him every %underling_spawn_interval%s that last for the duration of the Fiend's Gate.

The Warrior burns mana every hit, and deals magical damage to whoever kills it. The Archer has a passive movement speed aura.

name: Last Will
description_raw: Deals damage to the unit that kills the Necronomicon Warrior.

name: Mana Break
description_raw: Mana burned per hit, a portion of which is dealt as damage.

name: Archer Aura
description_raw: Increases movement of nearby units.

name: Berserk Potion
description_raw:
Alchemist throws a potion at an ally, applying a basic dispel and giving them attack speed, movement speed and HP regen.

DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
lore: After Razzil's great grandfather tested an early version of this potion on himself, a surviving family member immediately saw the profit potential.

name: Acid Spray
description_raw: Sprays high-pressure acid across a target area. Enemy units who step across the contaminated terrain take damage per second and have their armor reduced.
lore: Using traditional Alchemy from the Darkbrew family, Razzil concocts an acid that dissolves even the toughest metals.

name: Unstable Concoction
description_raw: Alchemist brews up an unstable concoction that he can throw at an enemy hero, to stun and deal damage in an area around the explosion. The longer the concoction brews, the more damage it deals and the longer the stun. Alchemist is faster while charging the concoction. After %brew_time% seconds, the brew reaches its maximum damage and stun time. However, after %brew_explosion% seconds, the concoction will explode on Alchemist himself if not thrown.
lore: A silver lining to the failure of turning a mountain into gold, this volatile solution has destructive potential.

name: Unstable Concoction Throw
description_raw: Throw it before it blows up!

name: Greevil's Greed
description_raw: Alchemist synthesizes additional gold from his enemies and bounty runes. With each kill, Alchemist earns base bonus gold and extra bonus gold. If Alchemist kills another unit which yields gold within the next %duration% seconds, an additional instance of Extra Bonus Gold is added to the total. Additionally, causes bounty runes to yield more gold.
lore: While it is not a mountain, Razzil has mastered the conversion of smaller compounds to line his pockets.
scepter: Alchemist melts down Aghanim's Scepter to grant an allied hero all Aghanim's Scepter upgrades. Alchemist will gain bonus %scepter_bonus_damage% damage and %bonus_gold_per_scepter% additional base and max Greevil's Greed Extra Gold for each melted Scepter.

name: Chemical Rage
description_raw: Alchemist causes his Ogre to enter a chemically induced rage, reducing base attack cooldown and increasing movement speed and health regeneration.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
lore: The brew Razzil gave to the Ogre during their prison bust has become a useful potion in the midst of combat.

name: Corrosive Weaponry
description_raw: Alchemist coats his weapons and empowers his spells with an acid that applies a stacking slow and base attack damage reduction to enemies hit.\n\nAttacks apply %stacks_per_attack% stacks. Unstable Concoction applies %one_tooltip% stack per second of brew time.
lore: A powerful solvent that turned out to work all too well.

name: Cold Feet
description_raw: Places a curse on an enemy, dealing damage over time.  If the enemy unit doesn't move outside of the given range from the initial location, it will be stunned and frozen in place after %AbilityDuration% seconds.
lore: Kaldr's presence draws those around him into a frozen void, threatening to lock them in an icy prison for eternity.

name: Ice Vortex
description_raw: Creates a vortex of icy energy that slows, deals damage, and increases magic damage done to enemies in its range.
lore: Frozen, caustic winds are at the whim of Kaldr, chilling the field of battle.

name: Chilling Touch
description_raw: Enhances Ancient Apparition's attack with increased range and a burst of magical damage and slow.
lore: The Ancient Apparition's eternal knowledge brings a frigid enchantment to his attacks.
scepter: Removes cooldown.

name: Ice Blast
description_raw: Launches a tracer toward any location on the battlefield, which must be triggered again to mark the area to be blasted by a damaging explosion of hail. The further the tracer travels, the larger the explosion will be. Enemies caught in the explosion, or who touch the icy ball of hail as it travels, are Frostbitten, taking damage over time and prevented from regenerating or healing. If a Frostbitten unit's health drops below a certain percentage, they will instantly shatter.
lore: Ice storms from ages past flow through Kaldr's frosty limbs, crashing into the world and turning its inhabitants into monuments to his eternal power.
shard: Freezes enemies hit with the current level of Cold Feet for %cold_feet_stun_duration_pct%%% of the duration.

name: Bone Chill
description_raw: When Ancient Apparition deals Magic damage to an enemy with his abilities, it is slowed for a short duration. If the target is a Hero, its Strength is also reduced. Multiple instances of this effect stack and have independent durations.
scepter: Increases Base Strength Reduction by %tooltip_scepter_bonus%.

name: Release
description_raw: Releases the ice blast to explode at the tracer's current location. Can be cast while silenced.

name: Mana Break
description_raw: Burns an opponent's mana on each attack and deals damage equal to a percentage of the mana burnt.
lore: A modified technique of the Turstarkuri monks' peaceful ways is to turn magical energies on their owner.
scepter: Increases Max Mana Burned per Hit.

name: Persecutor
description_raw: Attacks slow enemies based on how much mana they are missing. Min slow at %mana_threshold%%% mana, up to max slow at 0%% mana. No effect if enemy is above %mana_threshold%%% mana.

name: Blink
description_raw: Short distance teleportation that allows Anti-Mage to move in and out of combat.
lore: In his encounter with the Dead Gods, Anti-Mage learned the value of being elusive.
scepter: After casting Blink, your next Mana Break within %empowered_mana_break_duration%s burns an additional %empowered_max_burn_pct_tooltip%%% max mana and prevents the target from regenerating or gaining mana for a short duration. This debuff is undispellable.

name: Counterspell
description_raw: Passively grants magic resistance. Counterspell may be activated to create an anti-magic shell around Anti-Mage that blocks and reflects any targeted spells.
lore: With the proper focus, Anti-Mage turns innate resistance into calculated retaliation.
shard: Creates a blinked fragment of Anti-Mage next to the enemy caster upon reflecting their unit-targeted spell while active.

name: Counterspell Ally
description_raw: Counterspell Ally may be activated to create an anti-magic shell around an allied hero that blocks and reflects any targeted spells. Any time a spell is blocked by Counterspell or Counterspell Ally, an illusion of Anti-Mage will be created next to the enemy.
lore: The only magic that Anti-Mage will even barely tolerate... is friendship.

name: Mana Void
description_raw: For each point of mana missing by the target unit, damage is dealt to it and surrounding enemies.  The main target is also mini-stunned.
lore: After bringing enemies to their knees, Anti-Mage punishes them for their use of the arcane arts.

name: Flux
description_raw: Infuses a lone enemy unit with swirling, volatile energy, dealing damage over time and slowing the target. The damage is not applied if another enemy unit is near the target.
lore: An infinitesimal fraction of the power which imprisoned the Ancients.
scepter: Flux silences when the target is alone, deals more damage, and lasts longer.

name: Magnetic Field
description_raw: Arc Warden generates a circular distortion field of magnetic energy. The Magnetic Field grants bonus attack speed and protects allied units within it by evading attacks coming from outside the field. The Magnetic Field pulls runes, and runes inside Magnetic Field automatically activate.
lore: Time and space are of little consequence to one as old as Zet.

name: Spark Wraith
description_raw: Summons a Spark Wraith that slowly materializes and patrols a targeted area until an enemy comes within its range. Once a target has been found the wraith fuses with them, dealing magical damage and slowing the unit.
lore: Lesser fragments of Zet's original self.

name: Tempest Double
description_raw:
Briefly refocusing its fractured elements into a single form, the Arc Warden is able to create a perfect electrical duplication of itself. The duplicate can use all of Arc Warden's current items and spells, except most consumables and items that drop on death. The duplicate has separate item and ability cooldowns.

The Tempest Double loses its sense of self and fractures over time, becoming slower and less accurate.
lore: Warped by the power of its peers, Arc Warden becomes what it despises most: disharmony.
shard:
The Tempest Double is infused with the bonuses of Arcane, Invisibility, and Haste Runes for %rune_duration%s when created.

Does not trigger Runic Infusion.

name: Runic Infusion
description_raw: Runes of Power fuse to the Self. Arc Warden gains +%all_attribute_bonus_per_stack% all attributes permanently whenever Arc Warden or the Tempest Double activates a Power Rune.

name: +{s:bonus_all_attribute_bonus_per_stack} Runic Infusion All Attributes Bonus
description_raw: Applies retroactively

name: Flux Silences when target is alone
Berserker's Call
description_raw: Axe taunts nearby enemy units, forcing them to attack him while he gains bonus armor during the duration.
lore: Mogul Khan's warcry taunts opponents into engaging in an unconquerable battle with the Axe.
shard: Berserker's Call applies Battle Hunger to affected units.

name: Battle Hunger
description_raw: Enrages an enemy unit, causing it to take damage over time until it kills another unit or the duration ends. The enemy is slowed as long as they are facing away from Axe.
lore: Ordinary heroes cannot withstand Mogul Khan's rage for battle, such that it injures them until it is satisfied.
shard: Multiple instances of Battle Hunger can stack on a single target.

name: Counter Helix
description_raw: After a set number of attacks, Axe will perform a helix counter attack, dealing pure damage to all nearby enemies.
lore: Axe is the only reinforcement this army needs.
scepter: Counter Helix now applies a stacking debuff to enemies hit by it that causes them to deal less total attack damage to Axe. Counter Helix no longer has a cooldown and its counter advances when Axe attacks.

name: Culling Blade
description_raw: Axe spots a weakness and strikes, dealing pure damage. When an enemy hero is killed with Culling Blade, its cooldown is reset, and all nearby allied units gain bonus movement speed and armor.\n\nAxe permanently drenches his blade every time he kills an enemy Hero with Culling Blade, gaining bonus armor for each stack.
lore: Mogul Khan is the embodiment of battle and fury, launching into a gruesome fatality against those who dare engage the Axe in combat.

name: One Man Army
description_raw: Axe gains Strength based on %armor_pct_as_strength%%% of his Armor as long as there are no allied heroes within %radius% distance from Axe.  The effect fades over %bonus_linger_duration%s after approaching an ally.

name: Enfeeble
description_raw: Deals damage every second and lowers the enemy's total attack damage and cast range.
lore: Each tendril of fear that Atropos weaves increases the vulnerability of his victims to arcane and unknown arts.

name: Brain Sap
description_raw: Feasts on the vital energies of an enemy unit, healing Bane and dealing damage.
lore: Atropos finds no greater pleasure than to harvest the fear he creates.
shard: Reduces cooldown by %bonus_AbilityCooldown%. Causes Brain Sap to become a %shard_radius% AoE spell. Secondary targets only heal for %shard_secondary_target_heal_pct%%%.

name: Fiend's Grip
description_raw: CHANNELED - Grips an enemy unit, disabling it and causing heavy damage over time, while stealing mana every %fiend_grip_tick_interval% seconds based on the unit's maximum mana.
lore: Victims of Atropos are frequently torn apart by vivid conjurations of their own nightmares.
scepter: Reduces Fiend's Grip cooldown by %bonus_AbilityCooldown%. Fiend's Grip now creates two uncontrollable illusions that are also channeling Fiend's Grip on the target. Illusions take %scepter_incoming_illusion_damage%%% incoming damage and immediately die if they are interrupted. Damage does not stack.

name: Nightmare
description_raw:
Puts the target enemy or friendly Hero to sleep. Sleeping units walk in Bane's chosen direction and are awakened when damaged. If the target was directly attacked, the Nightmare passes to the attacking unit. Bane can attack and damage Nightmared targets freely.

Can be put on alt-cast to have the target stand still.
lore: A stolen prowess from the goddess Nyctasha is to put his prey into forever sleep.

name: Nightmare End
description_raw: Ends all ongoing Nightmares.

name: Ichor of Nyctasha
description_raw: Every time Bane kills an enemy hero or they die under the effect of Bane's debuff, they receive a Terror for the rest of the game that decreases their status resistance to Bane's subsequent debuffs.

name: Sticky Napalm
description_raw: Drenches an area in sticky oil, amplifying damage from Batrider's attacks and abilities and slowing the movement speed and turn rate of enemies. Additional casts of Sticky Napalm continue to increase damage, up to %max_stacks% stacks. Applies a small amount of damage with each cast.
lore: It's not uncommon to hear the Rider cackle while he increases the flammability of his opponents.
shard:
Sticky Napalm no longer has a stack limit.

Sticky Napalm deals damage to structures.

name: Smoldering Resin
description_raw: Batrider's attacks apply a debuff that deals %tick_attack_damage_pct%%% of the attack damage every %tick_rate%s for %total_ticks%s.

name: Flamebreak
description_raw: Hurls an explosive cocktail that explodes when it reaches the target location, knocking back, slowing and dealing damage over time to enemies in the area.
lore: A molotov cocktail is the weapon of choice for Batrider.

name: Firefly
description_raw: Batrider takes to the skies, moving increasingly fast and laying down a trail of flames from the air. The fire damages any enemies it touches and destroys trees below Batrider. Maximum movement speed bonus is reached at the end of Firefly's duration.
lore: When an enemy escapes into the Yama Raskav Jungle, most would cut through the brush to find the fugitive.  Batrider just chooses to destroy the jungle along with his foes.

name: Flaming Lasso
description_raw: Lassoes an enemy and drags them in Batrider's wake. Dragged units cannot move, attack, or use abilities.  Teleporting or blinking will break the lasso.
lore: Few dare to ask to ride on the bat, as Batrider gives them free of charge.
scepter: Flaming Lasso grabs both its target, as well as the target's nearest allied hero within %grab_radius_scepter% units. The secondary target is tethered to the first.

name: Attacks apply 1 Stack of Sticky Napalm
Wild Axes
description_raw: Beastmaster sends his axes flying and calls them home again, slicing through enemy units and trees along their path.  Each axe can hit an enemy once, and amplifies subsequent damage from Beastmaster and his units.
lore: While learning to maneuver in nature alone, the Beastmaster also mastered the use of a pair of tomahawks, adept at cutting down trees as well as adversaries.
shard: Beastmaster's attacks on enemy heroes also apply the Wild Axes debuff of its corresponding level.

name: Summon Razorback
description_raw: Beastmaster calls forth a Boar to aid in the battlefield. The Boar has a passive poison attack that slows attack and movement speeds.
lore: After befriending the strange beast of his childhood, Beastmaster has learned to call to animals in times of need.

name: Dive Bomb
description_raw: Flies towards the target enemy, dealing damage and rooting it.

name: Summon Raptors
description_raw: Beastmaster summons %hawk_count% hawks that circle around Beastmaster and dive-bombs at enemies with a base attack rate of every %hawk_base_attack_interval%s, damaging and rooting them. Attack rate increases with the Hawk's attack speed. Prioritizes heroes.
lore: After befriending the strange beast of his childhood, Beastmaster has learned to call to animals in times of need.
shard: Increases Hawk duration by %bonus_duration%s and summons an additional Hawk.

name: Poison
description_raw: Inflicts a poison that slows attack and movement speeds.

name: Poison
description_raw: Inflicts a poison that slows attack and movement speeds.

name: Inner Beast
description_raw: Untaps the inner fury of Beastmaster and units he controls, passively increasing their attack speed.
lore: Beastmaster's ability to incite the innate strength of animals was seen in the mauling of the king of Slom.

name: Primal Roar
description_raw: Beastmaster lets loose a deafening roar that stuns, and shoves open a path to its target. All units in the path of the roar are damaged, while units shoved aside by the roar have their movement and attack speed slowed. Additionally, Beastmaster and his units gain %movement_speed%%% movement speed for %movement_speed_duration% seconds.
lore: The Beastmaster has learned to channel his primal instincts into an animalistic roar, causing devastation in the ranks of enemies.

name: Drums of Slom
description_raw:
Attacks from Beastmaster or a nearby unit he controls will cause him bang his drum, dealing damage to nearby units and healing Beastmaster and units under his control for a portion of the damage dealt. Every attack decreases the interval between drum hits down to a minimum of %min_drum_hit_interval%s between hits after %max_stacks% attacks. If no attacks are made, the intervals gradually increase.

Using Primal Roar counts as %primal_roar_stacks% attacks.
lore: Nature's rage is timeless, and for those who know the secrets, it's easy to stir the echoes of ire that rejoiced in the downfall of Slom.

name: Rugged
description_raw: Beastmaster's melee hero Damage Block Chance is increased from %damage_block_pct_fifty_tooltip%%% to %damage_block_pct_vs_creeps%%% versus non-hero units and non-building units.

name: +{s:bonus_ms} Movespeed to Beastmaster and his summons
description_raw: The Movespeed Aura is global, persists through death, and affects Beastmaster and all his summons.

name: +{s:bonus_hp} Health to Beastmaster and his summons
description_raw: The Max Health Aura is global, persists through death, and affects Beastmaster and all his summons.

name: Bloodrage
description_raw: Drives Bloodseeker into a bloodthirsty rage which causes him to attack faster and deal more spell damage at the cost of a percentage of his health per second.
lore: Strygwyr shares his animalistic thirst for bloodshed.
shard: Bloodseeker's Bloodrage attacks now deal %max_health_dmg_pct%%% of the target's max health as <font color="#d8ae53">Pure</font> damage.

name: Blood Rite
description_raw: Bloodseeker baptizes an area in sacred blood. After %delay_plus_castpoint_tooltip% seconds the ritual completes, causing any enemies caught in the area to take damage and become silenced.
lore: The Flayed Twins are ever willing to aid those who spill blood upon the field of battle.

name: Thirst
description_raw: Bloodseeker is invigorated by the wounds of his enemies, gaining bonus movement speed when an enemy hero's health falls below %min_bonus_pct%%%, with the bonuses increasing as their health falls further. If an enemy hero's health falls below %invis_threshold_pct%%%, he will also gain vision and True Sight of that hero. Bonuses stack per hero. Unlocks max movement speed for Bloodseeker.
lore: Strygwyr becomes frenzied when blood is spilled.

name: Rupture
description_raw: Causes an enemy unit's skin to rupture, dealing initial damage based on its current health. If the unit moves, it takes damage based on the distance moved.
lore: When the Bloodseeker hunts you, injuries become fatalities.
scepter: Increases initial damage and grants %AbilityCharges% Rupture Charges.

name: Blood Mist
description_raw:
Bloodseeker sprays his blood continuously in the area around him, losing health to damage and slow his enemies. While active, Sanguivore's healing is increased. Cannot be turned off while on cooldown.

Additionally, passively turns all your overheal from your own abilities into an all damage barrier up to 50% of Bloodseeker's Max Health. Barrier amount decays by %barrier_decay_pct%%% per second.

name: Sanguivore
description_raw:
Bloodseeker restores some life when he kills a unit, equal to %base_heal% health plus a percentage of the units max health.

Restores for half values if an ally kills a nearby enemy hero.

name: Shuriken Toss
description_raw: Hurls a deadly shuriken at an enemy unit, dealing damage and slowing the target's movement speed.  The shuriken will bounce to any Tracked units who are within a %bounce_aoe% radius of each other.
lore: While the shuriken may be small, Gondar's precise aim can cause critical damage.
scepter: Increases cast range and applies Jinada on hit.

name: Jinada
description_raw: Bounty Hunter plans his next hit, dealing bonus damage and stealing some unreliable gold.
lore: Gondar's vast experience ensures he never walks away from a transaction empty-handed.

name: Shadow Walk
description_raw: Bounty Hunter becomes invisible and gains bonus movement speed and the ability to move through other units until he attacks or casts a spell.  If he breaks the invisibility with an attack, that attack will stun the target for a short duration.
lore: The court jesters present during King Goff's assassination can recount no other image than a dancing shadow.

name: Friendly Shadow
description_raw: Applies Shadow Walk and all of its bonuses to the target ally. Allied fade time is %fade_time%s. Does not break Bounty Hunter's invisibility when cast.
lore: Useful for the rare instances when a contested bounty is actually wanted alive.

name: Track
description_raw: Tracks an enemy hero, granting True Sight of the target, increasing the damage they take and providing information on how much gold it is carrying. If the target dies, Bounty Hunter and nearby heroes collect a bonus bounty of gold. Casting Track does not take you out of invisibility.
lore: Using his elevated senses of sight and smell, Gondar's hits have quite a good chance of success.

name: Cutpurse
description_raw: Bounty Hunter steals %gold_steal% gold when targeting enemy heroes with his abilities or items.

name: Big Game Hunter
description_raw: Bounty Hunter receives %kill_assist_gold_bonus_percent%%% more kill and assist gold if the dying enemy hero is Big Game. An enemy hero is considered Big Game if they are one of the top 3 net worth heroes on the enemy team.

name: Thunder Clap
description_raw: Slams the ground, dealing damage and slowing the movement speed and attack rate of nearby enemy units.
lore: A slam of Mangix' mighty keg starts the festivities.

name: Cinder Brew
description_raw:
Rolls a barrel of ale at enemies that damages enemies along its path and spills out at the target location.

Any enemy in the path or the spill area is drenched in cinder brew, becoming slowed. If the enemy receives Magic or Pure damage, they will be ignited, extending the duration by %extra_duration%s and causing them to take damage over time.
lore: The Order of the Oyo's solution to all problems - another round!

name: Drunken Brawler
description_raw:
Brewmaster can switch stances based on the elements he controls.

Whenever Brewmaster casts an ability, he becomes Brewed Up, increasing his stance power by %brewed_up_bonus%%% for %brewed_up_duration%s. If he casts another ability while Brewed Up, the duration is extended by %brewed_up_duration_extend%s. After Brewed Up expires, he is hungover and cannot Brew Up again for %hangover_time%s.

Earth Brawler gains bonus Magic Resistance and Armor.

Storm Brawler gains bonus Evasion and Movement Speed.

Fire Brawler gains bonus Attack Speed and chance to critical strike.
lore: When Mangix won his title as the Brewmaster of the Order of Oyo, he also claimed his place in the mastery of inebriation.

name: Drunken Brawler - Brew Up
description_raw: Whenever Brewmaster casts an ability, he becomes Brewed Up and his stance becomes empowered.  If he casts another ability while Brewed Up, the duration is extended.  The cooldown starts when the effect ends.

name: Liquid Courage
description_raw: When Brewmaster drops below %min_health_threshold%%% Health he gains a Status Resistance buff and his movement speed alternates every %speed_toggle_time%s between being faster and being slower. The effect becomes stronger at lower health, scaling from 0 up to max values at %max_health_threshold%%% Health.
shard:
Toss a strong drink to a teammate or drink it yourself, activating the maximum power effect of Liquid Courage and granting %max_hp_regen%%% Max HP Regen per second.

Lasts %drink_duration% seconds.

name: Primal Split
description_raw: Splits Brewmaster into elements, forming 3 specialized warriors, adept at survival, each with their own abilities. If any of them survive until the end of their summoned timer, the Brewmaster is reborn.  Each Warrior gains its respective Drunken Brawler stance.
lore: It isn't clear whether Mangix is consciously aware of his potent bond with nature, as it often occurs in the midst of a drunken stupor.
scepter:
Primal Split gains %scepter_bonus_levels% max and current level, improving the Brewlings and their abilities.

Allows Primal Split to be cancelled early, and causes the Brewlings to be Brewed Up when Primal Split begins.

name: Primal Split Cancel
description_raw: Cancel the Primal Split.

name: Primal Companion
description_raw:
Creates a Brewling based on Brewmaster's current Drunken Brawler Stance.

A new Brewling cannot be resummoned for %cooldown_on_take_damage%s if the current one takes damage from enemy Heroes or hero-controlled units. If the Brewling dies, the ability goes on cooldown for %cooldown_on_death% seconds.

Only one Brewling can exist at a time. If Brewmaster uses Primal Split, the existing Brewling disappears.
lore: Mangix doesn't hold to it by rule, but he vaguely recalls an old master musing that, if one could manage, scaring up a companion was always preferable to drinking alone.

name: Hurl Boulder
description_raw: Throws a boulder at a unit, doing damage and stunning it.

name: Earth Element
description_raw: Magic, status, and slow resistance increased.

name: Demolish
description_raw: Deals bonus damage to buildings.

name: Dispel Magic
description_raw: Damages summoned units in an area and dispels most buffs or debuffs.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel

name: Cyclone
description_raw: Encloses a unit in a tornado, removing it from the battlefield and deals %landing_damage% damage when after they land.

name: Wind Walk
description_raw: Provides temporary invisibility.  Bonus movement speed and attack damage when invisible.

name: Permanent Immolation
description_raw: Burns nearby enemy units.

name: Permanent Phase
description_raw: Provides the Brewling with phased movement and bonus Status Resistance.

name: Hairball
description_raw: Coughs a quill-packed hairball towards the target location. Erupts at the location, hitting enemies with Viscous Nasal Goo stacks and Quill Spray.
lore: Every part of Bristleback's body is a weapon -- even the parts he accidentally swallowed.

name: Viscous Nasal Goo
description_raw: Covers a target in snot, causing it to have reduced armor and movement speed for %goo_duration% seconds.  Multiple casts stack and refresh the duration.
lore: Having caught a cold while stuck in the snow, Bristleback turns it to his advantage.

name: Quill Spray
description_raw: Sprays enemy units with quills dealing damage in an area of effect around Bristleback.  Deals bonus damage for every time a unit was hit by Quill Spray in the last %quill_stack_duration% seconds.
lore: An enforcer's honor can be a prickly thing.  So can his quills.

name: Bristleback
description_raw: Bristleback takes less damage if hit on the sides or rear. If Bristleback takes enough damage from the rear, he releases a Quill Spray of the current level.
lore: Turning his back to a fight might be just the thing.
scepter: Adds active ability to Bristleback. Bristleback rotates towards the targeted direction and, after %activation_delay%s, forcefully ejects %activation_num_quill_sprays% sequential Quill Sprays in a tight conical pattern out of his back every %activation_spray_interval%s. Bristleback's facing is locked during this time, he is disarmed, and his speed is reduced by %activation_movement_speed_pct%%%.

name: Prickly
description_raw: Bristleback has bonus damage and debuff duration amp against enemy heroes that are behind him.

name: Brawler's Grit
description_raw: Every time Bristleback is Stunned, Hexed, Feared, Taunted, or Rooted he gains a stacking buff for %duration%s that provides status resistance and debuff amplificiation, up to a maximum of %max_stacks% stacks.

name: Warpath
description_raw: Bristleback works himself up into a fury every time he casts a spell, increasing his movement speed and damage.
lore: 'Temper, temper,' his mum always chided.  But in a fight, a temper can come in handy.

name: Spawn Spiderlings
description_raw: Broodmother injects her young into an enemy unit, dealing damage and slowing them for %slow_duration% seconds. The spiderlings will hatch if the target is killed while under this influence.
lore: Black Arachnia continues to raise her young, even amidst the field of combat.  The brood quickly learns how to support their mother.

name: Poison Sting
description_raw: Slows enemies with each attack.

name: Spawn Spiderling
description_raw: Applies debuff on attack. If debuffed unit dies, a spiderling will spawn.

name: Spin Web
description_raw:
Spins a large web that grants Broodmother a passive movement speed increase and increases her Turn Rate, while in its vicinity, as well as giving free movement.

Spin Web can be cast from anywhere as long as the new web touches an existing web. Webs never expire, and can be manually destroyed. When the maximum limit of webs is exceeded, the oldest web disappears.
lore: Weaving a bed of silken fibers, Arachnia's web both protects her and her offspring, as well as giving advancing opponents a sense of foreboding.

name: Spider's Milk
description_raw: Whenever Broodmother kills a unit, she and all units under her control in a %kill_heal_aoe% radius receive a buff for %kill_heal_duration%s that heals them for a percentage of the victim's health every %tick_rate% seconds. Healing from creeps is reduced by %kill_creeps_penalty%%%.

name: Incapacitating Bite
description_raw: Broodmother's venom cripples enemy units, causing her attacks to slow and giving the affected unit a chance to miss its attacks and extra damage from attacks.
lore: Paralytic toxins come from Black Arachnia's fangs, causing a slow and painful death to those who intrude on her webs.

name: Insatiable Hunger
description_raw: A violent lust for vital fluids increases Broodmother's attack damage and gives her and her Spiderlings a vampiric attack.
lore: While most of her prey is wrapped in silken cocoons and saved for her young, the Broodmother herself has a taste for wandering heroes.
shard: While Hunger is active, the bonus damage is increased by %shard_damage_per_tick%%% every %shard_damage_tick_interval%s.

name: Spinner's Snare
description_raw: Broodmother may create up to %count% invisible web lines touching any existing web. Enemy Heroes that cross the web line will spring the trap, becoming rooted, revealed in fog, and take damage over time.  Multiple Heroes can trip on the same line until it's destroyed after being initially triggered.  Broodmother's team is alerted via the minimap when an enemy has triggered the snare.
lore: The slightest tremor of her web is all Arachnia needs to find her prey.

name: Destroy Spin Web
description_raw: Destroys the selected Spin Web.

name: Hoof Stomp
description_raw: After a brief windup, Centaur Warrunner slams the ground, stunning and damaging nearby enemy units. During the delay, he is disarmed but can move.
lore: When the mighty hoof of the Warrunner touches soil, the tremors are felt far and wide.

name: Double Edge
description_raw: Centaur strikes a mighty blow at melee range, damaging both himself and a small area around the target. Deals extra damage based on your strength. Centaur cannot die from Double Edge.
lore: In the spurs of combat, Bradwarden's vicious strikes sometimes cause self-inflicted collateral damage.
shard: Causes Double Edge to slow enemy heroes and increase Centaur's strength per hero hit for a short time. Duration refreshes per stack, up to a max of %shard_max_stacks% stacks.

name: Retaliate
description_raw: Centaur counters all attacks, dealing damage back to the attacker. Returns a fixed amount plus a percentage of your strength. Deals half damage to towers.
lore: Bradwarden has no need to parry his opponent's attacks; his armor-like hide does it for him.

name: Stampede
description_raw: Centaur leads all allies into a vicious charge causing them to move through units at max speed and slow any enemy units they trample. Trampled enemies take damage based on Centaur Warrunner's strength. Each enemy can be trampled once.
lore: The great belt of Omexe, which labels Bradwarden as the greatest warrior of his kind, incites his fellow gladiators to follow him into barbarous combat.

name: Work Horse
description_raw: Centaur hitches a cart behind him. While active, Centaur gains the benefit of Stampede for the current level of Stampede, and can cast Hitch a Ride on a target ally.
lore: It is a great honor to be offered a ride by Centaur Warrunner and a grave mistake to refuse it.

name: Horsepower
description_raw:
Centaur Warrunner gains %strength_to_movement_pct%%% of his strength as bonus movement speed.

This Movement speed bonus does not stack with bonuses from boots.

name: Hitch A Ride
description_raw: Centaur tosses an ally into a cart hitched behind him. While in the cart, the ally is invulnerable and can still cast and attack normally, but cannot move independently or be targeted by opponents. Increases the attack range of melee heroes by %melee_attack_range%.
lore: The needs of Bradwarden's ample pride pale greatly in the face of his demand for victory.

name: Rawhide
description_raw: Permanently gain %health_per_upgrade% max health every %upgrade_rate%s.

name: Chaos Bolt
description_raw: Throws a mysterious bolt of energy at the target unit. It stuns for a random duration and deals random damage.
lore: Even Chaos Knight cannot predict this manifest of unholy energy.
shard: Causes Chaos Bolt to create a Phantasm illusion to attack the target. This illusion deals %illusion_damage_reduction_pct%%% less damage.

name: Reality Rift
description_raw: Teleports Chaos Knight, any illusions he has, and the target unit to a point along the line between him and the target. The enemy unit has their armor reduced for %duration%s.
lore: Armageddon rides between the planes, bringing Chaos Knight to his victim wherever he may hide.
shard: Allows Reality Rift to be cast on any enemy hero that is within 1200 range of you or one of your illusions. Gathers all of your illusions and your hero and teleports them to the target enemy.

name: Chaos Strike
description_raw: Chaos Knight and his illusions' attacks have a chance to deal a critical strike of varying strength with bonus lifesteal. Lifesteal from creeps is reduced.
lore: Chaos Knight's unwieldy power bludgeons those who stand before him, crushing the thickest of armors.

name: Phantasm
description_raw: Summons several phantasmal copies of the Chaos Knight from alternate dimensions. The phantasms are illusions that deal %outgoing_damage_tooltip%%% damage, but take %incoming_damage_tooltip%%% damage.\nDISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
lore: Drawing on his battles fought across many worlds and many times, phantasms of the Chaos Knight rise up to quell all who oppose him.
scepter:
Gains a passive component. When an illusion of Chaos Knight is created, there is a %bonus_illusion_chance%%% chance to create an additional illusion under Chaos Knight's control.

When Phantasm is activated, also creates an illusion of allied heroes globally.

name: Phantasmagoria
description_raw: All Chaos Knight Illusions are Strong Illusions and take less damage when near him.

name: Reins of Chaos
description_raw: Whenever illusions of Chaos Knight are created, there is a %bonus_illusion_chance%%% chance that an additional %bonus_illusion_count% extra illusion will spawn.

name: Fundamental Forging
description_raw: Chaos Knight's Neutral Items get an additional random enchantment.

name: Penitence
description_raw: Damages enemy unit, forces it to move slower and lets allies attack it more quickly.
lore: Although Chen's brand of animal enthrallment isn't quite strong enough to control the minds of enemy heroes, it still tests their resolve in combat.

name: Divine Favor
description_raw: Passively provides an aura that grants increased health regeneration. Can be cast on allies to provide them with bonus armor and increasing the healing and health regeneration they receive.\n\nIf cast on Chen, all units controlled by Chen receive the buff.
lore: Chen's zeal is infectious, blessing his allies with vitality and compelling them to his side.

name: Holy Persuasion
description_raw: Chen takes control of an enemy or neutral creep and receives a percentage of its bounty. Its maximum health is set to %health_min%. Converted creeps will have increased movement speed and bonus damage. Chen may globally target his own creep if it has not taken damage in the last %unsummon_time% seconds to unsummon it.
lore: Although they may not be knights, Chen incorporates beasts into the Fold in the same way he himself was converted.
shard: Allows Holy Persuasion to target Ancient creeps. Can control up to 1/2/3 Ancient creeps based on Hand of God's level. Additionally levels up some abilities of creeps by 1 level.

name: Martyrdom
description_raw: Sacrifice the life of this unit to damage an enemy for %base_value% + %current_hp_pct%%% of this unit's current health.  Allies may also be targeted for a heal with %heal_factor%%% of the damage value.

name: Hand of God
description_raw: Heals all allied heroes on the map as well as all units under Chen's control. A large heal is applied at first and a slow heal over time is applied for %hot_duration% seconds afterwards.
lore: Using the mental link with his thralls, Chen calls down restoration and well-being to those who share his fanaticism.
scepter: Decreases the cooldown of Hand of God to %AbilityCooldown%s and it becomes a channelled spell that lasts for up to %AbilityChannelTime% seconds. The initial heal happens at the start of the channel, and while channeling other nearby allied units become debuff immune with %debuff_immune_resist%%% magic resistance and the power of the heal over time is increased by %nearby_hot_boost%%%.

name: Zealot
description_raw:
Whenever Chen respawns, he is joined by a Zealot, a melee warrior creep with the ability to sacrifice itself to heal or deal damage to an enemy. The Zealot receives Holy Persuasion's benefits and scales up with other lane melee creeps as game time increases and gains extra base damage. The Zealot respawns next to Chen after %zealot_respawn_time%s.

Zealot may be activated to teleport a unit under your control to Chen after a %teleport_delay% second delay. If Chen is targeted, it will teleport all units you control. Taking damage from enemy heroes or their units will cancel the teleport.

name: Strafe
description_raw:
Clinkz gains attack speed and has bonus attack range. Any current Skeleton Archers within a %strafe_skeleton_radius% radius of Clinkz also gain bonus attack range and %archer_attack_speed_pct%%% of the attack speed bonus.

Casting Strafe does not break Skeleton Walk invisibility.
lore: The closest Clinkz can come to peace is knowing that this was the last thing Maraxiform ever saw.

name: Burning Barrage
description_raw: CHANNELED - Clinkz channels and shoots multiple piercing arrows in the target direction that hit all enemy units dealing a percentage of Clinkz' attack damage and applying attack modifiers.
lore: It's hard to say whether the blur around the Bone Fletcher is from his flaming heart or his speed with the quiver.

name: Searing Arrows
description_raw:
Imbues Clinkz's arrows with fire for extra damage.

Skeleton Archers will fire Searing Arrows at targets Clinkz attacks for %skeleton_damage_pct%%% damage.
lore: Clinkz simply lights his arrows from his flaming essence for quite the destructive effect.

name: Skeleton Walk
description_raw:
Clinkz moves invisibly through units until the moment he attacks or uses items. Leaving Skeleton Walk creates Skeleton Archers.

Skeleton Archers are immobile and die within multiple attacks from a hero or tower. Skeleton Archers deal a percentage of Clinkz' damage, and deal %skeleton_building_damage_reduction%%% less damage to buildings. Attack range is equal to Clinkz' attack range.
lore: With a burst of fire and puff of smoke, the Bone Fletcher was nowhere to be seen.

name: Burning Army
description_raw: Summons a row of Burning Skeleton Archers in the target location.
lore: Existing on the brink of life and death, Clinkz has learned to temporarily bridge the gap between the two.

name: Death Pact
description_raw: Clinkz consumes the target enemy creep or friendly Skeleton Archer, healing and gaining max health. Does not take Clinkz out of Skeleton Walk.
lore: Sutherex' bond of life and death has become a part of Clinkz, and his old bones are refreshed with repetition of the pact on lesser beings.

name: Bone and Arrow
description_raw: Clinkz summons a Skeleton Archer when he dies.

name: Tar Bomb
description_raw:
Clinkz throws a projectile filled with tar at the target enemy, dealing Magic damage on impact. After impact, the tar spills onto the ground and stays there for %ground_duration% seconds. Any enemy that walks across it gets slowed, and attacks from Clinkz or his Skeleton Archers will deal bonus physical damage.

When the Tar Bomb hits, any Skeleton Archers within attack range will attack the target. If autocast is activated, Clinkz will throw a tar bomb when attacking the target, if it is available.
lore: After his battle with Maraxiform, Clinkz found a useful source of ichor where his heart used to be.

name: Infernal Shred
description_raw:
Clinkz and his skeletons apply a stacking debuff that causes their attacks to pierce up to %max_armor_piercing_pct%%% of the target's total physical armor (does not reduce their armor). Clinkz applies %hero_stacks%%% per attack, and skeletons apply %skeleton_stacks%%%.

Lasts %duration% seconds.

name: Crystal Nova
description_raw: A burst of damaging frost slows enemy movement in the targeted area.
lore: The air temperature around Rylai drops rapidly, chilling all around her to the core.

name: Frostbite
description_raw: Encases an enemy unit in ice, prohibiting movement and attack, while dealing damage over time. Deals %creep_multiplier%x damage to non-ancient creeps.
lore: Rylai channels winds from the Blueheart Glacier, imprisoning attackers in thick blocks of ice.

name: Arcane Aura
description_raw:
Gives mana regeneration to all friendly units on the map. Allies within a %proximity_bonus_radius% radius of Crystal Maiden receive more mana regeneration.

Crystal Maiden passively gains mana regen amplification.
lore: Cold temperatures promote the essence of magic, causing Rylai's presence to allow spell usage in abundance.

name: Freezing Field
description_raw: CHANNELED - Surrounds Crystal Maiden with 100 random icy explosions that slow enemies and deal massive damage. Lasts %abilitychanneltime% seconds.
lore: Once the place of her exile, Icewrack has become an anchor for Rylai's frigid onslaught.
scepter: Allows you to move, cast and attack during Freezing Field. Can still be interrupted by enemies. You move %shard_self_movement_speed_slow_pct%%% slower during this. Increases total number of explosions by %shard_bonus_explosion%%%. Applies Frostbite to any unit that has been standing in the Freezing Field for over %frostbite_delay%s.

name: Stop Freezing Field
description_raw: Immediately stops the Freezing Field

name: Crystal Clone
description_raw: Slides in a direction, creating a crystal clone of herself in her place and disjointing incoming projectiles. If the clone takes enough damage or times out, it shatters, Frostbiting enemies in a %frostbite_radius% AoE around its place. The Clone can also be destroyed by Crystal Maiden's own spells.
lore: So convincing that some allies have spent minutes talking to the clone before they realized she wasn't speaking back.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_POINT | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_SHOW_IN_GUIDES | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_DONT_RESUME_MOVEMENT | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_DONT_RESUME_ATTACK | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_BACKSWING | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_CHANNEL | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IMMEDIATE

name: Glacial Guard
description_raw: A portion of the mana Crystal Maiden spends on her abilities is converted into a physical barrier.

name: Normal Punch
description_raw: Passive ability. Causes Dark Seer's next attack on a hero to have True Strike, knock a replica out of the victim, damaging and stunning them based on how far Dark Seer has moved in the past %recent_duration% seconds. Max power is reached after %max_distance% distance moved.
lore: As a young soldier, long before he became a leader of his people, Ish'Kafel was known amongst his fellow recruits as quite the pugilist.

name: Vacuum
description_raw: Dark Seer creates a vacuum over the target area that sucks in enemy units, disrupting them and dealing damage.
lore: Ish'Kafel modifies the center of gravity to a place of his choosing.

name: Ion Shell
description_raw: Surrounds the target unit with a bristling shield that damages enemy units in an area around it.
lore: The Dark Seer slices holes into the 'Land Behind the Wall,' causing prismatic energy to seep forth.

name: Surge
description_raw: Charges a target friendly unit with power, giving it a brief burst of phased movement speed. Allows the unit to reach maximum movement speed and cannot be slowed.
lore: Ish'Kafel once used his speed of mind to navigate the maze between the walls.
shard: Surged units leave behind a %trail_radius% radius trail that lasts %trail_duration%s, slows enemies around it by %trail_move_slow%%% and deals %trail_damage% damage per second in %trail_damage_interval%s intervals. Can be put on alt-cast to disable the trail.

name: Wall of Replica
description_raw: Raises a wall of warping light that slows, damages, and creates replicas of any enemy hero who crosses it. Enemy replicas serve at the Dark Seer's will. Replicas last until they are destroyed, or until the wall's duration ends.
lore: The Dark Seer, while unable to return to his natural realm, can channel part of the prismatic wall with powerful strength of mind, sowing confusion amongst enemy ranks.

name: Quick Wit
description_raw: Dark Seer gains %int_to_atkspd% Attack Speed from each point of Intelligence.

name: Heart of Battle
description_raw: Dark Seer moves faster when near other heroes.

name: Mental Fortitude
description_raw: Dark Seer's Intelligence cannot be lower than the average of his Strength and Agility.

name: Quick Wit
description_raw: Dark Seer gains %int_to_atkspd% Attack Speed from each point of Intelligence.\n\nWhen Dark Seer levels up, he restores a percentage of his max health and mana.

name: Bramble Maze
description_raw: Dark Willow creates a %placement_range% AoE maze of %placement_count% brambles that grow in the target area after %initial_creation_delay% seconds. Enemies that walk into a bramble are rooted and take damage over time. Lasts %placement_duration% seconds.
lore: The fae realm exists all around you, merely waiting to draw you in...

name: Bedlam
description_raw: Dark Willow sends her pet wisp to roam around herself for the duration, rapidly attacking nearby enemies.  Bedlam cannot be used while Terrorize is active.
lore: You'll have to excuse my friend Jex. He's really into murder.

name: Terrorize
description_raw: Dark Willow releases her pet wisp to terrorize her enemies. After a short delay, all enemies in the target area become fearful and run toward their home fountain. Terrorize cannot be used while Bedlam is active.
lore: You think you know the first thing about fear? Jex'll show you what that word truly means...

name: Shadow Realm
description_raw: Dark Willow recedes into the shadows, becoming untargetable.  Her next attack has %attack_range_bonus% bonus attack range and deals bonus magic damage, and will end Shadow Realm. Damage scales based on how long she remains under the effects of Shadow Realm, the maximum being reached after %max_damage_duration% seconds.
lore: What you can't see will most definitely hurt you.
scepter: Attacking no longer takes Dark Willow out of Shadow Realm. Each attack still has bonus damage based on the duration of the buff.

name: Cursed Crown
description_raw: Dark Willow casts an ancient fae curse on the target. After a delay, the target and nearby enemies are stunned.
lore: Didn't anyone ever tell you? Never strike a deal with a fairy...
shard: Cursed Crown creates %shard_bramble_amount% brambles in a %shard_spawn_radius% radius around the target after the counter ends. Triggers even upon dispel. Cursed Crown cooldown reduced by 1.5 seconds.

name: Pixie Dust
description_raw: Dark Willow gains %hp_regen_amp%%% bonus Health and Mana Regeneration, increased to %hp_regen_amp_out_of_world%%% while she is untargetable or invulnerable.

name: Starbreaker
description_raw: Dawnbreaker whirls her hammer around 3 times, damaging enemies with her attack plus bonus damage. On the final strike, she smashes her hammer down, stunning and damaging enemies in front of her.
lore: Across the vast lineage of star progeny, there were multitudes unwilling to align with the aims of the Children of Light. To those who dared organize defiance, the Children would dispatch Valora and her hammer to show a measure of their power--to leave the rebels either shattered or set back to rights.
shard: Dawnbreaker gains debuff immunity with %immunity_resist%%% magic resistance and free movement during Starbreaker. Dawnbreaker is slowed by %shard_movement_penalty%%% down to a minimum of %movement_speed%.

name: Celestial Hammer
description_raw: Dawnbreaker hurls her weapon at a target, damaging enemies struck along the way. The hammer pauses for %pause_duration% seconds at the destination before flying back to her, leaving a trail of fire that slows enemies. Dawnbreaker can recall the hammer at any time, pulling her towards it so they meet in the middle.
lore: The Brightmaul is Valora's oldest companion and sole remaining connection to the glow of her creators.

name: Converge
description_raw: Dawnbreaker recalls her hammer, pulling them together so they meet in the middle.

name: Luminosity
description_raw: After a number of attacks, Dawnbreaker powers up, charging her next attack with a critical hit that heals all allied heroes within %heal_radius% units around her for a portion of attack damage dealt. Creeps and neutral enemies provide less healing. Allies are healed for %allied_healing_pct%%% of the amount.
lore: Diminished in power without access to the Children's replenishing light, Valora can still recharge herself and her allies by creating order from the chaos which resides within each fight.
scepter: Dawnbreaker gets 2 Luminosity attacks every time she powers up.

name: Solar Guardian
description_raw:
CHANNELED - Dawnbreaker creates a pulsing effect at a location within %max_offset_distance% units of an allied hero anywhere on the map and creates daylight for %daytime_duration%s. Each pulse damages enemies and heals allies.

After a short duration, she flies to the target location and deals additional damage and stuns enemies upon landing.

Once channeled, Dawnbreaker cannot stop the ability.
lore: Only in defense of an ally will Valora relent to call upon the last reserves of her old powers that still allow cosmic flight.
scepter: Solar Guardian's aura follows Dawnbreaker for %scepter_aura_duration%s after landing.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NO_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IMMEDIATE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_UNRESTRICTED | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_PSEUDO_QUEUE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_SILENCE

name: Break of Dawn
description_raw: Whenever the sun comes out, Dawnbreaker gains bonus base damage and vision that decreases throughout the course of the day. If Dawnbreaker causes the day these bonuses are at full power for the entirety of that daytime.
scepter: Break of Dawn provides healing amplification equal to the current damage increase.

name: Celestial Hammer emits Solar Guardian aura
description_raw: {s:bonus_hammer_solar_guardian_radius} AoE. Hammer stationary duration increased by {s:bonus_pause_duration}. Damaging and Healing is {s:bonus_hammer_solar_guardian_effectiveness_pct}% of Solar Guardian's.

name: Poison Touch
description_raw: Releases a cone of poison that strikes multiple enemy units. Deals damage over time and slows the targets. Anytime the targets get attacked by Dazzle, the debuff duration is refreshed and slow is increased.
lore: One of the few Dezun rites used for offensive purposes, the paralytic enchantment often proves useful.

name: Shallow Grave
description_raw: An ally blessed with Shallow Grave, no matter how close to death, cannot die while under its protection. Healing on that ally is also amplified for the duration based on the hero's HP.
lore: Only a seasoned acolyte of the Shadow can properly perform the rite of preventing death.

name: Shadow Wave
description_raw: Sends out a bolt of power that arcs between allies, healing them while damaging any enemy units standing nearby.  Dazzle is always healed by Shadow Wave.
lore: While it is a simplistic and routine rite among Shadow Priests, the Shadow Wave is also the most critical for success.
scepter: Shadow Wave can now target and bounce between enemies in addition to allies. When bouncing to an enemy, they will take damage and heal nearby allies equal to %scepter_heal_pct%%% of the normal healing and damage values. Dazzle will also perform an attack against any enemy that Shadow Wave bounces to.

name: Nothl Projection
description_raw: Dazzle departs his body, traveling through the Nothl Realm as an invulnerable spirit that can cast spells, attack, and use items, leaving his body behind in the world with a visible tether. While active, Dazzle's basic abilities are empowered: Poison Touch hexes enemies, Shallow Grave heals upon expiration, and Shadow Wave has a shorter cooldown. The effect can be ended early, and Dazzle returns to the body at the end.
lore: The allure of the Nothl Realm is intoxicating, but Dazzle never forgets his purpose for being there.
shard: Nothl Projection can be cast while Dazzle is disabled. Increases healing done while in the Nothl Realm.

name: End Projection
description_raw: Ends Dazzle's sojourn in the Nothl Realm and returns his spirit to his body.

name: Weave
description_raw: Dazzle's abilities apply Weave to both allies and enemies they affect, increasing allied armor and reducing enemy armor. Multiple instances of this effect stack.
lore: His ethereal journey into the Nothl realm has allowed Dazzle to mend together the powers of light and dark, creating shifting waves of enchantments.
shard: Applying Weave to an ally heals them for %ally_heal% per stack of Weave.

name: Nothl Boon
description_raw: Dazzle's overhealing is converted into a barrier. Weave is stronger on allies and amplifies incoming heals from Dazzle.

name: +{s:bonus_attack_range_bonus} Poison Touch Attack Range
description_raw: +{s:bonus_attack_range_bonus} Attack Range when attacking an enemy affected by Poison Touch

name: Crypt Swarm
description_raw: Sends a swarm of winged beasts to savage enemy units in front of Death Prophet.
lore: Krobelus' many trips to the grave gather a flock of the damned.

name: Silence
description_raw: Fires a projectile that prevents enemy units in a target area from casting spells.
lore: Peering into the veil of her opponent's demise, Krobelus sees a silent future.

name: Witchcraft
description_raw: Death Prophet's occult knowledge deepens with experience, gaining movement speed and spell cooldown reduction.

name: Spirit Siphon
description_raw: Creates a spirit link between Death Prophet and an enemy unit, draining health from the enemy.
lore: Krobelus willingly shows others the path she alone cannot follow.
shard: Increases Spirit Siphon charges by %shard_bonus_charges% and causes enemies to be feared for %shard_fear_duration% seconds if they are siphoned for %shard_consecutive_siphon_duration% seconds consecutively.

name: Exorcism
description_raw: Unleashes evil spirits to drain the life of nearby enemy units and structures. Spirits need to return back to Death Prophet in order to attack again. At the end of the spell's duration, Death Prophet is healed in proportion to the damage dealt. Deals 50% damage to buildings. Lasts %abilityduration% seconds.
lore: Over time, the banshee remnants of her previous lives return to haunt the present.
scepter: Whenever an enemy is affected by Death Prophet's spells or when she attacks an enemy, a ghost will fly out and hit the enemy for an increased bonus of its usual damage then return to her with life.

name: Spirit Collector
description_raw: Hero deaths empower your next Exorcism.

name: Mourning Ritual
description_raw: Death Prophet delays a percentage of incoming damage, taking the damage in even intervals over a short duration.

name: Thunder Strike
description_raw: Repeatedly strikes the targeted unit with lightning.  Each strike damages nearby enemy units in a small radius and slows enemy movement and attack speed by %slow_amount%%% for %slow_duration% seconds.  Provides vision of its target.
lore: Disruptor's charged coils occasionally overload, and a singed armor plate or tuft of fur is the enemy's result.
shard: Increases the cast range and strike count of Thunder Strike. It can now also be ground targeted, where it will lie dormant for up to %shard_ground_delay% seconds and attach to the first enemy that comes within the radius.

name: Glimpse
description_raw: Teleports the target hero back to where it was %backtrack_time% seconds ago.  Instantly kills illusions. Deals damage equal to a percentage of the distance glimpsed, that cannot go over a damage maximum.
lore: Playing with electricity can have unexpected results.

name: Kinetic Field
description_raw: After a short formation time, creates a circular barrier of kinetic energy that enemies can't pass.
lore: The stryder is immune to the gale-force winds that will consume its adversaries.
shard: Both shapes have an independent cooldown.

name: Kinetic Fence
description_raw: After a short formation time, creates a wall out of kinetic energy that enemies cannot pass.
lore: For a brief moment, it's as if the wind itself had turned solid.

name: Static Storm
description_raw: Creates a damaging static storm that also silences all enemy units in the area for the duration.  The damage starts off weak, but increases in power over the duration.
lore: A summer squall in Druud is a hardship that only an Oglodi can survive.
scepter: Mutes items.

name: Electromagnetic Repulsion
description_raw: Whenever Disruptor takes more than %damage_threshold% damage from any source within %effect_radius% radius, all nearby enemies within take damage equal to %damage_per_int%x of Disruptor's Intelligence, and are pushed back up to a %effect_radius% distance away.
lore: Safe harbor found inside the storm.

name: +{s:bonus_duration}s Kinetic Field Duration
description_raw: Also affects Kinetic Fence

name: +{s:bonus_strike_damage_bonus} Thunder Strike Damage per Strike
description_raw: Every strike increases the damage of subsequent strikes until the debuff expires

name: Devour
description_raw: Consumes an enemy or neutral creep, acquiring any special abilities that it possessed. If alt-cast is activated, Doom will not acquire the creep's abilities. Duration is equal to the cooldown.
lore: Lucifer's appetite and greed are never sated.
shard: Devour has %AbilityCharges% charges and can target Ancients. Stolen creep abilities have %bonus_aoe_pct%%% increased AoE and %bonus_spell_amp_pct%%% increased spell amplification.

name: Lvl ? Pain
