description_raw: Doom's attacks curse enemy heroes. After %damage_debuff_duration%s, the cursed hero bursts with a pillar of fire, damaging itself and all units in a %spread_radius% AoE for %bonus_damage_pct_base%%% of the damage taken from Doom during the curse. The damage and radius of the curse is %bonus_at_level_pct%%% stronger if the enemy's level is a multiple of %level_multiplier%.

name: Scorched Earth
description_raw: Carpets the nearby earth in flames which damage enemies, while also granting Doom increased movement speed and health regeneration.
lore: The Fallen One spreads destruction in his wake, sparing none from the flame which sustains him.

name: Infernal Blade
description_raw: Doom swings his burning sword, igniting the enemy. Stuns for %ministun_duration% seconds and applies a %burn_duration% second burn that deals a base damage plus a percentage of the target's Max HP as damage per second.
lore: Lucifer shares the fire branding bestowed upon him at the time of his exile.

name: Doom
description_raw: Inflicts a curse that dispels an enemy and prevents them from casting spells or healing in any way, while taking damage over time.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
lore: When a name is tolled from the bell of Vashundol, doom is sure to follow.
scepter: Doom applies Break to enemies. Allies in a %scepter_aura_radius% radius around the doomed target also suffer the effects of Doom. Allows Doom to be self-cast to affect enemies around himself with Doom.

name: Devoured Ability
description_raw: This slot will be replaced with abilities acquired using Devour.

name: Devoured Ability
description_raw: This slot will be replaced with abilities acquired using Devour.

name: Devil's Bargain
description_raw: Temporarily Disabled

name: Fireball
description_raw: Ignites an area, dealing damage over time that lingers on enemies in it. Has reduced cast range when melee.
lore: Most Dragon Knights name no greater horror than the scourge of dragon's fire.

name: Breathe Fire
description_raw: Unleashes a breath of fire in front of Dragon Knight that burns enemies and reduces the damage their attacks deal.
lore: Knight Davion's breath has become that of the mighty Eldwurm Slyrak, remembered for burning numerous other knights to a crisp.

name: Dragon Tail
description_raw: Dragon Knight smites an enemy unit with his shield, stunning and damaging it and units close to it.
lore: Davion's combination of dragon talents and knightly skills makes him a vicious opponent in melee combat.

name: Dragon Blood
description_raw:
The life blood of the Dragon improves Dragon Knight's health regeneration and armor.

Regen and armor are increased by %regen_and_armor_multiplier_during_dragon_form%%% during Elder Dragon Form.
lore: Slyrak's blood still courses through Davion's veins, giving him twice the vitality of an ordinary knight.

name: Wyrm's Wrath
description_raw: The life blood of the Dragon improves Dragon Knight's abilities and items to have increased AoE and causes his attacks to deal additional magic damage to enemy units.
lore: Slyrak's blood still courses through Davion's veins, giving him twice the vitality of an ordinary knight.

name: Elder Dragon Form
description_raw:
Dragon Knight assumes the form of the Elder Dragon, increasing the range of his abilities, gaining bonus movement speed, and a ranged attack with various properties. The Dragon evolves per level. The bonuses are cumulative.

Level 1 Green: Grants a corrosive damage over time that can also damage buildings.

Level 2 Red: Grants splash damage to the dragon's attacks.

Level 3 Blue: Grants a debuff immunity piercing movement and attack frost slow on attack.
lore: The dormant dragon power springs forth from within Davion, combining the powers of a legendary knight with a legendary Eldwurm.
scepter: Increases the current level of Dragon Form by one. Adds a Level 4 Black Dragon that has free pathing, bonus magic resistance, and increased other bonuses.

name: Frost Arrows
description_raw: Adds a freezing effect to Drow's attacks, slowing enemy movement and dealing bonus damage.  Slow lasts %abilityduration% seconds.
lore: Ice-encased arrows pierce the silence, chilling their victims to the core.
scepter: Frost Arrows now apply a Hypothermia stack to enemies, increasing damage from Frost Arrows and reducing their Health Restoration per stack. If an enemy dies with Hypothermia stacks, they burst and deal damage per stack and slow in an area around it.

name: Multishot
description_raw:
CHANNELED - Drow releases a flurry of arrows in continuous salvos, hitting enemies for extra damage and applying Frost Arrows. Lasts up to %abilitychanneltime% seconds.

Drow can move slowly and use items while casting Multishot.
lore: In the ranger's youth, learning to fire multiple arrows at once was considered a distracting frivolity. In the war of the Ancients, such technique has become strange necessity.

name: Gust
description_raw: Releases a wave that silences and knocks back and reveals invisible enemy units. Knockback distance is relative to how close they are to Drow.
lore: Traxex is rather fond of the tranquility of physical combat, calling on her Drow heritage to end the incantations of opposing magi.

name: Precision Aura
description_raw: Grants Drow bonus agility based on Drow's current agility and level. Nearby ranged heroes received %trueshot_agi_bonus_allies_pct%%% of the bonus agility.
lore: Traxex' time spent alone in the forests of her Drow home has allowed her to teach other archers how to improve their bow skills.

name: Marksmanship
description_raw: Drow's experiences in battle grant her a chance to launch arrows with incredible accuracy and effectiveness. Pierces through the enemy's defenses, ignoring their base armor. This ability is disabled if there is an enemy hero within %disable_range% range.
lore: The Drow Ranger is the epitome of archery prowess.

name: Glacier
description_raw:
Drow creates a hill of ice beneath her, knocking away nearby enemies. Units on the hill gain flying vision and Drow and her ranged allies gain bonus attack range. Drow gains additional damage while on the Glacier and attacking targets below her.

The front of the hill obscures vision and cannot be moved through except by Drow. Does not interrupt Multishot when cast.
lore: Traxex wasn't just adopted by the Drow, she was adopted by the lands they lived in.

name: Boulder Smash
description_raw: Earth Spirit smashes the target enemy or ally, sending them in the direction he is facing. If Earth Spirit targets an area, he will smash the nearest unit in a %remnant_smash_radius_tooltip% radius, prioritizing Stone Remnants. The travelling unit or Remnant damages all enemy units it hits.  If an enemy is hit by a Stone Remnant, they are also slowed. Stone Remnants travel further than other units.
lore: It is with the power of a mountain that Earth Spirit strikes his enemies.

name: Rolling Boulder
description_raw: Earth Spirit gathers himself into a boulder and, after a %delay%s delay, rolls toward the target location, dealing %damage% + %damage_str%%% STR damage and stunning enemy units. He will stop if he collides with an enemy hero or is stunned. If he rolls over a Stone Remnant, he will travel further and faster, and stun enemies for longer.
lore: Calling upon his connection to the land, the Earth Spirit draws loose stone to him, which forms a protective ball that he can use to roll short distances.

name: Geomagnetic Grip
description_raw:
Earth Spirit pulls the target Stone Remnant or Allied Unit. Enemies struck by the gripped target will be silenced.

Pulled Remnants also deal damage to struck enemies.

Cast range is reduced when targeting an ally.
lore: Like calls to like. Even the minerals found in the blood and bones of living beings are not immune to the call of the Earth Spirit.
shard: Decreases cooldown to %AbilityCooldown%s and increases allied unit cast range and pull speed.

name: Stone Remnant
description_raw:
Call a Stone Remnant to the target location. Stone Remnants have no vision and are invulnerable, and can be used with Earth Spirit's abilities. Calling a Stone Remnant consumes a charge, which recharge over time. Stone Remnant has %AbilityCharges% charges.

Earth Spirit passively gains %attack_damage_per_stone%%% bonus damage per unused Stone Remnant charge, and gains an additional %attack_damage_per_stone_used%%% bonus damage for %buff_duration%s when a Stone Remnant is targeted with an ability (does not stack).
lore: Earth Spirit calls forth a remnant of his stone army, long buried with him in the dark embrace of the Earth.

name: Enchant Remnant
description_raw:
Earth Spirit temporarily enchants a hero, granting them the properties of a Stone Remnant. After a short duration the remnant shatters, releasing the hero and damaging nearby enemies. < br>
Can be cast on Stone Remnants. Has a 5 second cooldown when used that way.
Has a larger cast range when cast on an ally hero.
lore: Kaolin uses the elemental power of the Earth to temporarily petrify living beings, so that they might be conscripted into his stone funerary army.

name: Magnetize
description_raw: Magnetizes units in a small nearby area, causing them to take damage for a short duration. Magnetized heroes cause nearby Stone Remnants to explode, destroying the remnant and refreshing Magnetize's duration on all nearby enemies. This process can repeat multiple times. If an enemy hero is affected by Geomagnetic Grip or Boulder Smash, all magnetized heroes share the effects.
lore: At the Earth Spirit's call, the minerals in the blood and bones of his enemies rebel against the bodies they find themselves in.

name: Earth Spirit Magnetizes himself
description_raw: Applies Magnetize at its current duration to enemy Heroes around Earth Spirit, and can be refreshed with Stone Remnants.

name: Fissure
description_raw: Slams the ground with a mighty totem, creating an impassable ridge of stone while stunning and damaging enemy units along its line.
lore: The Nishian totem splits the world to its core with tectonic force.
shard: Reduces Fissure cooldown and releases an Aftershock along its path that stuns for a shortened duration when Earthshaker casts another ability.

name: Enchant Totem
description_raw: Empowers Earthshaker's totem, causing it to deal extra damage and have %bonus_attack_range% bonus attack range on the next attack.
lore: Raigor's gorilla strength can destroy mountains.
scepter: Enchant Totem becomes a ground target ability, causing Earthshaker to jump in the air and land at the target spot, casting Enchant Totem there.  Self-casting the ability will behave in the original form, without jumping. Grants Enchant Totem a cleaving attack.

name: Aftershock
description_raw: Causes the earth to shake underfoot, adding additional damage and stuns to nearby enemy units when Earthshaker casts his abilities.
lore: The earth trembles beneath the mighty footsteps of Raigor.

name: Echo Slam
description_raw: Shockwaves travel through the ground, damaging enemy units.  Each enemy hit causes an echo to damage nearby units. Real heroes cause two echoes.
lore: Tectonic plates crack, mountains fold, and foes are crushed by the Echo Slam.

name: Spirit Cairn
description_raw: When Earthshaker dies, a %fissure_radius% radius fissure is created where he died. This fissure blocks movement and allows Earthshaker to continue to gain experience around it. It remains until Earthshaker respawns.

name: Slugger
description_raw: Enemies killed with Enchant Totem or Earthshaker's other abilities are sent flying, dealing damage to enemies they hit.

name: Echo Stomp
description_raw: CHANNELED - Elder Titan and his Astral Spirit both stomp the ground, damaging and knocking nearby enemy units unconscious around their locations.  The Elder Titan stomp deals physical damage, while the Spirit stomp deals magical damage.
lore: The force of creation still echoes in the stomp of the Titan.
shard: Lowers Cooldown. Echo Stomp may be placed on alt-cast to allow Elder Titan to take the place of the Astral Spirit as it completes its stomp.

name: Echo Stomp
description_raw: Elder Titan and his Astral Spirit both stomp the ground, damaging and knocking nearby enemy units unconscious around their locations.  The Elder Titan stomp deals physical damage, while the Spirit stomp deals magical damage.  Unconscious enemies will wake if they take damage.
lore: The force of creation still echoes in the stomp of the Titan.

name: Astral Spirit
description_raw: Elder Titan sends forth his Astral Spirit, damaging any units it passes through.  When the spirit rejoins the Titan, it grants bonus damage and movement speed for each unit it passed through.\n\nThe Astral Spirit possesses the Echo Stomp, Return Spirit, and Natural Order abilities.
lore: Like the four fundamentals, Elder Titan exists across all planes at once and can draw other aspects of himself to assist in times of need.
scepter: Causes Elder Titan to become debuff immune and gain %immunity_resist%%% magic resistance for %scepter_magic_immune_per_hero% seconds per affected enemy Hero when the spirit returns.

name: Return Astral Spirit
description_raw: Returns the Astral Spirit to Elder Titan.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IMMEDIATE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NO_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_DONT_RESUME_ATTACK | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_BACKSWING | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_CHANNEL | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_SILENCE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_UNRESTRICTED | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_PSEUDO_QUEUE

name: Move Astral Spirit
description_raw: Moves the Astral Spirit to target location.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IMMEDIATE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_POINT | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_DONT_RESUME_ATTACK | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_BACKSWING | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_CHANNEL | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_SILENCE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_UNRESTRICTED | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_PSEUDO_QUEUE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_FORCE_KEYBIND

name: Natural Order
description_raw: Reduces all elements to their basic levels, removing base armor and magic damage resistance from nearby enemy units. The armor reduction is centered around the hero, while the magic armor reduction is centered around Astral Spirit.
lore: As it was at the beginning, Elder Titan makes it so again.
shard: Every %tick_rate%s that enemy heroes stay under the effect of Natural Order, their armor is reduced by %armor_per_tick%, and magic resistance is reduced by %magic_resistance_per_tick%%%. Stacks up to %max_stacks% times.

name: Natural Order
description_raw: Reduces all elements to their basic levels, removing base armor and magic damage resistance from nearby enemy units. The armor reduction is centered around the hero, while the magic armor reduction is centered around Astral Spirit.
lore: As it was at the beginning, Elder Titan makes it so again.

name: Earth Splitter
description_raw: Sends forth a jagged crack in front of Elder Titan. After 3 seconds, the crack implodes, slowing movement while dealing damage to each enemy based on their maximum life. Half of the damage dealt is Magical damage, while the other half is Physical damage.
lore: That which he created, the titan tears asunder.

name: Momentum
description_raw: Elder Titan gains armor equal to a percentage of his bonus movement speed.

name: Tip the Scales
description_raw: Allied creeps and buildings affected by Glyph of Fortification or Roshan's Banner deal %damage_bonus%%% bonus damage.

name: Searing Chains
description_raw: Ember Spirit unleashes fiery bolas that wrap around nearby enemies, anchoring them in place and dealing damage each second.
lore: Xin's harshest lessons often employed the use of red-hot chains.

name: Sleight of Fist
description_raw: Ember Spirit dashes around with blazing speed, attacking all enemies in the targeted area of effect, then returning to his start location.  Deals bonus damage to heroes.
lore: The studied warrior must whip and weave through its enemies, burning each without pause.

name: Flame Guard
description_raw: Ember Spirit surrounds himself with a ring of fire that consumes incoming magic damage, absorbing a percentage of the damage taken. Flame Guard deals damage per second in an area around Ember Spirit while Flame Guard is active. If the shield is broken, the damage is also lost.
lore: An enemy should never be allowed to approach without difficulty.

name: Immolation
description_raw: Ember Spirit is continuously burning, dealing damage per second to all nearby enemies at all times.
shard: Grants Fire Remnants the current level of Immolation, and increases the damage per second and radius.

name: Fire Remnant
description_raw: Sends a Fire Remnant that runs to the target location at %speed_multiplier%%% Ember Spirit's speed. Using Activate Fire Remnant, Ember Spirit will dash out to all active Fire Remnants, destroying them and dealing damage in an area and then moving to the nearest Remnant.  Ember Spirit will end at the Remnant closest to the targeted location.
lore: By the spirit's power are Xin's teachings spread anew.
scepter: Increases cast range, initial remnant speed, and maximum charges.
shard: If an enemy hero dies near Ember Spirit, a Fire Remnant charge will be replenished. Additionally, when Ember Spirit dies a Fire Remnant is spawned at his location.

name: Activate Fire Remnant
description_raw: Select the Fire Remnant to arrive at.
lore: With blazing speed does a spirit fly!

name: Untouchable
description_raw: Enchantress beguiles her enemies, slowing their attacks when she is attacked.
lore: After attacking Aiushtha, most opponents are overwhelmed with guilt having attacked such a natural beauty.

name: Sproink
description_raw: Leaps backward, dodges incoming projectiles, and launches an Impetus attack on the %attack_targets% furthest enemy units within Enchantress' attack range + %bonus_attack_range%.
lore: Sproink is as Sproink does.

name: Little Friends
description_raw: Enchantress roots an enemy unit. All creeps, ally, enemy and neutral within a radius will gain bonus movement and attack speed and attack the chosen target for %duration% seconds.
lore: The laws of the forest may be oblique, but punishment for breaking them is swift and smiling.

name: Enchant
description_raw:
Enchantress charms an enemy. If the enemy is a hero, they are dispelled and slowed for %slow_duration%s, and Enchantress and her units gain bonus attack range against the target.

 If the enemy is a creep, she brings it under her control and receives %xp_gain_pct%%% of their experience bounty.  Enchantress can control creeps for up to %dominate_duration%s. 

DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
lore: A true steward of the forest, Aiushtha befriends all within it - from lowly trolls to powerful centaurs.
scepter: Enchantress can control multiple creeps at a time.

name: Nature's Attendants
description_raw: A cloud of wisps heals Enchantress and any friendly units nearby.
lore: Whimsical spirits of the woods possess a healing power that is quite subtle, but gains strength in numbers.

name: Impetus
description_raw: Places an enchantment on each attack while activated, causing it to deal additional damage based on how far away the target is.  The farther the target, the greater the damage dealt. Deals double damage to illusions.
lore: While Aiushtha favors peaceful means, she is capable of a magical onslaught from a distance, her spears gaining energy from the natural life around her.

name: Rabble-Rouser
description_raw: Enchantress causes neutral creeps or any unit under her control to deal additional damage to enemy Heroes.

name: Malefice
description_raw: Focuses Enigma's power on a target, causing it to take damage and become repeatedly stunned for multiple instances.  An instance strikes every %tick_rate% seconds.
lore: Strange gravities pull at the core of those who would oppose you, holding them in place.
shard: Increases Malefice stun duration by %shard_bonus_stun_duration_tooltip%s and creates an Eidolon next to the target every instance of Malefice stun. These Eidolons will not multiply further.

name: Demonic Summoning
description_raw: Summons three fragments of Enigma himself at the cost of health.  The eidolons health is increased by %current_health_pct%%% of Enigma's current health. These eidolons are all under Enigma's control, and repeated successful attacks cause them to multiply.  When this happens, the eidolons have their health restored.
lore: Enigma is capable of drawing aspects of himself from other dimensions - the result is a trio of dark eidolons that hunt the corporeal plane.

name: Midnight Pulse
description_raw: Steeps an area in dark resonance, dealing %base_damage% + a percentage of the enemies current HP as damage.
lore: A section of the world slowly descends into the void.

name: Black Hole
description_raw: CHANNELED - Summons a vortex that sucks in nearby enemy units.  Enemies affected by Black Hole cannot move, attack, or cast spells.
lore: The ground trembles as Enigma channels his ultimate vortex of destruction, a singularity with the power to end worlds.
scepter: Black Hole deals additional damage equivalent to %scepter_pct_damage%%% of the unit's Max Health per second and does a non-interrupting pull towards it in a %scepter_radius% AoE. Pulls at a rate of %scepter_drag_speed%.

name: Gravity Well
description_raw: Allies within %max_dist% distance from Enigma have up to %damage_reduction%%% Damage Reduction. Effect starts at 0% at max distance and increases to its maximum strength when the ally is at %min_dist% distance. Does not affect Enigma itself.

name: Splitting Image
description_raw: Enigma spawns Eidolons upon receiving damage.

name: Event Horizon
description_raw: Units in a %radius% radius moving away from Enigma have a movespeed penalty.

name: Time Walk
description_raw: Rushes to a target location while backtracking any damage taken the last %backtrack_duration% seconds.
lore: Darkterror tears a hole in time, passing through Claszureme, and appearing back in an instant.
scepter: Applies a Time Lock to all units at the landing destination.

name: Distortion Field
description_raw: Enemy Attack Projectiles targetting Faceless Void or allied heroes within a %friendly_hero_distance% radius of him get slowed by %attack_projectile_slow%%%, when they get  within %slow_distance_max% distance of their target.

name: Reverse Time Walk
description_raw: Available for 1.5 seconds after landing Time Walk. If used in this period, you will reverse your time walk back to your previous cast location. Does not affect health or proc scepter hits.
lore: It's all relative.

name: Time Lock
description_raw: Adds the chance for an attack to lock an enemy unit in time while attacking it a second time.
lore: The strike of the Faceless Void lands with dimension shifting force.

name: Time Dilation
description_raw: Faceless Void envelops nearby enemies with time dilating fields to slow cooldown progression of their abilities. Each enveloped enemy gains one Time Dilation stack when applied, and one stack per ability they have on cooldown. Each stack deals damage per second and slows movement and attack speed. The duration is paused while affected by Chronosphere.
lore: For those facing off against Darkterror, each moment seems to stretch into eternity.
shard: Increases slow per stack. Provides Faceless Void with stacks that increase his attack and movement speed. Amount of stacks is equal to the total amount of Time Dilation stacks applied to enemies at the moment of the cast and linearly fades out over the duration.

name: Chronosphere
description_raw: Creates a blister in spacetime, trapping all units caught in its sphere of influence and causes you to move very quickly inside it. Only Faceless Void and any units he controls are unaffected. Invisible enemies in the sphere will be revealed.
lore: When a rift opens to Claszureme, all poor souls caught within will likely never return.

name: Time Zone
description_raw: Creates a blister in spacetime, altering the movement, cast, projectile, cooldown, and turn rate speed of all units inside. Allies have increased speed and cooldown acceleration. Enemies have decreased speed, and have frozen ability and item cooldowns. Does not affect Ultimate abilities. Time Dilation does not tick down while inside.
lore: For the Acolytes of Clasz, stopping time is trivial, but manipulating the minutiae of its flow requires a mastery few have attained.

name: +{s:dodge_chance_pct}% Backtrack Chance
description_raw: Grants a {s:dodge_chance_pct}% chance to avoid damage entirely. Disabled by break.

name: Sprout
description_raw: Sprouts a ring of trees around a unit, damaging and trapping it in place and providing vision in a %vision_range% radius.
lore: Verdant overgrowth is a common ailment reported by Nature's Prophet's attackers.

name: Teleportation
description_raw: Teleports to any point on the map. Gains a barrier after arriving to its destination.
lore: The Prophet keeps his sentinel over the forest, protecting it when in need.

name: Nature's Call
description_raw: Converts an area of trees into Treants under the command of Nature's Prophet.
lore: Verodicia bestowed the Prophet with the ability to summon the Treant Guard, a mythical sentient army of the wild.

name: Wrath of Nature
description_raw: Damaging energy bounces around the map, striking enemies that are in vision starting with those closest to the cast point. Each enemy hit beyond the first adds damage, up to the maximum after %max_targets% are hit.
lore: Nature's Prophet calls Verodicia's fury to strike down those who might ravage the wilderness.
scepter: Entangles all enemies it hits. Duration scales from %scepter_min_entangle_duration%s up to %scepter_max_entangle_duration%s seconds at max bounce.

name: Curse of the Oldgrowth
description_raw: Applies a curse on all enemy heroes within %range% range, displaying them in fog, slowing them, and dealing damage over time based on the number of trees within %radius% radius. Treants count as trees for this purpose.
lore: Though powerful, Nature's Prophet's gifts do not include all-sight, and he must rely heavily upon reconnaissance and aid from a long-standing network of stalwart friends.

name: Spirit of the Forest
description_raw: Nature's Prophet gains %damage_per_tree_pct%%% bonus damage for each nearby tree. Treants also provide this bonus with multiplied values regardless of proximity. Treants also possess this ability.

name: Nature's Profit
description_raw: Whenever Nature's Prophet kills an enemy hero or one dies within a %radius% radius, a money tree is created in their place. Every tick, several bags of gold are dropped that can be picked up by nearby heroes. The amount of gold is equal to a multiplier of the slain hero level.

name: Stroke of Fate
description_raw:
Grimstroke paints a curved path of ink with his brush, damaging and slowing enemies. The damage is increased with each enemy the ink hits.

Can be put on alt-cast to have the path be straight.
lore: The corruptive force of Grimstroke's ink, drawn from the reservoir of his fallen people, consumes any enemy caught in its path.

name: Phantom's Embrace
description_raw: Summons a phantom that moves quickly towards the target, latching to it when she arrives. Once latched, the phantom damages and silences. If she survives the full latch duration she rends her victim for heavy damage and refreshes Phantom's Embrace's cooldown.\n\nHero attacks against the phantom count as 3 attacks each.
lore: Grimstroke holds no sorrow for the downfall of his people. Only for Yaovhi, she who was most dear to him, does he feel even a semblance of longing.

name: Dark Portrait
description_raw: Creates an ink illusion of a target enemy hero. Illusion is debuff immune, has %immunity_resist%%% magic resistance, and has bonus movement speed and attack damage.
lore: No dark creation is beyond the skill of the master's hand.

name: Ink Swell
description_raw: Grimstroke shrouds an allied unit in ink, increasing its movement speed. Enemies in range of the allied unit are damaged with inky tendrils over time. After %buff_duration% seconds it applies damage and stun in an area around the unit in proportion to how long ink tendril was near any hero.
lore: Now that the rise of the ink tide no longer threatens to overwhelm Grimstroke, its tendrils of power are never far from his hand.
shard:
Ink Swell dispels the allied unit when cast. Causes Ink Swell to deal %shard_bonus_damage_pct%%% more damage and heal the target for %shard_heal_pct%%% of the damage Ink Swell deals.

DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel

name: Ink Explosion
description_raw: Triggers an existing Ink Swell.

name: Soulbind
description_raw: Binds a targeted enemy hero to its nearest allied hero within the bind radius, preventing both from moving away from each other. Any unit-targeted ability that either bound hero receives also gets cast on the other hero. If the bind is broken before the duration expires, the initial target will be bound to its nearest allied hero in the radius.
lore: The Ascended were chosen sons of Ashkavor, granted immense power by the bonds forged between their own souls and those they were charged with protecting. In the years that followed the ruination of his kin, Grimstroke discovered much more sinister applications for the binding rituals...

name: Ink Trail
description_raw: Grimstroke's attacks and spells cause affected enemy heroes to leave a trail of Ink behind them and deal less damage to Grimstroke for %debuff_duration%s.

name: Rocket Barrage
description_raw: Launches a salvo of rockets at nearby enemy units in a radius around the Gyrocopter. Lasts %barrage_duration% seconds.
lore: Aurel's new craft has an increased payload for rockets, enhancing their rapid-fire capabilities.

name: Homing Missile
description_raw: Fires a homing missile to seek the targeted enemy unit. The missile gains speed over time, dealing damage and stunning when it impacts the target. Enemy units can destroy the missile before it reaches its target.
lore: The biggest missile Aurel could possibly attach to his craft, The Bomb has carefully calculated aerodynamics and explosives for maximum impact.
shard: Homing Missiles now constantly fires the current level of Rocket Barrage in a %shard_radius% area of effect after %shard_delay% second of being cast. This Rocket Barrage prioritizes the Homing Missile target.

name: Flak Cannon
description_raw: Gyrocopter's attacks hit all enemy units in an area around it for a limited number of attacks.  Only the main target of attacks will receive attack bonuses such as Critical Strike.  Lasts %abilityduration% seconds or until the attacks are used.
lore: This newly revamped Gyrocopter has attached enough armaments to assault in a 360 degree radius.

name: Call Down
description_raw: Call down %total_strikes% aerial missile strikes that slow and damage enemy units in a target area. Each strike is %strike_separation% distance from the previous one.
lore: 'Bombs Away!'

name: Side Gunner
description_raw: Gyrocopter gains a Side Gunner that attacks enemy units in a %AbilityCastRange% unit radius every %sidegunner_fire_rate%s with his attack. Prioritizes furthest unit away within its range.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IMMEDIATE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_POINT | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_UNIT_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_BACKSWING | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_CHANNEL

name: Chop Shop
description_raw: Gyrocopter can disassemble most items.

name: Afterburner
description_raw: Gyrocopter gains movement speed for a short duration after damaging an enemy with his attacks or abilities.

name: Hunter's Boomerang
description_raw: Tosses a boomerang in an arc. Upon contact, it returns to Hoodwink.  The boomerang will deal damage as it passes through or hits enemies, and apply a debuff that causes affected enemies to be slowed and be more vulnerable to spell damage.
lore: A precious last vestige of Hoodwink's childhood, converted into deadly distraction.

name: Decoy
description_raw: Hoodwink turns invisible, increasing her movement speed, and creates a decoy illusion that starts aiming a decreased damage Sharpshooter at the nearest enemy hero. If the illusion is attacked or hit by a targeted ability, it is destroyed and it throws a lesser bushwhack towards the enemy.
lore: The best traps trigger whether you touch them or not.

name: Acorn Shot
description_raw: Fires Hoodwink's attack with an acorn at the target unit.  The acorn bounces to nearby targets, slowing them and dealing a percentage of Hoodwink's attack with bonus damage.\nIf point targeted, a tree is created at the target position and the acorn will bounce to nearby targets.  The ability may be placed on alt-cast to force this behavior.
lore: Though she'll make do with almost anything, Oak and Ironwood acorns make the most effective projectiles -- and the bulk of Hoodwink's stash.

name: Bushwhack
description_raw: Tosses a net trap that stuns enemies if they are near a tree in the area.  Affected enemies take damage over time and are pulled towards the tree nearest to them within the target area, and have their vision reduced to 0 for the duration of the stun.
lore: Hoodwink favors Ironwood groves for ambushes, but the wary step carefully in all areas of the mistwoods.

name: Scurry
description_raw: Hoodwink gains bonus movement speed, phased movement, and tree-walking for a brief time. While active, the redirect chance of Mistwoods Wayfarer is multiplied by %evasion_multiplier%.
lore: There's not a nook or cranny in the Wood Tomo'kan out of reach of Hoodwink's paws.

name: Sharpshooter
description_raw: Hoodwink charges up and fires a deadly bolt from her crossbow, dealing heavy damage, break and slow to an enemy Hero.  The damage and debuff duration scale up to max after %max_charge_time% seconds, and the bolt is fired automatically after %misfire_time% seconds.\nHoodwink is knocked backwards for a distance of %recoil_distance% from the force of the shot. Creeps hit by the bolt are damaged for half the values.
lore: While her first arbalest was a chance discovery, Hoodwink now takes great care in carving and caring for her own -- of course with some necessary components pilfered or otherwise cleverly procured.
scepter: Increases arrow speed and movement speed slow.

name: End Sharpshooter
description_raw: Release the charged up shot, regain ability to move and attack.
lore: Fire!

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IMMEDIATE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NO_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_BACKSWING | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_DONT_RESUME_ATTACK

name: Mistwoods Wayfarer
description_raw: Hoodwink has a chance to redirect enemy attacks to a nearby tree.

name: Tomo'kan Tracker
description_raw: Hoodwink can see footprints of where enemy Heroes have been in the last %trail_history_duration% seconds in a %search_radius% area around her.

name: Inner Fire
description_raw: In a fiery rage, knocks all nearby enemies away from you to a fixed distance, dealing damage and silencing them.
lore: Not even Huskar's own flesh can contain the unending expansion of his life force.

name: Burning Spear
description_raw: Huskar sets his spears aflame, dealing damage over time with his regular attack.  Multiple attacks will stack additional damage.  Each attack drains some of Huskar's health.
lore: The Sacred Warrior ignites his weaponry after marking it with his own blood - causing far greater pain than he himself feels.
scepter: Burning Spears launches an additional %multishot_targets% spears onto random enemies within Huskar's attack range.

name: Berserker's Blood
description_raw: Huskar's injuries feed his power, giving increased attack speed, magic resistance and health regen based on missing health. Health regen is a percentage of your strength.
lore: After losing his birthright, Huskar gained a lethality in physical combat that is only heightened as his own blood is spilled.
shard:
Huskar can activate Berserker's Blood for a health cost to cauterize himself. Dispels Huskar, then after a delay, heals for the amount of health consumed plus an additional bonus per debuff dispelled.

DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel

name: Blood Magic
description_raw:
Huskar does not have mana. Mana costs of items are converted into health costs.

Huskar's Health Costs are Magical Damage and can be reduced by Magic Resist.

name: Life Break
description_raw: Huskar draws upon his health to break an enemy's life, leaping at a target to shatter a percentage of that hero's current health and slow both their movement and attack speed.  While leaping, Huskar is Debuff Immune with %immunity_resist%%% magic resistance.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
lore: No matter the danger, Huskar thrusts himself into melees that only he can survive.
scepter: Forces the enemy target to attack Huskar and increases cast range.

name: Quas
description_raw: Allows manipulation of ice elements. Active <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font> instances imbue Invoker with bonus hp regeneration. Passively grants bonus strength per level of <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font>.
lore: A quelling cold.
scepter: Grants %scepter_bonus_levels% current and max level.

name: Wex
description_raw: Allows manipulation of storm elements. Active <font color='#d671a9'>Wex</font> instances imbue Invoker with bonus movement and attack speed. Passively grants bonus agility per level of <font color='#d671a9'>Wex</font>.
lore: A withering wind.
scepter: Grants %scepter_bonus_levels% current and max level.

name: Exort
description_raw: Allows manipulation of fire elements. Active <font color='#cabe68'>Exort</font> instances imbue Invoker with bonus attack damage. Passively grants bonus intelligence per level of <font color='#cabe68'>Exort</font>.
lore: An exacting flame.
scepter: Grants %scepter_bonus_levels% current and max level.

name: Invoked Spell
description_raw: Casting Invoke will replace this slot with one of ten unique spells based on Invoker's currently active <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font>, <font color='#d671a9'>Wex</font>, and <font color='#cabe68'>Exort</font> buffs.

name: Invoked Spell
description_raw: Casting Invoke will replace this slot with one of ten unique spells based on Invoker's currently active <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font>, <font color='#d671a9'>Wex</font>, and <font color='#cabe68'>Exort</font> buffs.

name: Invoke
description_raw:
Combines the properties of the elements currently being manipulated to create a new spell for Invoker to use. Invoke cooldown is reduced by %cooldown_reduction_per_orb% seconds for each orb level. Invoker gains a bonus ability point for his orbs at levels %first_ability_level%, %second_ability_level%, and %third_ability_level%.

Invoker's vast knowledge of magic allows him to choose from Multiple Aghanim's Scepter and Shard options. The items must be activated before they can be used, and cannot be changed after they are chosen.

Click the help button to see the list of possible spells.
lore: So begins a new age of knowledge.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NO_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IMMEDIATE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_SHOW_IN_GUIDES | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_CHANNEL | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_INVISIBLE

name: Attribute Bonus
description_raw: Improves all attributes per point spent

name: Cold Snap
description_raw: Invoker draws the heat from an enemy, chilling them to their very core for a duration based on the level of <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font>. The enemy will take damage and be briefly frozen. Further damage taken in this state will freeze the enemy again, dealing bonus damage. The enemy can only be frozen so often, but the freeze cooldown decreases based on the level of <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font>.
lore: Sadron's Protracted Frisson.

name: Ghost Walk
description_raw: Invoker manipulates the ice and electrical energies around him, rendering his body invisible and gaining health and mana regen. The elemental imbalance created as a consequence slows nearby enemies based on the level of <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font>, and slows Invoker as well based on the level of <font color='#d671a9'>Wex</font>.
lore: Myrault's Hinder-Gast.
shard: Ghost Walk now also applies the Ice Wall Damage Per Second to enemies in a larger radius.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NO_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IMMEDIATE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_CHANNEL | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_SHOW_IN_GUIDES

name: Tornado
description_raw: Unleashes a fast moving tornado that picks up enemy units in its path, suspending them helplessly in the air shortly before allowing them to plummet to their doom. Travels further based on the level of <font color='#d671a9'>Wex</font>. Holds enemies in the air for a duration based on the level of <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font>. Deals base damage plus added damage based on levels in <font color='#d671a9'>Wex</font>.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
lore: Claws of Tornarus.
scepter: Tornado spawns twisters along its path. They persist for Tornado's duration plus additional time based on <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font>, dealing damage based on <font color='#d671a9'>Wex</font> in a %twister_radius% radius every %twister_tick_rate% seconds. (half damage to creeps.)

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_POINT | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_BACKSWING | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_SHOW_IN_GUIDES | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_OVERSHOOT

name: E.M.P.
description_raw: Invoker builds up a charge of electromagnetic energy at a targeted location which automatically detonates after %delay% seconds. The detonation covers an area, draining mana based on the level of <font color='#d671a9'>Wex</font>. Deals damage for each point of mana drained.  If EMP drains mana from an enemy hero, Invoker gains %self_mana_restore_pct%%% of the mana drained.
lore: Endoleon's Malevolent Perturbation.
shard: Increases damage for each point of mana drained by EMP and pulls enemy units into the EMP's center at %drag_speed% units per second.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_POINT | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_AOE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_BACKSWING | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_SHOW_IN_GUIDES

name: Alacrity
description_raw: Invoker infuses an ally with an immense surge of energy, increasing their attack speed based on the level of <font color='#d671a9'>Wex</font> and their damage based on the level of <font color='#cabe68'>Exort</font>.
lore: Gaster's Mandate of Impetuous Strife.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_UNIT_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_DONT_RESUME_ATTACK | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_BACKSWING | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_SHOW_IN_GUIDES

name: Chaos Meteor
description_raw: Invoker pulls a flaming meteor from space onto the targeted location. Upon landing, the meteor rolls forward, constantly dealing damage based on the level of <font color='#cabe68'>Exort</font>, and rolling further based on the level of <font color='#d671a9'>Wex</font>. Units hit by the meteor will also be set on fire for a short time, receiving additional damage based on the level of <font color='#cabe68'>Exort</font>.
lore: Tarak's Descent of Fire.

name: Sun Strike
description_raw: Sends a catastrophic ray of fierce energy from the sun at any targeted location, incinerating all enemies standing beneath it once it reaches the earth. Deals damage based on the level of <font color='#cabe68'>Exort</font>, however this damage is spread evenly over all enemies hit.
lore: Harlek's Incantation of Incineration.
scepter: Creates a Cataclysm when Sun Strike is double tapped. Puts it on a %cataclysm_cooldown% second cooldown. Creates %cataclysm_count% visible %cataclysm_damage_pct%%% damage Sun Strikes within %cataclysm_min_range%-%cataclysm_max_range% range of each enemy hero.
shard: If Sun Strike damages an enemy Hero, a Forge Spirit of current level is created at the location.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_POINT | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_AOE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_BACKSWING | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_SHOW_IN_GUIDES

name: Forge Spirit
description_raw: Invoker forges a spirit embodying the strength of fire and fortitude of ice. Damage and armor are based on the level of <font color='#cabe68'>Exort</font> while attack range, health, and duration are based on the level of <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font>. The elemental's scorching attack is capable of melting the armor of enemy heroes. The number of spirits spawned is determined by the lower level of <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font> and <font color='#cabe68'>Exort</font>.
lore: Culween's Most Cunning Fabrications.

name: Forge Spirit (AD)
description_raw: Invoker forges a spirit embodying the strength of fire and fortitude of ice. The elemental's scorching attack is capable of melting the armor of enemy heroes.
lore: Culween's Most Cunning Fabrications.

name: Melting Strike
description_raw: Melts away the armor of heroes hit by the spirit's attack. Each successive hit increases the amount of armor melted.

name: Ice Wall
description_raw: Generates a wall of solid ice directly in front of Invoker for a duration based on the level of <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font>. The bitter cold emanating from it greatly slows nearby enemies based on the level of <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font> and deals damage each second based on the level of <font color='#cabe68'>Exort</font>.
lore: Killing Wall of Koryx.
scepter: Ice Wall becomes Ice Floe, Vector Targeted. After a delay, Ice Floe appears as a %wall_width% width Ice Wall. Enemy heroes in its area for longer than %root_delay% seconds become rooted and take magic damage based on <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font>.

name: Deafening Blast
description_raw: Invoker unleashes a mighty sonic wave in front of him, dealing damage to any enemy unit it collides with based on the level of <font color='#cabe68'>Exort</font>. The sheer impact from the blast is enough to knock those enemy units back for a duration based on the level of <font color='#7998b5'>Quas</font>, then disarm their attacks for a duration based on the level of <font color='#d671a9'>Wex</font>.
lore: Buluphont's Aureal Incapacitator.

name: Mastermind
description_raw: When Invoker denies a lane creep, he gets %xp_on_deny_percent%%% of the XP.

name: Cold Snap (AD)
description_raw: Invoker draws the heat from an enemy, chilling them to their very core for a duration. The enemy will take damage and be briefly frozen. Further damage taken in this state will freeze the enemy again, dealing bonus damage. The enemy can only be frozen so often, but the freeze cooldown decreases as the level goes up.
lore: Sadron's Protracted Frisson.

name: Ghost Walk (AD)
description_raw: Invoker manipulates the ice and electrical energies around him, rendering his body invisible. The elemental imbalance created as a consequence slows nearby enemies, and slows Invoker as well based on the level.
lore: Myrault's Hinder-Gast.

name: Tornado (AD)
description_raw: Unleashes a fast moving tornado that picks up enemy units in its path, suspending them helplessly in the air shortly before allowing them to plummet to their doom. Travels further based on the level and holds enemies in the air for a duration.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
lore: Claws of Tornarus.

name: E.M.P. (AD)
description_raw: Invoker builds up a charge of electromagnetic energy at a targeted location which automatically detonates after %delay% seconds. The detonation covers an area, draining mana. Deals damage for each point of mana drained.  If EMP drains mana from an enemy hero, Invoker gains 50% of the mana drained.
lore: Endoleon's Malevolent Perturbation.
shard: Increases damage for each point of mana drained by EMP and pulls enemy units into the EMP's center at %shard_drag_speed% units per second.

name: Alacrity (AD)
description_raw: Invoker infuses an ally with an immense surge of energy, increasing their attack speed and their damage.
lore: Gaster's Mandate of Impetuous Strife.

name: Sun Strike (AD)
description_raw: Sends a catastrophic ray of fierce energy from the sun at any targeted location, incinerating all enemies standing beneath it once it reaches the earth. Damage is spread evenly over all enemies hit.
lore: Harlek's Incantation of Incineration.
scepter: Adds Cataclysm. Launched when Sun Strike is double tapped. Puts it on a %cataclysm_cooldown% second cooldown. Creates %cataclysm_count% visible Sun Strikes within %cataclysm_min_range%-%cataclysm_max_range% range of each enemy hero.

name: Chaos Meteor (AD)
description_raw: Invoker pulls a flaming meteor from space onto the targeted location. Upon landing, the meteor rolls forward, constantly dealing damage and rolling further based on the level. Units hit by the meteor will also be set on fire for a short time.
lore: Tarak's Descent of Fire.

name: Ice Wall (AD)
description_raw: Generates a wall of solid ice directly in front of Invoker for a duration. The bitter cold emanating from it greatly slows nearby enemies and deals damage each second.
lore: Killing Wall of Koryx.

name: Deafening Blast
description_raw: Invoker unleashes a mighty sonic wave in front of him, dealing damage to any enemy unit it collides with. The sheer impact from the blast is enough to knock those enemy units back for a duration then disarm their attacks for a duration.
lore: Buluphont's Aureal Incapacitator.

name: Dual Breath
description_raw: An icy blast followed by a wave of fire launches out in a path in front of Jakiro. The ice slows enemies, while the fire delivers damage over time.
lore: Pyrexae dragons have tremendously dangerous breath for each branch of the species; combining them is unimaginable.

name: Ice Path
description_raw: Creates a path of ice that stuns and damages enemies that touch it.
lore: Jakiro's cunning right head calls upon its frozen heritage, glazing the earth with blistering cold.

name: Destroy Ice Path
description_raw: Destroy the Ice Path, dealing damage and stunning enemies.

name: Liquid Fire
description_raw: Jakiro burns his enemies in an area of effect with fire added to his attack, while slowing their attacks. Shares a cooldown with Liquid Frost.
lore: The left maw of Jakiro opens, laying waste to any in its path.
shard: Jakiro's Liquid Fire has no mana cost and no longer shares a cooldown with Liquid Frost.

name: Liquid Frost
description_raw: Jakiro chill his enemies with ice added to his attack, slowing movement for %duration% seconds and increasing damage taken from Jakiro's attacks and abilities. This effect does not apply to buildings. Shares a cooldown with Liquid Fire.
lore: The right maw of Jakiro opens, punishing all with bitter frost.
shard: Jakiro's Liquid Frost has no mana cost and no longer shares a cooldown with Liquid Fire.

name: Macropyre
description_raw: Jakiro exhales a wide line of lasting flames, which deals damage per second to any enemy units caught in the fire.
lore: Ice and fire combine to rip the battlefield to shreds with extreme temperatures.
scepter: Increases Macropyre duration and causes it to deal Pure damage. Jakiro emits two walls of ice along the edges of the Macropyre that slow any enemies trying to cross them by %ice_edge_movement_slow%%%.

name: Double Trouble
description_raw: Jakiro's attacks launch an attack from each head, but deal less damage each.

name: Blade Dance
description_raw: Gives Juggernaut a chance to deal critical damage with Blade Fury and on each attack.
lore: The last remnant of his heritage's commitment to bladework, Yurnero ensures that the style is remembered.

name: Blade Fury
description_raw: Causes a bladestorm of destructive force around Juggernaut, rendering him debuff immune with %immunity_resist%%% magic resistance and dealing damage every %blade_fury_damage_tick%s to nearby enemy units. Applies a strong dispel at the end of the spin.
lore: Yurnero's renowned katana techniques are feared by warriors and sorcerors alike.
scepter:
Increases radius and slows enemies in the area of effect.

Juggernaut preforms an attack on affected enemies every %attack_interval%s.

name: Healing Ward
description_raw: Summons a Healing Ward which heals all nearby allied units, based on their max health.  The Healing Ward moves at %healing_ward_movespeed_tooltip% movement speed after being summoned.  Lasts %abilityduration% seconds.
lore: Of the rituals learned at the Isle of Masks, tending wounds with a bit of voodoo magic has proven to be quite useful.
shard: Increases ward healing and health.

name: Omnislash
description_raw: Juggernaut leaps towards the target enemy units, and then slashes the target and other nearby enemy units at an increased attack rate. Juggernaut is invulnerable for the duration.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
lore: 'The fruits of discipline; with practice comes strength.'

name: Swiftslash
description_raw: Performs a short Omnislash for %duration% seconds.
lore: A briefer onslaught for those less deserving of the honor.

name: Duelist
description_raw: Juggernaut deals %front_damage_increase%%% more damage to targets that are facing him. Damage bonus always applies during Omnislash.

name: Bladeform
description_raw: Juggernaut gains a stack of Bladeform every %stack_gain_time%s that Juggernaut does not take damage. Each stack grants bonus base Agility and Movement Speed. Stacks fade after %linger_duration%s upon taking any damage.

name: Illuminate
description_raw: CHANNELED - Channels light energy, building power the longer it's channeled.  Once released, a wave is sent forth that deals damage and gives vision in its path.  The longer it is channeled, the more damage is dealt.
lore: Ezalor's hidden light reveals itself in marvelous fashion.

name: Solar Bind
description_raw: Weakens an enemy's magical resistance, and applies a slow that increases in strength the more the target moves.
lore: Even a glimpse of the First Light is enough to rob enemies of their senses.
shard: Grants %AbilityCharges% charges.

name: Will-O-Wisp
description_raw: Summons Ignis Fatuus at the targeted area. Alternates on and off, drawing enemies closer with its mesmerising flicker.
lore: Though he would not claim to 'know' them, Ezalor holds an uncanny influence over many powerful creatures always willing to come to his aid.

name: Chakra Magic
description_raw: Restores mana to the target unit and reduces cooldowns of all basic abilities currently on cooldown by a fixed amount. Is %self_bonus%%% more effective when used on himself.
lore: In the same vein, Ezalor bestows his harmony among others.

name: Spirit Form
description_raw: Ezalor temporarily turns his body luminescent, gaining cast range, increasing the speed bonus from Bright Speed, and allows Illuminate to be channeled by a separate spirit and heal allies.
lore: In a flash of light, Ezalor reveals his true nature.
shard: Increases illuminate heal.

name: Recall
description_raw:
After a short delay, teleports the targeted friendly hero to your location. If the targeted friendly hero takes player based damage during this time, the ability is interrupted. When cast, the teleport target's movement speed is increased. Upon teleporting, the increased movement speed buff are applied to both Keeper of the Light and the teleport target, and the latter also receives a Chakra Magic.

If alt-cast, teleports Keeper of the Light to the target Ally instead.

Ability Level increases with levels of Spirit Form.
lore: Walk towards the light.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_POINT | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_UNIT_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NO_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_DONT_RESUME_ATTACK | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_ALT_CASTABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_SHOW_IN_GUIDES

name: Blinding Light
description_raw: A blinding light flashes over the targeted area, knocking back units to the edge of the area and blinding them, causing them to miss some attacks. Minimum knockback distance is %knockback_distance% range over %knockback_duration% seconds.
lore: The Primordial light turns the tides of battle in favor of Ezalor and his allies.

name: Release Illuminate
description_raw: Release the channel early.

name: Special Reserve
description_raw: Keeper of the Light cannot go below %minimum_mana% mana.

name: Bright Speed
description_raw:
Keeper of the Light gains 1 movement speed for every %intelligence_per_speed% Intelligence.

Whenever Keeper of the Light moves %movement_per_vision% distance, he leaves behind light that allows him to see %vision_radius% range for %vision_duration% seconds.

name: Switch Discipline
description_raw:
Kez switches between his Kazurai Katana and Shodo Sai.

He gains different attack capabilities and abilities based on the weapon equipped. The abilities level up together, and when an ability is used, the associated alternate weapon ability also goes on cooldown.

Kez deals extra damage on the first Katana hit or ability after switching to Katana, and gains bonus speed after switching to Sai.
lore: As former followers of the Shodo, the leaders of the Kazurai Order can switch effortlessly between twin disciplines of martial mastery over sai and blade.
scepter:
Casting a weapon ability that would set its alternate weapon ability on cooldown does not do so if it's the first one used within %scepter_cooldown_timer% seconds after casting Switch Discipline or if it was already on cooldown.

Casting any weapon ability refreshes the cooldown of Switch Discipline.

name: Echo Slash
description_raw: Kez slashes forward in a %katana_distance% distance line with his Katana, attacking enemies in an area and applying a brief %tag_slow%%% impact slow. After a short delay, the area is attacked again. Heroes take bonus damage.
lore: Kez and his master Kraw have worked tirelessly to train the Kazurai new ways to keep the flyers off balance by improving upon ancient techniques.

name: Grappling Claw
description_raw: Kez swings on a grappling hook towards the target unit or tree.  When the grappling hook collides with the target, that unit has slowed movement speed. Upon reaching the enemy target, Kez lands an attack on them.
lore: The Kazurai have the speed and reach to drag even the highest flyers from the skies.

name: Kazurai Katana
description_raw:
Katana attacks and abilities apply a stacking damage over time to enemies that deals a percentage of the original attack's damage as additional damage over time.

Kez may activate the ability to impale the target with his attack, preventing them from moving or turning. The target's Katana debuff bursts, causing some of the stacks to deal damage instantly.
lore: To fight back against the reach of Imperia and her Queensguard, the Kazurai had to become skilled in the ways of attrition.
shard: Kez lifesteals %lifesteal_pct%%% from the impale. If the impale comes from behind the target, the target is stunned. Increases max burst stacks.

name: Raptor Dance
description_raw:
Kez enters into an uncontrollable state for %AbilityCastPoint% second, becoming invulnerable for %invuln_period%s and receiving a basic dispel.

If the cast completes successfully, Kez performs a series of deadly radial slashes around him that deal damage based on the max health of the target and heal Kez for a percentage of all damage dealt.
lore: Unleash the inner fury of the Flightless to feast on the essence of your foes.

name: Falcon Rush
description_raw: Kez gains the ability to rush towards enemy targets to deliver echoing secondary attacks.  While in this state, Kez has phased collision and slow resistance.
lore: An ancient Shodo technique used to hunt faster aerial foes, stealing the advantage and delivering multiple attacks within a single flap of their prey's panicking wings.

name: Talon Toss
description_raw: Kez throws a Sai at the target unit, applying a fixed damage attack and silence.
lore: The Shodo learned to rely upon distance and disorientation to survive against much stronger opposition.

name: Shodo Sai
description_raw:
Kez has a chance to critically strike the target when attacking with Sais.

Kez may activate the ability to disarm himself, lock his facing, and parry attacks and attack effects from the targeted direction for %parry_duration% seconds. If an attack is parried from an enemy Hero in this way, that Hero is stunned for %parry_stun_duration%s and gains a Mark. When a Marked target is attacked by Kez, it will guarantee a critical strike and stun the target.

The sub-ability may be used to cancel the blocking early.
lore: The Shodo may have lost their way, but Kez and the Kazurai can still use Shodo knowledge for the good of the people.
shard: Parrying creates a stronger Mark that deals additional stun and critical damage.

name: Cancel
description_raw: Stop blocking physical attacks.

name: Raven's Veil
description_raw: Kez releases a wave of smoke that applies his Mark to nearby enemies, briefly reducing their vision. Kez receives a basic dispel and gains bonus movement speed and invisibility until he attacks or casts a spell.
lore: Eying either threat or opportunity, Shodo masters slip instantly into shadow to reset the terms of any engagement in their own favor.

name: Tidal Wave
description_raw: Releases a Tidal Wave that spawns behind Kunkka. Deals damage and drags enemies along it. Enemies cannot attack while being dragged.
lore: A good sailor knows the timing of the tides like the back of his hand.

name: Torrent
description_raw: Summons a rising torrent that, after a short delay, hurls enemy units into the sky, stunning, dealing damage and slowing movement speed.
lore: An ancestral rush of water explodes from the center of the world, called upon by the Admiral.

name: Tidebringer
description_raw: Kunkka's legendary sword grants increased damage and cleaves a large area of effect in front of him for a single strike.
lore: A lost Claddish soul inhabits Kunkka's trusty Tidebringer, empowering it to destroy demons of the Cataract.

name: X Marks the Spot
description_raw: Targets a friendly or enemy Hero, marks their position with an X, and returns them to it after several seconds.  Kunkka can trigger the return at any time during the duration. Lasts twice as long on allied heroes.
lore: The Admiral's set of arcane abilities includes some that can be used for battle as well as entertainment.

name: Return
description_raw: Returns the marked hero to the X.

name: Ghostship
description_raw:
Summons a ghostly ship that sails through the battle before smashing apart, damaging and stunning all enemies caught near the wreckage.

Allied heroes touched by the Ghostship are given a %rum_factor%x strong swig of The Admiral's Rum.
lore: The final ship of the Claddish Navy is nothing but a phantom, but it is all too real to the enemies of the Admiral.
scepter: Ghostship creates a fleet of %fleet_count% ships at the target point on a %fleet_interval% second interval. Each ship now also fires %num_cannon_volleys% waves of cannonballs from the port and starboard side that deal %cannon_ball_damage_pct%%% of Ghostship's damage as they pass through enemies.

name: Admiral's Rum
description_raw: Damage from enemy heroes, buildings, or Roshan that would reduce Kunkka below %damage_threshold%%% threshold causes him to douse himself with The Admiral's Rum, receiving bonus movement speed and a delayed reaction to %ghostship_absorb%%% of incoming damage for %buff_duration%s.
lore: Deleterious to landlubbers, no one holds their rum like a sailor.

name: Amphibian Rhapsody
description_raw: Largo gets ready to groove. He is disarmed and his ability bar switches to 3 song abilities, each with different effects. Songs are only effective if strummed on the beat.\n\nEvery time he strums successfully, he gains a stack of Groovin'. Each stack gives him bonus armor and reduces the mana cost of every song, but he loses a stack if he misses a beat. Stacks linger for a short duration when Largo's song ends.
lore: The very first Bard Monk played a song that summoned a living island and saved the Murkroot exiles from a salt-worn death.
scepter: Largo can play two songs per beat by strumming both at the same time.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_TOGGLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NO_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_BACKSWING | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IMMEDIATE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_INVISIBLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_CHANNEL | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_SILENCE

name: Bullbelly Blitz
description_raw: Largo plays a song that deals %burst_damage% magical damage to nearby enemies. The song also increases nearby allied heroes' spell amplification and grants their attacks additional magic damage.
lore: 'Hey, when a beach brawl breaks out, you gotta learn to throw your musical weight around or the party's over proper quick.'
scepter: Deals additional %damage_per_stack% magic damage per Groovin' stack when this song is used in double-strumming.

name: Hotfeet Hustle
description_raw: Largo plays a song that increases nearby friendly units' movement speed and grants a brief slow resistance.
lore: 'It's like that old story about the scary swamp witch. You better watch just where you're jumping when you're trying to do it lickety-split.'

name: Island Elixir
description_raw: Largo plays a song that heals nearby friendly heroes.
lore: 'If this song can heal an ageless isaloth, it can handle a few cuts and bruises on the lot of you.'

name: Frogstomp
description_raw: Largo tosses froglings to an area. They stomp the ground every %stomp_interval% second, dealing damage and ministuns, and enemies in the area have reduced movement speed.
lore: Most Bard Monks spend decades mastering the musical arts, but even the top frog Largo has to admit that his young disciples have already grown shockingly good at counting a proper beat.

name: Croak of Genius
description_raw: Largo strums a tune to a friendly hero. The hero's items and abilities have reduced mana cost and a percentage of their damage reverberates over the following %damage_duration% seconds.\n\nWhen an affected hero spends mana, the remaining buff duration is reduced by %duration_reduction%s. Duration is not reduced for Largo himself.
lore: Largo loves to help his friends find glory through the power of music, never missing a chance at a killer duet.

name: Catchy Lick
description_raw:
Largo licks the targeted unit with his tongue, pulling it back a short distance, applying a basic dispel, and dealing damage if it's an enemy.

Killing or dispelling an effect from a target grants Largo temporary health regeneration.

DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
lore: After generations spent living on the ancient isaloth Velu'Mar, the descendants of the Murkroot exiles have grown resilient, happily sampling toxins that would've struck their ancestors dead.

name: Encore
description_raw: Buffs that Largo applies to himself or his team have extended duration.
shard:
Whenever Largo applies a Unit Target buff to a friendly hero, he also gets the buff.

If Largo targets himself, the buff is also applied to the nearest allied hero within the cast range of the targeted ability.

name: Overwhelming Odds
description_raw: Turns the foes' numbers against them, dealing a %movement_slow%%% impact slow for %slow_duration%s and damage to all enemies in the area. Damage increases with each enemy unit or hero in the area, and grants Legion Commander bonus attack speed.
lore: The archers of Stonehall are ready at Tresdin's command.
shard: Overwhelming Odds has larger radius and grants an all damage barrier based on the damage it deals to enemy heroes.

name: Press The Attack
description_raw: Removes debuffs and disables from the target friendly unit, and grants bonus movement speed and health regen for a short time.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel
lore: The rallying horn of the Bronze Legion is able to inspire any heart.
scepter: Increases movement speed and becomes an %radius% area of effect ability, and always affects Legion Commander when used.

name: Moment of Courage
description_raw: When attacked a number of times, Legion Commander will counter-attack her target with bonus lifesteal.
lore: Tresdin knows that an enemy's most vulnerable moment often follows their fiercest stroke.

name: Duel
description_raw: Legion Commander and the target enemy hero are forced to attack each other for a short duration. Neither hero can use items, and the target enemy hero cannot use abilities. If either hero dies during the duration, the hero winning the Duel gains permanent bonus damage.
lore: To face a soldier of Stonehall in single combat is a challenge few can resist.
scepter: When Legion Commander wins a duel, Press the Attack is automatically triggered around her.

name: Outfight Them!
description_raw: When Legion Commander or an allied Hero within %radius% range casts an ability, they gain bonus armor for %duration%s; allies gain %ally_factor%%% of the value.  This bonus stacks independently.

name: Split Earth
description_raw: Splits the earth under enemies. Deals damage and stuns for a short duration.
lore: Twisting nature to his vile will, the shifting earth consumes those unlucky enough to cross Leshrac's path.
shard: Causes Split Earth to repeat in the same location %shard_max_count% additional times, with a %shard_secondary_delay% second delay between each one. Each time the radius increases by %shard_radius_increase%. Split Earth echo location is visible to both teams.

name: Diabolic Edict
description_raw: Saturates the area around Leshrac with magical explosions that deal pure damage to enemy units and buildings.  The fewer units available to attack, the more damage those units will take.
lore: Chronoptic energy bursts from one plane to the other, evaporating anything it touches.

name: Lightning Storm
description_raw: Summons a lightning storm that blasts the target enemy unit, then strikes any nearby enemy units. Struck enemies have their move speed slowed.
lore: The Tormented Soul's mastery of the elements is evident in the massive storms that strike down armies before him.

name: Nihilism
description_raw: Causes Leshrac and all nearby enemies to turn ethereal, preventing them from attacking, slowing them, and making them take more magic damage. Increases Leshrac's speed rather than reducing it. Does not cause Leshrac to take amplified damage.
lore: When it serves his purpose, Leshrac briefly reduces his presence in the Terrene Plane.

name: Pulse Nova
description_raw: Creates waves of damaging energy around Leshrac, one per second, to damage nearby enemy units. Drains Leshrac's mana with each pulse.
lore: If necessary, the Tormented Soul can manipulate space time itself, ravaging lesser beings.

name: Chronoptic Nourishment
description_raw: Leshrac restores mana equal to %mana_pct_per_hit%%% of damage dealt by his attacks. Only grants mana when attacking enemies that have mana. %creep_penalty_reduction_pct%%% mana restoration penalty when attacking creeps.

name: Defilement
description_raw: Leshrac gains %aoe_per_int% Area of Effect Bonus per Intelligence.

name: Frost Blast
description_raw: Blasts the target enemy unit with damaging frost, dealing area damage and slowing movement and attack rates for %abilityduration% seconds.  The primary target receives both base and area damage.
lore: Frost-mage Ethreain has not forgotten even the simplest of ice manipulation.

name: Sacrifice
description_raw:
Sacrifice an allied creep to convert its current health into mana for Lich and give Lich its experience bounty.

Begins the game on cooldown and with no charges.

name: Sinister Gaze
description_raw: CHANNELED - Hypnotizes an enemy unit, causing it to move towards a point between the two of you and drains a percentage of its current mana.
lore: Mind the cold...
scepter: Sinister Gaze becomes an Area of Effect ability, affecting units within a radius of %aoe_scepter% in the target area. Sinister Gaze allows Lich to cast other abilities while channeling it.

name: Frost Shield
description_raw: Applies a magical frost shield around the target, reducing damage from attacks against it. While the shield is active, ice magic will affect nearby enemy units every %interval% seconds, dealing minor damage and slowing them.
lore: First conceived of to protect him in his mortal years, the frost magic that Ethreain weaves around himself has only grown colder with time.

name: Chain Frost
description_raw: Releases an orb of frost that bounces between nearby enemy units up to %jumps% times, slowing and damaging each time it hits. Each bounce increases the damage for the subsequent bounces. Chain Frost lingers on its last target if it fails to bounce and can bounce again if new targets become available.
lore: Almost universally considered the ultimate in frost magic, Ethreain's orb of frozen death strikes fear into those who dare stand against him.

name: Ice Spire
description_raw:
Creates an Ice Spire at the target spot, slowing enemies around it. Can take %max_hero_attacks% hero hits or %max_creep_attacks% creep hits and when destroyed it will create a Frost Blast around it.

Chain Frost can be cast on the Spire and can bounce to the Spire and damage the spire by 1 hero attack if there are no other enemies in range.

Lich can cast Frost Shield on the Spire. Each Frost Shield tick will heal the spire by 1 hero attack.
lore: The waters within the Black Pool remain liquid far below the point of freezing and immediately crystallize when removed.

name: Rage
description_raw: Launch into a maddened rage, becoming Debuff Immune, increasing magic resistance and gaining movement speed.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
lore: The madness and brutality of N'aix makes him a vicious and unrelenting foe in combat.

name: Unfettered
description_raw: Descend into a violent fury, gaining increased status and magic resistance. Applies a dispel and can be cast while disabled.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel

name: Feast
description_raw: Lifestealer's attacks deal damage and provide heal for a percentage of his target's max health. He gains permanent max HP whenever he kills a unit.
lore: After escaping from his cell in Devarque, N'aix subsisted on flesh and bones of those unfortunate to cross his path.

name: Open Wounds
description_raw: Lifestealer rends an enemy unit, slowing the victim's movement speed and allowing all allies to regain health for a percentage of the damage they deal to that unit. The victim recovers movement speed over the duration.
lore: Fresh wounds and the scent of blood often draw out the scavengers to finish the job.

name: Ghoul Frenzy
description_raw: Passively grants Lifestealer Attack Speed.
lore: Distant memories of the Vile Council fuel one mind to plotting and the other to more immediate dark ends.

name: Infest
description_raw: Lifestealer infests the body of a target unit, becoming undetectable, and healing for a portion of his max hitpoints every second while inside. He can then explode from the host body, dealing damage to nearby enemies. If the infested unit is an enemy creep or a neutral creep, he can take control of the unit's ability to move and attack, and the creep loses a portion of their max hitpoints over time. Does not work on enemy heroes.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
lore: With this infestation, N'aix consumes the life blood of the host, restoring him back to full unholy power.
scepter: Increases cast range and reduces cooldown to %bonus_AbilityCooldown%s.  Infest may target enemy heroes for a short duration, attacking them from the inside while increasing Lifestealer's regeneration rate.
shard: Consuming a creep with Infest drenches enemies in blood which deals damage over time based on the host's remaining health.

name: Consume
description_raw: Lifestealer eats the host body from the inside out, exploding from within.

name: Dragon Slave
description_raw: Lina channels the breath of a dragon, sending out a wave of fire that scorches every enemy in its path.
lore: In the scorched barren of Misrule, Lina learned to manipulate the fiery breath of the Desert Wyrm as a form of entertainment.

name: Light Strike Array
description_raw: Summons a column of flames that damages and stuns enemies.
lore: Lina's essence allows her to focus the sun's energies, causing air to combust at will.

name: Fiery Soul
description_raw: Grants bonus attack and movement speed each time Lina hits an enemy with a spell. Stacks with itself. Lasts %fiery_soul_stack_duration% seconds.
lore: Dancing flames embody Lina's playful nature, bringing out her true blazing self.

name: Flame Cloak
description_raw: Grants Lina unobstructed movement and increases her spell damage and magic resistance. Grants max fiery soul stacks on activation.
lore: A natural defense equally suited to keeping anything from unwanted sisters to snarling hellbeasts at bay.

name: Laguna Blade
description_raw: Fires off a bolt of lightning at a single enemy unit, dealing massive damage.
lore: The air around Lina becomes so intensely torrid that it scorches a foe that comes too close with white-hot lightning.
shard: Casting Laguna Blade temporarily supercharges Lina, granting her stacks of Fiery Soul.

name: Slow Burn
description_raw: Lina's abilities deal an additional %burn_damage_pct%%% damage as burn damage over %burn_duration%s.

name: Combustion
description_raw: Every %damage_threshold% damage Lina does to an enemy hero causes them to overheat, doing damage to their nearby allies. This effect can trigger multiple times off a single instance of damage. Overheated illusions do less damage.

name: {s:bonus_fiery_soul_magic_resist}% Fiery Soul Magic Resist Per Stack
+{s:bonus_burn_duration}s Slow Burn Duration
description_raw: Increases Slow Burn Damage to {s:bonus_additional_tick_total_damage_tooltip}%

name: +{s:bonus_target_crit_multiplier}% Crit On Targets Affected By Dragon Slave
description_raw: Only applies to Lina's attacks

name: {s:bonus_target_crit_multiplier}% Attack Crit On Targets Affected By Slow Burn
Earth Spike
description_raw: Rock spikes burst from the earth along a straight path. Enemy units are hurled into the air, then are stunned and take damage when they fall.
lore: The Demon Witch exercises his demonic covenant, opening a fissure from hell.

name: Hex
description_raw: Transforms an enemy unit into a harmless beast, with all special abilities disabled.
lore: Lion is compelled to share his transfiguration, twisting the essence of those who oppose him.

name: Mana Drain
description_raw:
CHANNELED - Channels magical energy, taking mana and slowing enemies over time. If the enemy has no mana remaining, the slow is increased by %movespeed_bonus_when_empty_pct%%%.

Can target allies to give them mana and movement speed at a %ally_pct%%% rate.
lore: Lesser magi are nothing more than a source of magical restoration for the Demon Witch.
shard: Causes Mana Drain to affect up to %shard_bonus_targets% additional enemies and increases break distance. Lion becomes Debuff Immune with %magic_resist%%% magic resistance while channeling.

name: Finger of Death
description_raw:
