Rips at an enemy unit, trying to turn it inside-out, dealing massive damage to the target.

After using Finger of Death, Lion's hand becomes empowered, allowing him to use a cleaving melee attack with %punch_attack_range% range with bonus movement speed.

Finger of Death gains permanent bonus damage for it and the fist for each enemy Hero it or the fist kills.

The melee attack may be disabled by setting the ability to Alt Cast.
lore: Lion's disfigured hand is also the source of his greatest power, capable of flooding victims with malefic force.
scepter: Finger of Death gains area of effect damage on the initial cast, and increases duration and cleave damage on its subsequent melee attacks.

name: To Hell and Back
description_raw:
Lion gains %debuff_amp%%% debuff duration after killing or assisting in a Hero kill while that Hero is dead.

Lion gains %spell_amp%%% spell amplification for %duration%s after respawning or resurrecting or until he gets a kill or assist.

name: Gift Bearer
description_raw: Lone Druid's Spirit Bear receives a copy of his Neutral Item that has an independent cooldown.

name: Bear Necessities
description_raw: Lone Druid can only use the first %item_slots% items in his inventory. These items' passive bonuses are more powerful. Other item slots do not provide any bonuses. Neutral slot is unaffected.

name: Summon Spirit Bear
description_raw:
Summons a powerful Spirit Bear companion that can equip items.

If the bear moves %bear_attack_leash_range% distance away from the Lone Druid, it cannot attack. Lone Druid suffers %backlash_damage%%% of his max health as backlash damage if the Spirit Bear dies.\nSpirit Bear has Demolish, Return, Entangling Claws, Savage Roar, and Spirit Link abilities.
lore: Sylla's lifelong companion is symbiotic with his spirit and heart, coming to aid him in any time of need.

name: Spirit Link
description_raw: Links Lone Druid and the Spirit Bear, increasing their movement speed as well as sharing a percentage of their lifesteal with each other.
lore: Sylla is emboldened by the presence of his companion, his vitality replenished with each swipe of the Spirit Bear's claws.
scepter:
Lone Druid severs his link to his Spirit Bear, and connects to the target allied hero, sharing the Spirit Link bonuses with them for %duration%s. Armor sharing and attack speed are increased by %active_bonus%%%. Damage done by the ally heals Lone Druid, as well as the other way around.

The Spirit Bear is feared for the duration of the transformation, unless he has his own Aghanim's Scepter.

name: Spirit Link
description_raw: Links Lone Druid and the Spirit Bear, increasing their movement speed as well as sharing a percentage of their lifesteal with each other.
lore: Sylla is emboldened by the presence of his companion, his vitality replenished with each swipe of the Spirit Bear's claws.

name: Savage Roar
description_raw: Lone Druid and the Spirit Bear roar fiercely causing nearby enemies to flee towards their base in terror. Their movement speed is increased by %bonus_speed%%%.
lore: Sylla studies and masters the arts of the lost Bear Clan, enhancing his attunement with the wild.
shard:
Applies a basic dispel and grants allies in an area around the caster bonus movement and attack speed. Replicates between Lone Druid and Spirit Bear regardless of castability on the other.

DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel

name: Savage Roar
description_raw: Lone Druid and the Spirit Bear roar fiercely causing nearby enemies to flee towards their base in terror. Their movement speed is increased by %bonus_speed%%%.

name: True Form
description_raw: Lone Druid morphs himself into a raging bear, losing his ranged advantage, but gaining bonus armor, bonus health, and bonus attack damage.
lore: The mighty bear is the king of the forest, possessing the throne through raw power.

name: Return
description_raw: Channels for %channel_tooltip% seconds and then teleports the Spirit Bear back to the Lone Druid.
scepter: Allows Spirit Bear to attack at any range from Lone Druid, and to survive if Lone Druid dies.

name: Entangling Claws
description_raw:
Allows Spirit Bear to Entangle enemy heroes once they gain %hits_required% stacks. Entangled enemies are rooted and take damage over time.

Spirit Bear's attacks are permanently empowered, making them apply %spirit_bear_counters_applied_tooltip% stack with each attack on enemy heroes. Enemies cannot gain stacks while Entangled.

name: Entangle
description_raw:
Allows Lone Druid to Entangle enemies once they gain %hits_required% stacks. Entangled enemies are rooted and take damage over time.

When cast, applies %hits_incremented_on_active% stacks to each enemy hero in the area and %hits_required% stacks to enemy creeps. Also empowers Lone Druid for %lone_druid_buff_duration%s, making him apply %lone_druid_counters_applied_tooltip% stack with each attack on enemy heroes. Enemies cannot gain stacks while Entangled.

Leveling this ability also levels Spirit Bear's Entangling Claws ability.
scepter: Entangle applies %hits_required% stacks to enemy heroes in the area and has increased radius. Enemies no longer have protection from gaining stacks while Entangled.

name: Fetch
description_raw: Grabs the Target Ally, Enemy or Rune, and uncontrollably drags them towards Lone Druid for the duration. Enemies receive damage every %tick_rate%s. When dragging a unit, they are Rooted.

name: Demolish
description_raw: Spirit Bear deals more damage to buildings.

name: Return has No Cooldown and -{s:bonus_AbilityChannelTime}s Channel Time
Lucent Beam
description_raw: Calls a beam of lunar energy down upon an enemy, damaging and briefly stunning them.
lore: Selemene smites those who encroach upon the Nightsilver Woods.
shard: Grants Luna an attack damage bonus buff every time an enemy hero is hit by Lucent Beam. Lucent Beams created by Eclipse grant %damage_buff_from_eclipse_pct%%% of the damage amount.

name: Lunar Orbit
description_raw: Creates %rotating_glaives% glaives that rotate %rotating_glaives_movement_radius% radius around Luna. Any enemy unit that collides with a glaive will take a percentage of Luna's Attack Damage.
lore: None may approach Selemene's chosen without favor from the goddess herself.
shard: Increases damage reduction. While active, Luna gains %bonus_movement_speed%%% bonus movement speed.

name: Moon Glaives
description_raw: Empowers Luna's glaives, causing her attacks to bounce between enemy units. Deals less damage with each bounce.
lore: Carefully sharpened, Luna's boomerang-like weapon cuts a wide swath through enemy numbers.

name: Lunar Blessing
description_raw: Grants attack damage to Luna and nearby allied heroes within %radius% range, with Luna receiving double the attack damage bonuses. At night, Lunar Blessing is global, and Luna is blessed with bonus night vision.
lore: The Goddess of the Moon smiles upon her kin.

name: Eclipse
description_raw: Showers random nearby enemies with strikes from Luna's current level of Lucent Beam. These beams do not stun their targets, and there is a maximum number of times that a single target can be struck. Also turns day into night for a short time.
lore: In times of great need, Selemene herself descends into the world, blocking out the light and hope of the opposed.
scepter: Allows Luna to cast Eclipse on an allied unit or herself and have its effects follow them, or cast it on an area. Increases total beams, reduces duration, removes the limit on beams per unit, and makes the beams appear twice as fast.

name: Summon Wolves
description_raw: Summons %wolf_count% wolves to aid Lycan in battle. At level 3, wolves gain Permanent Invisibility, and at level 4 wolves gain Cripple that gives 20% chance to cripple the target, causing 8 damage per second and lose 60 attack speed for 4 seconds.
lore: The very enchantment that twisted his being also summons canine familiars.
shard: Increases the number of wolves summoned. Grants all summoned wolves the ability Hightail, an active ability that gives them phased movement, evasion, movespeed, and attack speed.

name: Wolf Bite
description_raw: Lycan bites an allied hero or creep-hero, granting them Shapeshift properties. Lycan and the bitten target gain %lifesteal_percent%%% Lifesteal and share the healing effect of Lifesteal with each other as long as they are within %lifesteal_range% range of each other.
lore: Does this bite look infected?

name: Howl
description_raw: Strikes fear into enemies, reducing armor and attack damage of all enemies within %radius% range of Lycan and his wolves. At night, Howl's armor and attack damage reductions are global.
lore: Blood-curdling wolf cries signal to opponents that Banehallow is among them.

name: Feral Impulse
description_raw: Increases the HP regeneration and damage of Lycan and all units under his control.
lore: His animalistic symbiosis with canine kind gives Banehallow enhanced reflexes and hunting capabilities.

name: Shapeshift
description_raw: Lycan assumes his lupine form, granting him critical strikes and added vision at night. During Shapeshift, Lycan moves at increased speed and cannot be slowed.  Movement and critical strike bonuses are also applied to all units under Lycan's control.
lore: Forever a slave to his lycanthropy, Banehallow has come to accept his curse, and embrace his own savagery.

name: Cripple
description_raw: Gives %maim_chance%%% to cripple the target, causing %maim_damage% damage per second and lose %maim_attack_speed% Attack Speed for %maim_duration% seconds.

name: Invisibility
description_raw: Permanently invisible when not attacking.

name: Hamstring
description_raw: The wolf bites down on an enemy's hamstring, rooting them for a short duration. After the bite, the next %damage_boost_stacks% attacks from units controlled by Lycan deal bonus damage.

name: Hightail
description_raw: The wolf gains a short burst of energy, gaining phased movement, evasion, hasted movement speed, and attack speed.

name: Apex Predator
description_raw: Lycan and units he controls deal extra damage to neutral creeps.

name: Horn Toss
description_raw: Magnus tosses any enemies in front of him, launching them to his rear. Enemies take damage, spend %air_duration% seconds in the air, and are stunned while in the air and an additional amount of time after landing.
lore: Survivors of Joerlak will never forget the sight of Magnus tossing countless enemies into rivers of fire and clouds of ash.

name: Shockwave
description_raw: Magnus sends out a wave of force, damaging enemy units in a line, pulling them towards him, and slowing them for a brief period.
lore: Mt. Joerlak was a somewhat unstable mass, and Magnus has learned to channel its reverberations.

name: Empower
description_raw: When cast on an ally, grants them bonus damage and cleave on attack. \n\n Empower is always on Magnus with %self_multiplier%%% larger bonus.
lore: With a deep bellow, Magnus displays his true power.

name: Skewer
description_raw: Magnus rushes forward, goring enemy units on his massive tusk. Heroes hit on the way will be dragged to the destination, then damaged and affected by slowed movement speed. The damage is increased based on distance traveled.
lore: Magnoceros horns are valuable in direct proportion to their danger to prospective merchants.
shard: Increases range and deals additional damage when skewering enemies into trees or cliffs.

name: Reverse Polarity
description_raw: Magnus changes properties of matter, pulling all nearby enemies in front of him and stunning them with a damaging slam.
lore: Magnus fights with the fury of the erupting Mt. Joerlak.

name: Solid Core
description_raw: Magnus has increased slow resistance and suffers less knockback from enemy's abilities and items.

name: Dispose
description_raw: Marci grabs an allied or enemy target and throws it effortlessly behind her, damaging and slowing the unit if it's an enemy. Any enemy units in the landing area will also be damaged and slowed.
lore: Marci excels at removing obstacles from Princess Mirana's path.

name: Unleash
description_raw: Marci taps a hidden power, gaining Fury charges that allow her to deliver a rapid sequence of strikes that slow movement and attack speed of the target for %pulse_debuff_duration%s. The last strike in every Fury combo creates a damaging pulse around the target. In between Fury combos, Marci is unable to attack for %time_between_flurries%s.\n\nMarci gains %bonus_movespeed%%% movement speed when Unleash is cast.
lore: Though some have sought to understand its origins, Marci rebuffs all attempts to divine the source of her power.
scepter:
Reduces Unleash cooldown by %scepter_cooldown_reduction% seconds and causes Unleash to apply a basic dispel on Marci. While Unleash is Active, all of Marci's abilities unleash pulses when cast. All of Marci's unleash pulses will silence units for %pulse_silence_duration% seconds.

DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel

name: Rebound
description_raw:
Marci bounds to the targeted allied unit, choosing a direction and distance she will spring away from it. Upon reaching the unit, Marci lunges to her final destination, damaging and stunning enemies where she lands.

When Rebound is set to alt-cast, Marci brings the target ally with her to her final destination.

 The ally receives %ally_movespeed_pct%%% bonus movement speed for %ally_buff_duration%s.
lore: With a friendly or brazen boost, Marci can find her way into the midst of any fight.
shard: Increases damage. Rebound can be cast on enemies, and causes Marci to also get the speed boost when she casts it.

name: Bodyguard
description_raw: Passively grants Marci lifesteal and bonus attack damage.\n\nWhen cast on an ally, she provides them with %max_partner_penalty%%% of her passive lifesteal and attack damage bonus. Additionally Marci creates a shared all damage barrier for herself and her partner. As Marci attacks heroes, %shared_barrier_replenish_amount%%% of the damage dealt restores the barrier.
lore: Marci learned at a young age that the best asset in a scrap is a steady companion.

name: Special Delivery
description_raw:
Marci whistles to instantly summon her courier to her. If the courier started in the fountain, it will take items from Marci's stash. After teleporting it will transfer these items to Marci and head back to the fountain.

Passively grants all allied couriers %bonus_levels% bonus levels and %bonus_hp_tooltip% bonus health.
lore: Professional courtesy, from one courier to another.

name: Unleash Duration Extended By {s:bonus_extend_duration}s On Kill
Spear of Mars
description_raw: Mars throws his legendary Spear with deadly precision, damaging each enemy unit it strikes. The first enemy hero it hits is skewered on the spear, pushing it back. If a skewered hero hits a tree, building, or cliff, they will be impaled to it and stunned.
lore: The legendary Spear of Mars still glows with the heat of the forge god's fires.
shard: Spear of Mars impales up to %max_impale_targets% heroes and leaves a fire trail behind that deals damage over time and slows movement speed.

name: God's Rebuke
description_raw: Mars smashes enemies in front of him with his shield, knocking them back and damaging them with a critical hit based on his attack. Bonus damage is added when hitting heroes. Has True Strike.
lore: There isn't a warrior alive who can stand unmoved by the sting of Mars' rebuke.

name: Dauntless
description_raw: Mars gets more HP Regen the more he is outnumbered by enemy heroes in %radius% radius.

name: Immovable
description_raw: Mars cannot be affected by forced movement.

name: Bulwark
description_raw:
Mars wields his massive shield to block a portion of each physical attack when hit from the front or sides.

Can be toggled, granting phased movement, removing Mars's ability to attack, and locking the direction he is facing. When active, reduces movement speed and re-directs %redirect_chance%%% of the attack projectiles aimed at allies towards himself.
lore: Only the very foolish dare to fight fair with the god of war.
scepter: Creates %soldier_count% invulnerable soldiers on both sides of Mars front while Bulwark is toggled on. Soldiers move alongside Mars, dealing his attacks that have bonus damage, knock back and slow approaching enemies. An enemy can only be attacked by one soldier at a time.

name: Arena Of Blood
description_raw: After a short formation time, Mars summons an arena lined with the undead warriors of the Ash Legion, who block enemy attacks and movement. Enemy heroes near the inside edge of the arena will be attacked by spears, dealing damage and knocking them back.
lore: The long-dead members of the Ash Legion, assembled from the finest warriors to ever test the might of Mars, still revel in the thrill of combat, gladly beholden to the hand that fell them for as long as he so commands.
scepter: Lowers cooldown by %bonus_AbilityCooldown%s and increases duration. If an enemy is killed in the Arena, Mars and all of his allies inside the Arena restore %arena_kill_buff_heal_pct%%  of their max health and mana and get a %arena_kill_buff_damage_pct%%  attack damage buff for %arena_kill_buff_duration%s. This effect stacks.

name: Cold Blooded
description_raw: When Medusa is targeted with a spell, a single-target Mystic Snake is sent back towards the enemy that turns them into stone for %stone_form_scepter_base_tooltip%s.
lore: Point your gaze at her if you dare.

name: Split Shot
description_raw:
Medusa magically splits her shot into several arrows. These arrows deal a lower percent of her normal damage.

The extra targets will not receive other attack effects (such as critical strike).
lore: All who encounter the cursed Gorgon will feel her rage.
scepter: Allows on-hit effects to apply to the secondary attacks from Split Shot. Increases arrow count.

name: Mystic Snake
description_raw: A mystic snake made of energy jumps from target to target dealing damage. Damage and speed increases with each jump. After it reaches its last target, it returns to Medusa to replenish her with mana. The snake returns a percentage of the targets' total mana.
lore: The Gorgon's curse is her greatest strength.

name: Mana Shield
description_raw: Creates a shield that absorbs %absorption_pct%%% of incoming damage in exchange for Medusa's mana. Illusions absorb %illusion_percentage%%% less damage per point of mana.
lore: While Medusa was not gifted with eternal life upon birth, her curse bestowed her with impressive defensive powers.

name: Stone Gaze
description_raw: Any enemy units looking at Medusa will have their movement and attack speed slowed.  If %face_duration% seconds of total time is accumulated looking at Medusa while Stone Gaze is active, that unit will turn to stone.  Petrified units are stunned, and take bonus physical attack damage.
lore: The beauty of Medusa is legendary.

name: Gorgon's Grasp
description_raw: Medusa fires arrows in a line that land in %volley_count% groups, with each grouping larger than the previous. Enemies struck by a volley of arrows take an initial burst of damage and then are rooted, cannot turn, are revealed to the enemy, and take damage per second.
lore: The best predators don't even need to pounce.

name: Undulation
description_raw: Medusa's movement speed is fixed at %fixed_movespeed% (%stone_gaze_ms_tooltip_only% during Stone Gaze). Medusa is unslowable and does not benefit from movement speed increases.

name: Earthbind
description_raw: Tosses a net at the target point, rooting down all enemy units in an area around it.
lore: Catching dinner in the Riftshadow Ruins can be quite the task.

name: Poof
description_raw:
Drawing mystical energies from the earth, a Meepo can teleport to another Meepo or itself after channeling for %cast_duration% seconds, damaging the enemy in both the departure and arrival locations.

If the ability is in alt-cast state, all Meepos will also cast Poof to the target. When cast on the ground, all Meepos except the selected one will Poof to the closest location.
lore: Sometimes breaking one of the Riftshadow Crystals can be just the trick for getting yourself out of a bind.  Or your other self.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_POINT | | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_UNIT_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NORMAL_WHEN_STOLEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_BACKSWING | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_ROOT_DISABLES | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_ALT_CASTABLE

name: Ransack
description_raw:
Steals health from the enemy with each strike and heals all other Meepos for that amount.

Reduced to 60% against creeps.
lore: So you gonna need that, or...?

name: Divided We Stand
description_raw:
Meepo summons another Meepo, which levels up and shares items and experience with the main Meepo. Ability cooldowns are independent, but items share cooldowns between Meepos, except Teleport Scrolls.

Damage, attack speed, health, mana, regeneration, mana burn, and proc chance bonuses from items are distributed equally among the amount of Meepos, making them %dps_penalty_pct%%% less effective.

If any Meepo dies, they all die.
lore: Do I know you?

name: MegaMeepo
description_raw: Primary Meepo mounts all other Meepos in a %radius% radius around him on top of his shoulders. While in this form, he gains %stats_pct%%% of the other Meepo stats and can Fling them at enemies, dealing damage and slowing them.\n\n When cast, Earthbind generates additional nets and Poof deals %poof_damage_factor%%% more damage for each Meepo on top.
lore: Hi, Meepos!

name: MegaMeepo Fling
description_raw: In MegaMeepo form, Meepo flings the topmost meepo towards a target within a %AbilityCastRange% range, dealing damage and slowing their movement speed.
lore: You go first!

name: Dig
description_raw:
Digs into the ground for a short duration, dispelling Meepo and causing him to become invulnerable and untargetable for %duration%s. Restores %hp_restore%%% of his max health over that duration.

DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
lore: I'm diggin' here!

name: Pack Rat
description_raw: All Meepos can use the item in the neutral item slot.

name: Sticky Fingers
description_raw: Has an extra choice of neutral item to select from.

name: Fling
description_raw:
Pick up the target friendly Meepo or creep, disarming yourself and disabling them. Use the sub-ability to throw the carried unit at the target, dealing damage and slowing on impact.

If the carried target is a Meepo, it shares damage with the carrier. The carried target will be dropped after %hold_duration% seconds.
lore: You go first!

name: Geomancy
description_raw:
Meepo grants stacking bonuses to himself and his clones based on their terrain. Each Meepo grants his bonus to the other Meepos.

If there is a tree within %tree_radius% range, he receives %tree_regen% HP regen.

If he is standing on dirt, he receives %dirt_move_speed%%% bonus movement speed.

If he is in the water, his attacks slow the target by %water_move_slow%%% for %water_slow_duration% seconds.

name: Sacred Arrow
description_raw: Fires a long-range arrow with deadly precision, which stuns and damages the first enemy unit it strikes. The stun duration ranges from %arrow_min_stun% to %arrow_max_stun% seconds, with bonus damage up to %arrow_bonus_damage% added, based on the distance the arrow travels to its target. Instantly kills the first non-ancient creep it hits.
lore: Lunar energies make the Princess of the Moon's arrows more deadly than most.
scepter: Causes Sacred Arrow to release a Starstorm on enemies along the travel path of the primary arrow, releasing a second Starstorm that deals less damage to the impacted unit.

name: Moonlight Shadow
description_raw: Turns Mirana and all allied heroes invisible and grants bonus movement speed. Mirana gains bonus outgoing damage during the duration. If a hero is revealed, invisibility will restore after the fade delay as long as Moonlight Shadow's duration has not expired.
lore: Her tenure with Selemene allows Mirana to eclipse the ground, wrapping her allies in a cloak of shadows.

name: Solar Flare
description_raw:
Gradually increases attack speed and damage of Mirana and all allied heroes, reaching maximum power after %max_damage_time%s.

Allies receive %ally_pct%%% of the bonus.

name: Leap
description_raw: Mirana leaps forward into battle, empowering herself with a ferocious roar that grants bonus attack and movement speed. Speed bonus lasts %leap_bonus_duration% seconds.
lore: None can fail to recognize Mirana's iconic white beast in the heat of battle.
shard: Grants +%additional_charges% Leap charge.

name: Starstorm
description_raw: Calls down a wave of meteors to damage nearby enemy units. The closest enemy unit to Mirana in a %starfall_secondary_radius% radius will be struck a second time.
lore: The Goddess breaks the strata to empower her Princess in the time of need.

name: Selemene's Faithful
description_raw: Healing Lotuses are %bonus_lotus%%% more effective on Mirana and her allies.

name: Celestial Quiver
description_raw: When a charge is available, Mirana's next attack will deal bonus magic damage.
shard: Grants %quiver_restore% temporary Charges while Leap's buff is active.

name: +{s:bonus_extra_arrows} Multishot Sacred Arrows
description_raw: The extra arrows are launched in a cone shape, {s:bonus_extra_arrows_angle} degrees to the left and right of the original arrow, and cannot hit the same target.

name: Moonlight Shadow gives +{s:bonus_evasion}% Evasion
description_raw: Evasion works at all times during the buff

name: Boundless Strike
description_raw: Monkey King enlarges his staff and slams it against the ground, stunning enemies in a line and damaging them with bonus damage and a critical hit based on his attack. Has True Strike.
lore: The legendary Jingu Bang grows to match its master's will, ensuring no enemy can escape the Monkey King's reach.
shard: Boundless Strike applies Primal Spring with %spring_channel_pct%%% of the max channeling duration power to enemies along the staff and at the end of the staff. When Boundless Strike is set to alt-cast, Monkey King leaps to the end of his staff.

name: Mischief
description_raw: Changes Monkey King's shape to deceive opponents, using the environment nearby as inspiration for the disguise. Taking damage, attacking, or using any item or ability breaks Monkey King's disguise. Grants damage immunity for %invul_duration% seconds upon transforming.
lore: Watch out for that tree.

name: Revert Form
description_raw: Reverts Monkey King's shape to his original form.

name: Tree Dance
description_raw: Monkey King jumps to a tree and perches atop it. While perched, he gains the Primal Spring ability-a channeled leap attack. If Monkey King's tree is destroyed, he falls and is stunned for %unperched_stunned_duration%s. Taking damage while on the ground puts Tree Dance on cooldown.
lore: Sun Wukong dances nimbly along the treetop canopy, always just out of arm's reach.

name: Primal Spring
description_raw: CHANNELED - Monkey King springs out from his tree perch, damaging and slowing enemies in the area where he lands. Damage and slow amounts are in proportion to channel duration.
lore: Leaping from the safety of cover into the midst of his enemies, Sun Wukong attacks without mercy.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_POINT | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_AOE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_CHANNELLED | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_ROOT_DISABLES | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_OVERSHOOT

name: Wukong's Command
description_raw:
Monkey King creates a circular formation of soldiers that spread out from his position. If Monkey King leaves the area his soldiers disperse. The soldiers have Monkey King's attack that attacks at a fixed rate of %attack_speed%s, and only targets enemy Heroes. Monkey King is granted bonus armor for the spell's duration.

Monkey King can transform into any one of his soldiers during Wukong's command, taking its place for a short duration, becoming indistinguishable from other soldiers, and leaving another soldier in his stead.
lore: Monkey King rips out a tuft of fur to blow at his enemies, charging each strand to transform into a copy of himself.
scepter: Spawns a monkey soldier near Monkey King at regular intervals. Soldiers do not spawn while invisible or on trees. Soldiers only attack buildings when Monkey King himself is nearby. Soldiers can now gain Jingu Mastery charges independently.

name: Jingu Mastery
description_raw: Monkey King's attacks awaken the Jingu Bang's power. Upon the fourth hit on the same enemy hero, Monkey King earns %charges% charged attacks that have bonus damage and lifesteal.
lore: Always sensitive to the moods of its master, the Jingu Bang radiates power when Sun Wukong's combat fervor is on full display.

name: Changing of the Guard
description_raw: Monkey King can transform into any one of his soldiers during Wukong's command, taking its place for a %transfiguration_duration%s, becoming indistinguishable from other soldiers, and leaving another soldier in his stead. While transformed, Monkey King is invulnerable, but cannot attack or cast spells

name: Waveform
description_raw: Morphling dissolves into liquid and surges forward, damaging enemy units in his path. Morphling is invulnerable during Waveform.
lore: A torrential flood takes enemies by force.

name: Adaptive Strike
description_raw: Launches a surge of water toward an enemy unit, stunning them, knocking them back, and dealing base damage plus additional damage based on Morphling's agility times a multiplier.  If Morphling's agility is 50% higher than strength, the maximum agility multiplier is used.\n\nKnockback distance and stun duration are based on Morphling's strength. If his strength is 50% higher than his agility, the maximum knockback distance and stun duration is used.
lore: The Morphling calls upon his elements to crush his opponents with waves.

name: Attribute Shift (Agility Gain)
description_raw: Morphling shifts its form, pulling points from Strength and pouring them into Agility at a rate of %morph_rate%. The process is reversible.
lore: Shifting water makes it difficult to discern the nature of Morphling.
shard: Morphling can shift attributes while stunned. Reduces mana cost.

name: Attribute Shift (Strength Gain)
description_raw: Morphling shifts its form, pulling points from Agility and pouring them into Strength at a rate of %morph_rate%. The process is reversible.
lore: Shifting water makes it difficult to discern the nature of Morphling.
shard: Morphling can shift attributes while stunned. Reduces mana cost.

name: Syntropy
description_raw:
Morphling's attacks have increased attack range, slowing the target's movement and attack speed.

 If Morphling's agility is 50% higher than strength, the maximum Attack Speed slow is applied. 

If Morphling's Strength is 50% higher than his agility, the maximum Movement Speed slow is applied.

name: Ebb
description_raw: Morphling's Primary Attribute is now <font color='#9acd32'>Agility</font>.

name: Flow
description_raw: Morphling's Primary Attribute is now <font color='#ff0000'>Strength</font>. Adaptive Strike stuns based on Morphling's strength. Morphling gains %one_percent_tooltip%%% Spell Amp per %agi_per_one_spell_amp% Agility.

name: Morph
description_raw: Morphling changes his form to match the targeted enemy, gaining their basic abilities and changing his primary attribute based on his target. Can be toggled for the duration of the ability.
lore: Staring into Morphling produces a reflection that mimics the beholder.
scepter: Adds an alt-cast to Morph. When enabled, a strong illusion is created of the target hero that can cast all of the hero's basic abilities. If the illusion is alive when Morphling toggles the ability, he will take the place of the illusion, destroying it.

name: Morph Replicate
description_raw: Toggles Morphling's form between his own and the replicated enemy.

name: Accumulation
description_raw: Morphling receives %percent_to_increment%%% of stat growth bonuses every half level instead of the full bonus at level up. All Attributes bonuses from skill points in the Talent Tree provide an additional +%bonus_primary_stat_per_level_of_attributes% to Morphling's primary attribute.

name: Ebb and Flow
description_raw: Morphling receives bonus cast range and slow resistance based on his current Strength, and attack range and movement speed based on his current Agility. These bonuses persist if he is morphed into another hero.

name: Dead Shot
description_raw:
Muerta fires a ghostly trickshot at an enemy unit or tree. When the bullet strikes, it damages and briefly slows, then ricochets in the targeted direction.

The ricochet damages all units that it passes through, stopping when it hits a hero. Heroes hit by the ricochet are feared away from the impact.
lore: A steady gunhand and an eternity of practice produce trickshots that defy the mortal mind.
scepter: Dead Shot damage is increased. Dead Shot expands after it ricochets and pierces through enemy heroes as it fears them.

name: The Calling
description_raw: Summons a group of %num_revenants% revenants that slowly circle the targeted location. Enemies within the area are slowed. Revenants deal damage and silence enemies as they pass through them.
lore: Muerta's family are forever beyond the spirit veil, but her deal with Death allows her to briefly call on them in times of want or need.

name: Gunslinger
description_raw: Toggleable. When toggled on, Muerta's attacks have a chance to fire a second shot at another target.
lore: Muerta offers all of her victims Mercy. Some are fortunate enough to also earn Grace.

name: Pierce the Veil
description_raw:
Muerta transforms, becoming ethereal, gaining bonus base damage and phased movement.

Passively allows Muerta to always attack ethereal targets and attack when she is ethereal. When either she or her target is ethereal, all of her attack damage is dealt as magical damage and her physical lifesteal is treated as spell lifesteal.

DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
lore: Muerta sheds her corporeal form, crossing the spirit veil and striking her enemies with the fury of the damned.
shard:
Muerta gains %spell_lifesteal%%% Spell Lifesteal during Pierce the Veil.
While Pierce the Veil is active Muerta permanently gains %spell_amp_steal%%% spell amplification each time she kills an enemy Hero or they die in her vicinity. Bonus applies retroactively.

name: Ofrenda
description_raw:
Muerta places a sacred altar at the targeted location that increases her attack speed when she is near it.

When respawning, Muerta will gain the benefits of Pierce The Veil's corporeal form for %pierce_the_veil_duration_pct%%% of the duration and respawn at the Ofrenda.

Muerta can select the Ofrenda and force it to destroy itself. Only one Ofrenda can exist at a time.

name: Supernatural
description_raw: Whenever an enemy hero dies within %stack_collection_range% units of Muerta, she gains a stack of %spell_amp_per_stack%%% spell amplification. When Muerta dies she loses half the stacks, rounded down.

name: Spectral Slug
description_raw: Muerta shoots a spectral bullet at an enemy, dealing damage, knocking them back, and turning them ethereal for %duration%s - rendering them immune to physical damage and unable to attack. The target is slowed and %bonus_spell_damage_pct%%% more vulnerable to magic damage. Enemies will not be knocked out of Muerta's attack range.

name: Destroy Ofrenda
description_raw: Destroy this Ofrenda, ensuring that Muerta will respawn in the fountain.

name: Mirror Image
description_raw: Creates multiple images of Naga Siren under her control.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
lore: Slithice, while being strong in her own right, is notoriously hard to track down.

name: Ensnare
description_raw: Interrupts the target and traps them in place, preventing movement or blinking. Can target units affected by Song of the Siren.
lore: The only way to escape the onslaught of a Slithereen is to never oppose one in the first place.
scepter: Increases cast range and projectile speed.  Allows Ensnare to target and affect Debuff Immune units. Ensnare applies Break.

name: Rip Tide
description_raw: Naga Siren and her illusions deal bonus damage to enemies and reduce their armor for %duration% seconds every %hits% attacks.
lore: A torrent from the Deep Ones crushes the defenses of the Siren's enemies.

name: Deluge
description_raw: Naga Siren and all of her images hit nearby units with a damaging wave of water that caps their max movement speed.
lore: There's no use trying to run through deep water.

name: Eelskin
description_raw: Naga Siren has bonus evasion, increased per every other Naga Siren within %radius% radius.

name: Song of the Siren
description_raw: All enemies in range of the Naga Siren are put into a magical stasis where they cannot act or be attacked. Using Song of the Siren again will end the duration early.
lore: Slithice's powerful voice enchants leagues of opponents, while calling her Slithereen kin in a time of need.
shard: Allies in range of Song of the Siren recover a percentage of their health and mana per second.

name: Song of the Siren End
description_raw: Release enemy units from your song so they can be targeted again.

name: Reel In
description_raw: CHANNELED - Naga Siren channels for up to %AbilityChannelTime% seconds, pulling all units affected by Naga's Ensnare in a %radius% range towards her at a speed of %pull_strength%. Channeling ends when the Ensnared unit is %min_pull_distance% distance away.
lore: Even the youngest Slithereen are well schooled in trawling for prey with nothing but their wits and nets.
scepter: Allows Reel In to affect Spell Immune units.

name: Slithereen Cutlass
description_raw: Naga Siren's attacks add a stacking debuff that causes the target to miss attacks for %debuff_duration% seconds, up to a max of %max_stacks% stacks.

name: Death Seeker
description_raw: Necrophos turns into a large Death Pulse towards the target unit's position. Once it arrives to the location, the Death Pulse spreads towards nearby enemies and allies.
lore: The Rumusque Faithful consider Necrophos to be more plague than person.

name: Death Pulse
description_raw: Necrophos releases a wave of death around him, dealing damage to enemy units and healing allied units.
lore: Poor souls who succumb to Rotund'jere's plagues are recycled for future use.

name: Heartstopper Aura
description_raw: Necrophos stills the hearts of his opponents, causing nearby enemy units to lose a percentage of their max health over time.
lore: Those who come within a short distance of Necrophos can feel pestilence and plague in the air.
scepter: Heartstopper Aura's Health Decay is increased by %heal_regen_to_damage%%% of Necrophos's current health regeneration.

name: Sadist
description_raw: Necrophos gains stacking regen for %regen_duration% seconds for each unit he kills. Hero kills multiply the effect.

name: Ghost Shroud
description_raw: Necrophos slips into the realm that separates the living from the dead. Unable to attack or be attacked, he emits an aura that slows enemies around him. He takes additional magic damage in this form, but his restorative powers are amplified.
lore: Rotund'jere uses the souls of his victims as bridge from life to afterlife.

name: Reaper's Scythe
description_raw: Stuns the target enemy hero, then deals damage based on how much life it is missing. If Necrophos kills an enemy this way, he'll permanently gain Health and Mana Regen. Any kill under this effect is credited to Necrophos.
lore: The amount of death and suffering in the air increases the power of Necrophos's plague magic.

name: Shadowraze
description_raw: Shadow Fiend razes the ground directly in front of him, dealing damage to enemy units in the area, dealing bonus damage based on his current Necromastery Soul amount. Adds a stacking damage amplifier on the target that causes the enemy to take bonus Shadowraze damage per stack.
lore: Nevermore's trademark for harvesting souls.
shard: Cooldown reduced by %cooldown_reduction_on_hero_hit%s per enemy hero hit. Applies a stacking %movement_speed_debuff%%% movement speed debuff on enemies hit.

name: Shadowraze
description_raw: Shadow Fiend razes the ground a short distance away from him, dealing damage to enemy units in the area, dealing bonus damage based on his current Necromastery Soul amount. Adds a stacking damage amplifier on the target that causes the enemy to take bonus Shadowraze damage per stack.
lore: Nevermore's trademark for harvesting souls.
shard: Cooldown reduced by %cooldown_reduction_on_hero_hit%s per enemy hero hit. Applies a stacking %movement_speed_debuff%%% movement speed debuff on enemies hit.

name: Shadowraze
description_raw: Shadow Fiend razes the ground a longer distance away from him, dealing damage to enemy units in the area, dealing bonus damage based on his current Necromastery Soul amount. Adds a stacking damage amplifier on the target that causes the enemy to take bonus Shadowraze damage per stack.
lore: Nevermore's trademark for harvesting souls.
shard: Cooldown reduced by %cooldown_reduction_on_hero_hit%s per enemy hero hit. Applies a stacking %movement_speed_debuff%%% movement speed debuff on enemies hit.

name: Necromastery
description_raw: Shadow Fiend steals the soul from units he kills, gaining %necromastery_damage_per_soul% bonus damage per soul. Hero kills grant %souls_per_hero_kill% souls. On death, he releases %soul_release_tooltip%%% of them from bondage.
lore: Harvested souls swirl in and out of the Abysm, empowering the Shadow Fiend to increase the size of his collection.
scepter: Increases max souls.

name: Presence of the Dark Lord
description_raw: Shadow Fiend's presence reduces the armor of nearby enemies.
lore: Even being near Nevermore eats away at one's soul.

name: Feast of Souls
description_raw: Shadow Fiend gains Bonus Movement and Attack Speed for %duration% seconds. For the duration of the effect, every %soul_collection_interval%s he collects souls from %soul_collection_per_interval% enemies in a %soul_collection_radius% radius. After the effect is over, he loses the souls whose owners are still alive, retaining the rest for %linger_duration%s, after which souls that are over the Necromastery max stack count are also lost.\n\n Can only collect souls once from each individual enemy.
lore: For Nevermore, there's as much delight in the harvest as there is in the feast.

name: Requiem of Souls
description_raw:
Shadow Fiend gathers up to %max_soul_release% of his captured souls to release them as lines of demonic energy. Units near Shadow Fiend when the souls are released can be damaged by several lines of energy. Any unit damaged by Requiem of Souls will be feared and have its movement speed and magic resistance reduced for %requiem_slow_duration% seconds for each line hit up to a maximum of %requiem_slow_duration_max%. Lines of energy are created for every soul captured through Necromastery.

Requiem of Souls is automatically cast whenever Shadow Fiend dies, regardless of its cooldown.
lore: The captured souls of those past slain are released to ravage their former allies.
scepter: Reduces cooldown and causes Requiem of Souls to return back to Shadow Fiend. The wave back to Shadow Fiend heals him for all the damage it dealt.

name: Void
description_raw: Creates a damaging void that slows an enemy unit and deals damage. At night, Void also mini-stuns, interrupting channeling abilities, and its effects lasts longer.
lore: Balanar creates a vortex of infinite night, tearing opponents violently into the eternal darkness that once was.
shard: Void now affects all units in a radius around the target.

name: Crippling Fear
description_raw: Night Stalker horrifies all nearby enemies, causing them to become silenced and take damage over time while near him.  The effect lasts longer at night.
lore: A vision of the twisted maw of Balanar etches itself into the minds of the poor souls unlucky enough to cross his path.

name: Hunter in the Night
description_raw: Night Stalker is in his element at night, attacking and moving with great swiftness.
lore: The hunting prowess of Balanar improves as the night beckons.
scepter: Increases bonus movement speed by %bonus_bonus_movement_speed_pct_night%%% and attack speed by %bonus_bonus_attack_speed_night%. Killing an enemy hero resets all basic ability cooldowns.
shard: Hunter in the Night may be cast on a creep, instantly killing it and restoring some of Night Stalker's maximum health and mana. Cannot target ancients during the daytime.

name: Dark Ascension
description_raw: Night Stalker smothers the sun and summons instant darkness, so that he might use his powers at their fullest. Night Stalker gains flight and bonus damage during this time. Has unobstructed vision.
lore: It is a humbling sight to see when the mightiest of warriors become afraid of the dark.

name: Heart of Darkness
description_raw: Night Stalker's health regeneration is increased during the night and decreased during the day.
shard: Heart of Darkness now also applies to mana regeneration at night with the same values as health regeneration. Increases the duration of night time by %nighttime_increase%s.

name: Night Reign
description_raw: The game now starts at night instead of day. Night is longer than day.

name: Midnight Feast
description_raw: Night Stalker heals himself when attacking enemy units. At night, the ability can be activated to instantly destroy a non-ancient creep and restore a percentage of Night Stalker's maximum health and mana.

name: Impale
description_raw: Rock spikes burst from the earth along a straight path. Enemy units take damage, then are hurled into the air and stunned.
lore: All zealot scarabs possess intimate knowledge of underground pathways, using them to their advantage.

name: Mind Flare
description_raw: Deals damage equal to a percentage of the target's Max Mana and burns part of it away. Deals additional damage equal to a percentage of the damage the target has taken from Nyx Assassin in the last %damage_echo_duration%s. Resets accumulated damage before applying damage.
lore: Only those raised by the queen can use their minds to touch the world around them.

name: Spiked Carapace
description_raw: When activated while above ground, Spiked Carapace reflects and negates damage dealt to Nyx Assassin (max once from each source), as well as stunning the source of the damage. Activating Spiked Carapace will not break Vendetta invisibility.\n\nWhile Burrowed, Spiked Carapace instantly stuns nearby enemies when cast.
lore: While their carapace is relatively thin, it's guarded by a retractable field of razor-sharp spikes.

name: Vendetta
description_raw: Nyx Assassin becomes invisible and gains a speed bonus. If Nyx Assassin attacks to break the invisibility, massive bonus damage is dealt with the attack that applies a break to the target. Nyx Assassin has %attack_range_bonus% additional attack range and a %attack_animation_bonus%%% faster attack animation for this attack.
lore: The scarab kills for the glory of his queen.
shard: Decreases cooldown by %bonus_AbilityCooldown%s. For the first %free_pathing_duration%s of Vendetta, Nyx is hasted and has unobstructed pathing.

name: Burrow
description_raw: Nyx Assassin buries himself beneath the battlefield over a short duration. Once burrowed, Spiked Carapace instantly stuns nearby enemies when cast, the range of Mind Flare and Impale is increased, and Impale's cooldown is decreased. While burrowed, Nyx Assassin is stationary, unable to attack, and invisible. Nyx Assassin gains damage reduction from all damage sources.
lore: Some castes of zealot scarab are known to create small burrows to lie in wait, ready to ambush their prey.

name: Unburrow
description_raw: Emerge from the burrow.
lore: Some castes of zealot scarab are known to create small burrows to lie in wait, ready to ambush their prey.

name: Nyxth Sense
description_raw: Nyx Assassin can detect heroes within %radius% units of himself.

name: Mana Burn
description_raw: Nyx Assassin's damage on enemies also burns mana as a percentage of the damage dealt.

name: Arcane Orb
description_raw: Adds extra pure damage to Outworld Destroyer's attacks, based on his remaining mana pool.
lore: Harbinger's outworldly knowledge allows it to tap into the ebb and flow of all spiritual energy, infusing it into his being.
scepter: Arcane Orb bounces to an additional target for %bounce_damage_reduction%%% less damage.

name: Ominous Discernment
description_raw: Outworld Destroyer gains an additional %bonus_max_mana_per_int% mana per point of Intelligence.

name: Astral Imprisonment
description_raw: Steals a percentage of the target's max mana and places them into an astral prison. The hidden unit is invulnerable and disabled. When the astral prison implodes, it deals damage to the target.
lore: Locked away in the pocket between this world and the Outworld, victims realize their infantile knowledge and mortality.
shard: Astral Imprisonment now deals damage in an area. Also allows allies to move at %allied_movement_speed_pct%%% movement speed during Astral Imprisonment (they are visible, but untargettable and can't perform any other actions).

name: Essence Flux
description_raw: Passively grants a chance to restore a percentage of your max mana each time you cast an ability. Restores less mana from spells that modify attacks.
lore: The Outworld is awash in arcane energy, inclined to diffuse through any of Harbinger's rifts.

name: Sanity's Eclipse
description_raw: Unleashes a psychic blast that deals damage to enemies based on the difference between your max mana and the target's max mana. Sanity's Eclipse can hit units trapped by Astral Imprisonment.
lore: When an Outworld crystal ruptures, cataclysmic energies are released, and the reverberations of this power are felt interdimensionally.

name: Objurgation
description_raw: Increases Outworld Destroyer's maximum mana. When cast, protects Outworld Destroyer with an all damage barrier equal to a flat amount and a percentage of his maximum mana.
scepter: Increases max mana to barrier. Damage that would bring Outworld Destroyer below %automatic_trigger_threshold%%% health is prevented. When that happens, Outworld Destroyer receives a strong dispel and gains an undispellable instance of Objurgation. This effect cannot occur more than once every %automatic_trigger_cd% seconds.

name: Dumb Luck
description_raw: Ogre Magi's max Intelligence is 0. He receives mana and mana regeneration from Strength.

name: Fireblast
description_raw: Blasts an enemy unit with a wave of fire, dealing damage and stunning the target.
lore: The Ogre Magi is easily amused, entertained for hours by playing with fire.
scepter: Fireblast is refined, reducing cooldown by %bonus_AbilityCooldown%s and increasing cast speed by %bonus_cast_speed%%%.

name: Fire Shield
description_raw: Creates a shield around the target ally, absorbing a percentage of the damage of next %attacks% attacks from enemy heroes. When damage is absorbed, a fireball is launched at the attacker. Can be cast on towers.
lore: There is immense luck involved in Aggron not just setting friends on fire.

name: Unrefined Fireblast
description_raw: Blasts an enemy unit with a wave of fire, dealing %base_damage% + %str_multiplier%x Ogre's Strength in damage and stunning the target. Its mana cost is %scepter_mana%%% of Ogre Magi's current mana.
lore: The 'who-casts-spell-first' argument between himself is solved simply by both casting at once.

name: Ignite
description_raw: Drenches the target and another random unit in volatile chemicals, causing it to burst into flames. The target is in immense pain, taking damage and moving more slowly.
lore: Batter up!

name: Bloodlust
description_raw: Incites a frenzy in a friendly unit, increasing its movement speed and attack speed. Gives bonus attack speed if cast on Ogre himself. Can be cast on towers.
lore: 'Running's not as fun as hitting... Not one bit fun.'

name: Multicast
description_raw: Enables Ogre Magi to cast his abilities and items multiple times with each use. Each point of Strength adds to Multicast chance. Every %strength_for_one_pct% Strength adds %one_tooltip%%%.
lore: Despite being largely incapacitated by his IQ, the Ogre Magi's success in battle is attributed to pure skill.

name: Ice Armor
description_raw: The Ogre Frostmage summons an invisible layer of icy air that surrounds the target friendly unit, increasing its armor and temporarily slowing any enemies that dare attack it.

name: Hammer of Purity
description_raw:
Omniknight imbues his hammer with holy power, causing his attack to have increased range, deal pure damage based on a percentage of his base damage and slow his target for a short duration.

Omniknight heals for %heal_pct%%% of the damage dealt over %heal_duration%s.
lore: The knight is merely a means to move the hammer.

name: Purification
description_raw: Instantly heals a friendly unit and damages all nearby enemy units.
lore: Priests of the Omniscience are adept at removing impurities from fellow warriors.
shard: After a %recast_delay%s delay, the target is Purified again with %recast_effectiveness_pct%%% effectiveness.

name: Degen Aura
description_raw: Degenerates the movement capabilities of enemy units that stray too near, slowing their movement speed.
lore: The holy embodiment of Purist Thunderwrath is enough to weaken those of lesser faith.

name: Healing Hammer
description_raw: Ability damage done to enemies by Omniknight heals him over time.

name: Repel
description_raw: Grants Debuff Immunity with %magic_resist%%% magic resistance, as well as bonus HP Regen.
lore: The All Seeing One casts down his protection over those that Purist calls friend.

name: Guardian Angel
description_raw: Omniknight calls upon a Guardian Angel that grants immunity from physical damage to all allied units near Omniknight.
lore: The All Seeing One casts down his protection over those that Purist calls friend.
scepter: Guardian Angel has global radius, affects buildings, and amplifies health restoration.

name: +{s:bonus_base_damage}% Hammer of Purity Bonus Base Damage
Fortune's End
description_raw: CHANNELED - Gathers Oracle's power into a bolt of scouring energy that, when released, damages, roots, and dispels enemies of buffs in an area around the target. If target is an ally it will only dispel debuffs. The root duration increases with channeling time.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
lore: The astral orb crackles with power while raw energy lances out, temporarily disrupting an enemy's connection to their own body.

name: Fate's Edict
description_raw: Oracle enraptures a target, disarming them and granting them %magic_damage_resistance_pct_tooltip%%% magic damage resistance.
lore: An unbreakable prophecy resounds: a chosen ally shall briefly suffer no magics.  Other kinds of suffering however...

name: Purifying Flames
description_raw: Burns away impurities, dealing heavy magic damage to the target before causing them to regenerate health over time. The amount of health regenerated over its duration exceeds the amount of initial damage. Can be cast on enemies and allies.
lore: Like a hall of mirrors might amplify the light of a single candle, the shattered walls of the universe can transform the light of prophecy into a burning torch.

name: False Promise
description_raw: Temporarily alters an ally's destiny, delaying any healing or damage taken until False Promise ends. Any healing that is delayed by False Promise is amplified. Removes most negative status effects and disables on initial cast.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel
lore: Foes and false prophets oft make lies of men's fates.

name: Rain of Destiny
description_raw: Brings forth rain to the target area. Enemies standing in the area receive damage and have reduced Heal Amplification. Allies in the area heal and have increased incoming Heal Amplification.
lore: Through mixture of the astral and the atmospheric, Nerif bends a single reality into paradoxical alignment.

name: Diviner's Deck
description_raw:
Oracle pulls a random Tarot Card now and every %duration% seconds to receives its buff for %duration% seconds. Oracle always knows the next Tarot Card.

Death: %spell_amplification%%% Spell Amplification
The Fool: %gold_bonus_pct%%% Increased Gold Gain
The World: %int_bonus_pct%%% Increased Intelligence
The Lovers: %heal_amplification%%% Heal Amplification
The Tower: %barrier_amount% All Damage Barrier (regenerates after not taking damage for %barrier_restore_time%s)

name: Clairvoyant Curse
description_raw: Spell amplification increased by %spell_amplification%%% per hero level.

name: Clairvoyant Cure
description_raw: Heal amplification increased by %heal_amplification%%% per hero level.

name: Prognosticate
description_raw: Oracle will predict and announce to allies, where the next power rune will spawn (top or bottom) as well as Roshan's exact respawn time.

name: Swashbuckle
description_raw: Pangolier dashes along the target line, then slashes and briefly slows all enemies in the drawn direction with several quick swipes.\n\nLucky Shot has a chance to activate from this damage.
lore: The Pangolier's blade is even nimbler than his tongue.

name: Shield Crash
description_raw: Pangolier jumps in the air and slams back to the ground in front of his current position damaging all enemies in a radius. Pangolier gains an all damage barrier for a short time if Shield Crash hits an enemy hero.\n\nForward movement is maintained if Shield Crash is used while Rolling Thunder is active, and allows Rolling Thunder to clear walls or cliffs.
lore: Only in the midst of his enemies does the Pangolier truly thrive.
scepter: Causes Shield Crash to cast a 2-attack Swashbuckle every 90 degrees around your hero that deals %scepter_damage_outgoing_tooltip%%% damage.

name: Lucky Shot
description_raw: Pangolier rolls the dice and lets fate decide the outcome for his enemies. Grants a chance to drastically slow their attack speed and reduce armor on any damage dealt by Pangolier's attacks or abilities.
lore: The Pangolier's blade is guided more often by whim than reason.

name: Rolling Thunder
description_raw:
Pangolier curls into a debuff immune ball with %magic_resistance%%% magic resistance and rolls out. When rolling, he moves at an increased speed and can move through trees, but has a decreased ability to turn. Striking enemies knocks them back, inflicting damage proportional to his attack damage and stunning them when they land. 

Colliding with walls or cliffs will cause a temporary pause while Pangolier reverses in direction.

DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
lore: Where his ancestors sought only refuge, the Pangolier saw opportunity...

name: Fortune Favors the Bold
description_raw: Random item and ability effects of enemies near Pangolier have a reduced chance to affect him.

name: Stop Rolling
description_raw: Halt!
lore: Donté Panlin stops when he pleases.

name: Roll Up
description_raw: Pangolier curls into an immobile protective ball, gaining debuff immunity, %magic_resistance%%% magic resistance, and allowing him to turn. Can be cast during Rolling Thunder to temporarily hit the brakes. Can cast Rolling Thunder and Shield Crash during Roll Up. If enemies attack Pangolier during this, he will roll away from the attacker, applying Rolling Thunder damage/stun if there are enemies in the way.
lore: It requires deft tailwork and immense balance to defy momentum in the heart of battle.

name: End Roll Up
description_raw: Ends Pangolier's Roll Up early.

name: Fan of Knives
description_raw: Phantom Assassin releases sharp blades around her, dealing a percentage of each victim's max health on impact and applying Break.
lore: A sister is generally given a single name, but powerful names often have plentiful allies.

name: Stifling Dagger
description_raw: Throws a dagger slowing the enemy unit's movement speed, dealing %base_damage%+%attack_factor_tooltip%%% of Phantom Assassin's attack damage as physical damage and applying attack effects from items and abilities.
lore: The first skill learned by the Sisters of the Veil often signals an incoming hit.

name: Phantom Strike
description_raw: Teleports to a unit, friendly or enemy, and grants bonus attack speed while attacking if it's an enemy unit.
lore: Mortred's silken veil is the last thing her unfortunate target sees.

name: Immaterial
description_raw: Phantom Assassin focuses inward, increasing her ability to evade enemy attacks.\n\nStacks diminishingly with other sources of Evasion.

name: Blur
description_raw: Phantom Assassin blurs her body, disjointing incoming projectiles, increasing her movement speed, causing her to be impossible to see until she comes near enemy heroes or towers.
lore: Meditation allows a Veiled Sister to carefully anticipate her opponents in combat.
shard: Decreases Cooldown. Any time Phantom Assassin gets a hero kill, her ability cooldowns advance %cooldown_refund_pct%%% of their max cooldown values.

name: Coup de Grace
description_raw: Phantom Assassin refines her combat abilities, acquiring a chance of gaining Deadly Focus with each attack. When attacking with Deadly Focus, Phantom Assassin will consume the buff and guarantee a critical hit. Stifling Dagger has a bonus chance to cause Deadly Focus.
lore: A divine strike, Mortred honors her opponent by choosing them for death.

name: Spirit Lance
description_raw: Sends a magical spirit lance to a target enemy unit that damages and slows, while summoning an illusory phantom to attack the unit.
lore: Azwraith's proficiency at spearing his family's meal of fish is proving quite useful in the battlefield.
scepter: Spirit Lance bounces once on enemies, prioritizing Heroes. Increases Spirit Lance illusion damage.

name: Doppelganger
description_raw: Phantom Lancer briefly vanishes from the battlefield. After %delay% second, Phantom Lancer and any of his nearby illusions reappear at a random position within the targeted location, along with two additional doppelgangers. Extends duration of all illusions. The two added doppelgangers have different properties: one takes normal damage and deals none, while the other takes %illusion_2_damage_in_pct%%% bonus damage and deals %illusion_2_damage_out_pct%%% less damage.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
lore: Dread Magus Vorn's death imbued the Phantom Lancer with the ability to bend and fracture all spectrums of light.

name: Juxtapose
description_raw: Phantom Lancer has a chance to fracture his presence on an attack, creating an illusion of himself. Illusions also have a chance to fracture further. Illusions created from Phantom Lancer last for %illusion_duration% seconds, while illusions created from other illusions last %illusion_from_illusion_duration% seconds.
lore: Each of Azwraith's lance attacks feels like two from a normal warrior; or three; or four...
shard: Adds an active ability to Juxtapose. Renders Phantom Lancer invisible for up to %invis_duration% seconds while generating a duplicate image to confuse enemies. His movement speed is increased by %invis_movespeed%%% during this invisibility.

name: Phantom Rush
description_raw: When targeting an enemy for an attack, Phantom Lancer quickly charges into range, gaining increased movement speed and evasion.
lore: Azwraith knows that on the field of battle, speed can mean everything.
scepter: Increases Range. Whenever Phantom Lancer Rushes through enemies, he creates Juxtapose illusions that attack them. Additionally, every %illusion_spawn_travel_distance% units rushed creates a Juxtapose illusion that rushes to the target alongside Phantom Lancer.

name: Illusory Armaments
description_raw: Whenever an illusion of Phantom Lancer is created, its outgoing damage cannot go below a fixed value for %duration% seconds.

name: Icarus Dive
description_raw: Phoenix dives forward in an arc with a fixed distance in the targeted direction, dealing damage over time and slowing the movement speed of any units it comes into contact with, and then orbiting back to its original position. If Phoenix casts Supernova, the dive ends.
lore: Though no stranger to travelling the cosmic void, soaring within an atmosphere offers unique pleasures.

name: Stop Icarus Dive
description_raw: Immediately cancels the dive.
lore: SCREE!

name: Fire Spirits
description_raw: Summons 4 fire spirits that circle around Phoenix. Each spirit can be launched independently at a targeted area of effect. Affected enemy units take damage over time and have their attack speed greatly reduced.
lore: The ever-collapsing core of Phoenix often emits short-lived bursts of conscious light.
shard: Causes Fire Spirits to become a passive charge-based ability. Has 7 second replenish time.

name: Sun Ray
description_raw: Phoenix expels a beam of light at the cost of its own health. The beam damages enemies and heals allies for a base amount plus a percentage of their max health. The percentage increases as the beam continues to fire.
lore: The vent through which such stellar energy flows is mere atoms wide.
shard: Allows Sun Ray to be cast during Supernova.

name: Stop Sun Ray
description_raw: Immediately stops the Sun Ray.
lore: CHIRP!

name: Toggle Movement
description_raw: Toggles slow forward movement during Sun Ray firing.
lore: SQAWRK!

name: Supernova
description_raw: The Phoenix willingly ends its current life for the chance to be reborn. Transforms into a burning sun that scorches enemies in a huge area. The sun can be destroyed by attacks from enemy Heroes. After %abilityduration% seconds the sun explodes, stunning all nearby enemies while restoring Phoenix to full health and mana with refreshed abilities.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel
lore: The solar crucible of a Supernova may be fatal, yet from its flames arise new beacons to wander infinity.
scepter: Increases number of attacks to destroy Supernova and allows Phoenix to cast Supernova on an allied hero, bringing both into the sun to be reborn together.

name: Launch Fire Spirit
description_raw: Each fire spirit can be launched independently at a targeted area of effect. Affected enemy units take damage over time and have their attack speed greatly reduced.
lore: PKAWW! BOOM

name: Dying Light
description_raw: Phoenix deals %damage_pct%%% of its missing health as magic damage to all enemies in a %radius% radius every second.

name: Blinding Sun
description_raw: Phoenix ability debuffs apply a stackable %blind_per_second%%% Miss chance per second. Lasts %blind_duration% seconds.

name: +{s:bonus_damage_pct}% Dying Light Missing Health as Damage
Onslaught
description_raw: Primal Beast charges up and then runs in the chosen direction, knocking back enemies and allies alike. Enemy units are damaged and stunned on impact. The longer the charge duration, the farther Primal Beast's momentum will carry him. \n\n Can be cancelled at any time with the Stop command.
lore: The Beast's single-minded focus on chosen prey leaves all other considerations scattered in his ruinous wake.

name: Begin Onslaught
description_raw: Begins the rush to the specified location.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IMMEDIATE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NO_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_BACKSWING | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_DONT_RESUME_ATTACK | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_CHANNEL

name: Trample
description_raw: Primal Beast stomps over everything. For every %step_distance% units traveled, all enemies around the Beast receive damage. Deals base damage plus a multiplier of Primal Beast's attack damage. Primal Beast is disarmed for the duration of the ability.
lore: As the only member of his species to arrive on this world, locals can only speculate on the Beast's size relative to his kin. Such observation would prove easier of course if the subject didn't eat everything it sees and destroy most of what it doesn't.

name: Uproar
description_raw: The Beast's temper causes every instance of %damage_limit% hero damage or more to grant a stack of Uproar.  \n\n When activated, Primal Beast releases a roar that slows surrounding enemies and grants the Beast additional attack damage and armor for %roar_duration% seconds based on his current stacks of Uproar.
lore: Already draped in a broken patchwork of barding and chains upon appearing in the mistwoods, the Beast tolerates no further attempts at subjugation.
scepter: When Primal Beast activates Uproar, he releases %projectile_waves% waves of %projectiles_per_stack% projectiles per stack of uproar each in a circle around him. Projectiles deal damage and Break enemies hit. After a short delay, each projectile splinters in two.

name: Pulverize
description_raw: CHANNELED - Primal Beast channels his rage, grabbing the target enemy and slamming them into the ground repeatedly, damaging and mini-stunning any enemies caught in the AoE. Each consecutive hit deals bonus damage. Lasts %channel_time% seconds.
lore: Though none are certain whether his utterances have true meaning, most concede the Beast's powerful grip and tendency to smash his enemies into naught but pulp and pieces communicates his intent well enough.

name: Rock Throw
description_raw:
Primal Beast throws a rock at the target location that stuns and damages enemies. The rock cannot be thrown within a minimum range of Primal Beast. After landing, the rock splits into 3 additional fragments that land behind the initial target location.

Rock Throw increases stacks of Uproar for each hero hit.
lore: AGAIN WITH THE ROCKS!

name: Colossal
description_raw: Primal Beast has %base_slow_resist%%% base Slow Resistance and gains %aoe_per_threshold%%% bonus Area of Effect and %slow_resistance_per_threshold%%% Slow Resistance for every %hp_per_threshold% Max Health.

name: Cannot be slowed or rooted during Trample
Illusory Orb
description_raw:
Vector Targeted. Puck launches a magic orb that travels along the path, damaging enemy units along the way. The orb deals an additional %damage_over_time_pct%%% of its impact damage every %damage_interval%s in its area of effect, but if it exceeds the max cast range it will be destroyed.\n\n At any point, Puck may teleport to the orb's location using Ethereal Jaunt.

Can be put on alt-cast to launch the Orb straight ahead.
lore: The playful Faerie Dragon delights in confusing others, vanishing and reappearing where unexpected.

name: Ethereal Jaunt
description_raw: Teleports Puck to a flying Illusory Orb.
lore: The Orb is an egg of potential, traveling along its own timeline.

name: Puckish
description_raw: Whenever Puck disjoints an attack, it restores %mana_and_health_restore_pct%%% of its max health and mana. Dodging a targeted spell projectile restores %dodged_spell_multiplier%x that amount. Does not apply to attacks by Towers.

name: Waning Rift
description_raw: Puck teleports to the target location and releases a burst of faerie dust that deals damage and silences enemy units nearby.
lore: With a mischievous grin, Puck spreads its enchanted powder which disrupts magical flow.

name: Phase Shift
description_raw: CHANNELED - Puck briefly shifts into another dimension where it is immune from harm.
lore: With a quip and flash, Puck returns to the alien dimension from whence it came.
shard: Puck's attacks deal bonus magic damage. Puck attacks all enemies within its attack range every time it phase shifts.

name: Dream Coil
description_raw: Creates a coil of volatile magic that latches onto enemy Heroes, damaging and leashing them.  If the enemy hero stretches the coil by moving too far away, it snaps, stunning and dealing additional damage.
lore: The Faerie Dragon sows confusion by forcing its enemies to vividly dream about their own mortality.
scepter: All enemies affected by Dream Coil are attacked at a rate equal to %attack_rate_pct%%% of Puck's attack rate. The attacks continue while the target is stunned if they break the Dream Coil.

name: Meat Shield
description_raw: Pudge covers himself with a layer of flesh that blocks damage of any type taken from any source.
lore: The Butcher gives new meaning to the words 'meat shield.'

name: Meat Hook
description_raw: Launches a bloody hook toward a unit or location. The hook will snag the first unit it encounters, dragging the unit back to Pudge, killing it if it's a non-ancient creep and dealing damage if it is an enemy otherwise.
lore: The Butcher's hook is a symbolic nightmare, its curved blade a frightening reminder of his slaughterous intent.
shard:
When Meat Hook hits an enemy, it deals bonus damage based on the distance pulled.

When Meat Hook hits an ally, Meat Hook's cooldown is reduced by %cooldown_reduction_pct_allied_hook%%%.

name: Rot
description_raw: A toxic cloud that deals intense damage and slows movement--harming not only enemy units but Pudge himself.
lore: A foul odor precedes a toxic, choking gas, emanating from the Butcher's putrid, ever-swelling mass.
scepter: Increases Rot radius by %bonus_rot_radius%, damage by %bonus_rot_damage%, and causes it to reduce enemy Health Restoration by %scepter_rot_regen_reduction_pct%%%.

name: Eject
description_raw: Ejects the swallowed allied hero inside of you.
lore: Allies emerge forever changed.

name: Dismember
description_raw: CHANNELED - Pudge chows down on an enemy unit, disabling it and dealing damage over time. Damage is increased by Pudge's Strength and heals him for the total amount. Pudge pulls the unit at a rate of %pull_units_per_second% units, up to a minimum of %pull_distance_limit% range.
lore: 'When I'm through with these vermin, they'll be fit for a pie!'

name: Flesh Heap
description_raw: Pudge's skin thickens permanently every time he kills an enemy Hero, gaining %flesh_heap_strength_buff_amount% bonus Strength for each stack.

name: Nether Blast
description_raw: An exploding pulse deals damage to enemies and structures in the area.  Deals %structure_damage_mod%%% damage to structures.
lore: The Arts of Oblivion include a deafening blast of emerald flames from the Nether Reaches.

name: Decrepify
description_raw: A powerful banishing spell that slows a unit and renders it unable to attack or be attacked. Healing on affected allies is increased, while afflicted enemies take extra magic damage instead.
lore: A now-mastered relic from his childhood, Pugna delights in banishing others into the Nether Realm, whether for good, evil, or simple enjoyment.

name: Nether Ward
description_raw: Pugna places a Nether Ward at the target location. The ward will fire at any enemy hero who casts a spell dealing base damage plus the damage multiplier of the mana spent by the enemy hero.
lore: While at the lamasery for the Arts of Oblivion, Pugna learned to dominate his classmates with a simple ward charged with Nether magic.
shard: Increases cast range to %AbilityCastRange%.

name: Life Drain
description_raw: CHANNELED - When cast on an enemy, Pugna drains health from the target enemy unit to heal himself and granting vision over the target.\n\nWhen cast on an ally, Pugna will drain his own health into his ally.
lore: Pugna has truly become more powerful than even the grandmaster of Oblivion.
scepter: Reduces cooldown by %abilitycooldown%s. When targeting an enemy hero, Pugna reduces their outgoing spell damage by %spell_amp_drain_rate%%% per second up to a maximum of %spell_amp_drain_max%%% and increases his own, up to a maximum of %max_spell_amp_drain_pct%%%. When draining through a Nether Ward using Shard, the rate of increase/decrease is %spell_amp_drain_rate_ward%%% instead. Debuff lasts %spell_amp_drain_duration% seconds.
shard: Life Drain can target your Nether Ward, causing life drain to refract to all enemy heroes within %abilitycastrange% units of the ward for %shard_damage_pct_from_ward%%% of its normal value. The effect is interrupted if the ward is destroyed.

name: Oblivion Savant
description_raw: Pugna can cast spells and use items while channeling.\n\nPugna receives %tower_scale%%% spell amplification per destroyed tower.

name: Shadow Strike
description_raw: Hurls a poisoned dagger which deals large initial damage, and then deals damage over time. The poisoned unit has its movement speed slowed for %duration% seconds.  An instance of damage is dealt every %damage_interval% seconds.
lore: Akasha's envenomed dagger allows her to delight in the drawn out suffering of her victims.
scepter: Causes Shadow Strike to become a %aoe_radius% AoE Spell. When Shadow Strike ends or is re-applied to an enemy Hero, the target emits a Scream of Pain, hitting any nearby enemies.

name: Blink
description_raw: Short distance teleportation that allows Queen of Pain to move in and out of combat.
lore: The Secret Queen lives up to her title, making her pain impossible to escape.
shard: Releases a sonic boom when Queen of Pain blinks, at both her starting and ending locations. Deals %shard_damage% damage in a %shard_aoe% AoE and silences the target for %shard_duration% seconds.

name: Scream Of Pain
description_raw:
The Queen of Pain lets loose a piercing scream around her, damaging nearby enemies.

%damage_reflected_to_self%%% of the damage dealt to heroes is reflected back to her.
lore: The sultry voice of Akasha beckons her opponents while stealing their souls.

name: Sonic Wave
description_raw: Creates a gigantic wave of sound in front of Queen of Pain, dealing heavy damage to all enemy units in its wake and pushing them back.
lore: Her most exquisite of all of torments, Akasha's Sonic Wave puts her poor foes out of their misery.

name: Masochist
description_raw: Queen of Pain has bonus Spell Amplification but a percentage of her spell damage is reflected back to her.

name: Succubus
description_raw: All sources of Spell Lifesteal also apply to Pure Damage. Queen of Pain gains Spell Lifesteal that increases with proximity to her enemies. Lifesteal is at its maximum when the enemy is %close_radius% units or closer to her and at its minimum when the enemy is %max_radius% units or further from her.

name: Bondage
description_raw: Whenever an enemy within %radius% range deals spell damage to Queen of Pain, she returns %spell_reflect_pct%%% of the damage dealt.

name: Jetpack
description_raw: Clockwerk activates a jetpack, gaining flying movement, flying vision, and bonus movement speed. Clockwerk has a severely-limited turn rate during this time and cannot attack. Jetpack can be toggled on and off for the duration of the buff.
lore: Sure it's blown up over fourteen testing dummies, but at least they all flew!

name: Overclocking
description_raw:
Supercharges Clockwerks abilities:

Battery Assault: Increased radius and affects all enemies in its range.
Power Cogs: Radius increased, and Clockwerk's armor while near Power Cogs is increased.
Rocket Flares: Increased damage, vision and slow duration, and fire additional rockets to either side of the target.
Hookshot: Stun radius and duration increased.
Jetpack: Moves faster.

Clockwerk's movement and attack speed becomes slowed to a crawl after the duration runs out.
lore: Rattletrap understands the limitations of his armor. Just as he understands the risks of pushing past them in times of need.

name: Battery Assault
description_raw: Discharges high-powered shrapnel at random nearby enemy units, dealing minor magical damage and ministun.
lore: Some of Rattletrap's contraptions don't quite work correctly, so detonating them proves useful as an offensive maneuver.

name: Power Cogs
description_raw:
