Forms a ring of energized cogs around Clockwerk, trapping any units that are near. Enemies outside the trap that touch a cog are knocked back, losing health and mana. Once a cog has delivered a shock, it will power down. Damage is increased by %mana_burn_as_damage_pct%%% of the mana burned.

Cogs can be destroyed by enemy attacks, but Clockwerk can push them up to %projectile_distance% distance away with one hit. Clockwerk can move through the cogs freely, disabling them as he passes over.
lore: One of Clockwerk's inventions of which he is most proud is the power cog - though it is sometimes despised by his allies.

name: Rocket Flare
description_raw: Fires a global range flare that explodes over a given area. Upon impact, enemies in the area take damage and are briefly slowed. Rocket flare provides vision over the impact area for %duration% seconds.
lore: What started as a festive display has become a useful scouting and bombardment tool.

name: Hookshot
description_raw: Fires a grappling device rapidly at the target location.  If the hook hits a unit, Clockwerk launches himself into the target, stunning and dealing damage to everyone in a %stun_radius% radius around the hit target. Any enemies Clockwerk collides with along the way are damaged and stunned.
lore: A somewhat unwieldy device, the Hookshot sends the otherwise clunky Clockwerk armor flying through the air.

name: Armor Power
description_raw: Clockwerk's outgoing damage increases by %damage_per_armor%%% per point of armor.\n\nClockwerk can consume Chainmails to permanently gain +%armor_per_chainmail% armor per Chainmail consumed. Can stack. Self-cast to consume.

name: Plasma Field
description_raw: Releases a wave of energetic plasma that grows in power as it expands, but also zaps on contraction, slowing and dealing damage to enemy units caught in its path. Damage and slow increases with distance from Razor. The Plasma Field hits each unit twice, once each direction.
lore: The Lightning Revenant rules the Underscape with plasmatic power.

name: Static Link
description_raw: Creates a charged link between Razor and an enemy Hero, stealing damage from the target and giving it to Razor. Allows Razor to attack while moving with the link active.
lore: Razor's polarity channels electricity into his being, draining the power of his opposition.
shard: Increases Cast Range. Slows Razor's target by %move_speed_factor%x the amount of damage stolen while the link is active.

name: Storm Surge
description_raw: There's a chance when attacked, and always when targeted with a spell, to release a forked lightning that strikes the target and other nearby enemies, prioritizing the unit type of the attacker, dealing damage and slowing movement speed.
lore: Merely approaching the Lightning Revenant is rewarded with shock therapy.
shard: While Eye of the Storm is active, strike chance is %eye_of_the_storm_chance_multiplier%x as high, strike cooldown is reduced by %strike_cd_reduction_during_storm%s, and Lightning strikes all enemies within Eye of the Storm's radius. Does not apply to the same enemy twice from a single instance.

name: Unstable Current
description_raw: Passively increases Razor's movement speed.

name: Eye of the Storm
description_raw: A powerful lightning storm strikes out at the enemy unit with the lowest health, dealing damage and reducing armor.
lore: Ride the lightning.
scepter: Causes Eye of the Storm to strike two different units instead of one and can damage structures. When striking buildings, it will only target towers, barracks, and the Ancient.

name: Dynamo
description_raw: Razor gains %spell_amp_mult%%% spell amplification for every %spell_amp_damage_divisor% points of attack damage.

name: Smoke Screen
description_raw: Throws down a smoke bomb, silencing enemies and causing them to miss attacks.
lore: Since his escape during the night of his betrayal, Riki has valued the use of a simple smoke screen to confuse his opponents.
shard: Enemies caught in the smoke screen have their armor reduced by %armor_reduction% and cannot be targeted by their allies.

name: Blink Strike
description_raw: Teleports behind the target unit, momentarily slowing them by %slow_pct_tooltip%%% and attacking them with bonus damage if it is an enemy.
lore: The Stealth Assassin's agile movement makes him impossible to escape.

name: Cloak and Dagger
description_raw: Riki fades into the shadows, becoming invisible until he attacks. Hero kills and assists grant additional experience.
lore: Riki comes for you.

name: Backstab
description_raw: Every time Riki strikes his enemy from behind, he deals additional bonus damage equal to a multiple of his Agility.

name: Tricks of the Trade
description_raw: CHANNELED - Riki phases out of the world and periodically strikes %interval_targets% random enemy units from behind in an area around him. He has fixed attack damage while phased out.
lore: The Stealth Assassin is not afraid to fight dirty, and specializes in attacking his opponents from behind.
scepter: Increases Cast Range to %AbilityCastRange%. Allows you to target an allied unit, hiding inside them for the duration. While hiding in an allied unit, they have %scepter_movespeed%%% bonus movement speed, and Tricks of the Trade lasts %scepter_bonus_duration%s longer and does an additional %scepter_bonus_attacks% attacks.

name: Spotlight
description_raw: Ringmaster shines %spotlight_count% spotlights that sweep over an area. Enemies in the light have a chance to miss their attacks and are revealed if invisible. Illusions hit by the beam fade away, losing a percentage of their maximum health each second. These effects linger for %linger_duration% seconds after leaving the light.
lore: Are you ready for your fifteen seconds? The limelight draws no distinction between infamy and fame.

name: Tame the Beasts
description_raw: CHANNELED - Ringmaster twirls his whip for up to %abilitychanneltime% second then cracks it. Whipped enemies are damaged and flee in fear from Ringmaster. Channel time exponentially increases damage and extends the fear duration, but reduces the radius.
lore: From unhappy crowds to unruly acts, nothing persuades a pack of animals quite like the crack of the Ringmaster's whip.

name: Crack
description_raw: *CRACK*

name: Escape Act
description_raw: Ringmaster packs himself or an allied hero into a mobile, extradimensional box. Boxed units gain phased movement, slow resistance, bonus magic resistance, and bonus movement speed. They are also untargetable, muted, silenced, and disarmed. The box will pop open after the effect expires or it moves out of the initial area.
lore: An adept assistant has nothing to fear within the confines of The Box. An amateur has...much darker prospects indeed.
scepter: Escape Act has %max_charges% charges. When the box pops open, Impalement Art daggers are thrown in all directions, and all enemies around it take damage.

name: Wheel of Wonder
description_raw:
Ringmaster rolls the Wheel of Wonder to the targeted location, knocking aside enemies along the way. After it reaches its target, enemies in range of the wheel take damage over time and are slowed by %aura_slow%%%.

Enemy heroes who face the wheel for more than %face_duration% seconds are mesmerized and drawn towards it. The first enemy to be mesmerized triggers a timer for the wheel to explode. If the timer is not triggered, it will automatically explode after %trap_duration% seconds.
lore: No, brave friends, illusions are for charlatans and card sharks. What you witness today is the power of true magic. But only if you dare set your gaze upon...the mesmerizing wheel.

name: Impalement Arts
description_raw: Ringmaster throws one of his daggers to a precise point of his choosing. If he strikes an enemy, the dagger deals impact damage, briefly slows the unit hit, and causes them to bleed. The bleeding deals a percentage of the victim's maximum health in damage every second to heroes and flat damage per second to creeps.
lore: Passed down through generations, it simply wouldn't be a Kettle Circus without the Great Cogliostro's signature trick.

name: Souvenir Slot
description_raw: Gather souvenirs from kills and assists.

name: Dark Carnival Barker
description_raw:
Ringmaster receives a random single-use Dark Carnival Souvenir whenever an enemy hero dies within %souvenir_collection_range% units of him. Additional Souvenirs are held as charges.

If Ringmaster does not have a Souvenir when he dies he will be granted one.

name: Funhouse Mirror
description_raw:
Use: Proportion Distortion

Creates %images_count% imperfect image of your hero that lasts %illusion_duration% seconds. Your illusion deals %tooltip_damage_outgoing_ranged%%% and takes %tooltip_damage_incoming_total_pct%%% damage.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NO_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_SILENCE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_AFFECTED_BY_MUTE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IS_FAKE_ITEM | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_DONT_RESUME_ATTACK | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_SHOW_IN_GUIDES

name: Whoopee Cushion
description_raw:
Use: Whoopsie

Propels your hero forward %leap_distance% units. Leaves a %fart_cloud_radius% radius stink cloud behind for %fart_cloud_duration% seconds that slows enemies by %fart_cloud_slow%%%.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NO_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_SILENCE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_AFFECTED_BY_MUTE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IS_FAKE_ITEM | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_ROOT_DISABLES | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_SHOW_IN_GUIDES

name: Strongman Tonic
description_raw:
Use: Forcefully Imbibe

Temporarily increases an allied hero's Strength by %strength_bonus_base% plus %strength_bonus_per_level% per Ringmaster's level for %duration% seconds. The effect holds for %effect_strength_max_duration% seconds and then deteriorates over the duration.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_UNIT_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_SILENCE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_AFFECTED_BY_MUTE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IS_FAKE_ITEM | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_SHOW_IN_GUIDES

name: Unicycle
description_raw:
Use: Saddle Up

Summons a speedy unicycle to ride around on for %mount_duration% seconds. %damage_grace_period%s after mounting the unicycle, taking damage from enemy hero sources greater than %damage_threshold% dismounts the rider. Crashing into trees destroys them and slows the unicycle. Attacking, using channeled abilities, or crashing into units and other obstacles also dismounts the rider.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NO_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_SILENCE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_AFFECTED_BY_MUTE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IS_FAKE_ITEM | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_ROOT_DISABLES | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_SHOW_IN_GUIDES

name: Weighted Pie
description_raw:
Use: Toss Pie

Knocks enemies back, slows them by %max_slow_pct%%% and reduces their vision to %vision_radius% recovering over %blind_duration% seconds, and prevents them from receiving vision from their allies for the duration. Instantly kills any non-ancient creep.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_UNIT_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_SILENCE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_AFFECTED_BY_MUTE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IS_FAKE_ITEM | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_SHOW_IN_GUIDES

name: Crystal Ball
description_raw:
Use: Clairvoyance

Scans a targeted %radius% area with global range for %duration% seconds. Indicates whether there are enemy heroes in that area for the duration. Reveals invisible units and wards in the scanned area, but does not provide vision. The reveal effect lingers for %truesight_linger_duration% second.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_POINT | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_AOE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_SILENCE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_AFFECTED_BY_MUTE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IS_FAKE_ITEM | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_SHOW_IN_GUIDES

name: Escape Act Grants Strong Dispel and Flying
+{s:bonus_mesmerize_radius} Wheel of Wonder Radius and Range
Debuff Immunity While Channeling Tame the Beasts
description_raw: Also grants {s:bonus_magic_resist}% magic resistance.

name: +{s:bonus_bleed_duration}s Impalement Arts Bleed and Slow Duration
Telekinesis
description_raw: Rubick uses his telekinetic powers to lift the enemy into the air briefly and then hurls them back at the ground. The unit lands on the ground with such force that it stuns nearby enemies.
lore: Even the Grandest Magus may use his powers for enjoyment.
shard: Allows you to target yourself or allies with Telekinesis. Throw distance is increased to %max_land_distance% and throw delay is reduced to %shard_teammate_throw_delay% seconds.

name: Telekinesis Land
description_raw: Chooses the location the target will land when Telekinesis finishes.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_POINT | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IMMEDIATE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_AOE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_DONT_CANCEL_CHANNEL | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_DONT_CANCEL_MOVEMENT | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_CHANNEL

name: Telekinesis Land
description_raw: Chooses the location you will land when Telekinesis finishes.

name: Fade Bolt
description_raw: Rubick creates a powerful stream of arcane energy that travels between enemy units, dealing damage and reducing their attack and spell damage. Each jump deals less damage.
lore: Rubick's favorite spell for dispatching would-be assassins is a rather simple conjuration.

name: Arcane Supremacy
description_raw: Rubick's mastery of the arcane allows him to have a larger cast range and bonus spell amplification.
lore: Not every magus can be a Grand Magus...

name: Might and Magus
description_raw: Rubick gains stacking bonus area of effect when he casts a spell.

name: Curiosity
description_raw:
Rubick gains %curiosity_per_level% stack of Curiosity per level that grants him %curiosity_attack_damage% base damage, %curiosity_modifier_amp%%% Buff/Debuff Duration, and %curiosity_aoe_bonus% AOE Bonus.

If Rubick sees an enemy Hero cast an ability within %charge_radius% distance of him, he gains %curiosity_per_spell_cast% Curiosity for %curiosity_duration% seconds. If an enemy Hero dies while Rubick has Curiosity from them and he damaged them in the last %grace_period% seconds, he gains %curiosity_per_kill% Curiosity permanently.

name: Spell Steal
description_raw: Rubick studies the trace magical essence of one enemy hero, learning the secrets of the last spell the hero cast. Rubick can use this spell as his own for several minutes or until he dies.
lore: ...but even their lesser magics can be a source of much utility.
scepter: Increases the number of spells that can be stolen to 2. Increases cast range, and upgrades stolen spells to their Scepter version.
shard: Upgrades stolen spells to their Shard version.

name: Stolen Spell
description_raw: Spells acquired with Spell Steal will replace this slot.

name: Stolen Spell
description_raw: Spells acquired with Spell Steal will replace this slot.

name: Burrowstrike
description_raw:
Sand King burrows into the ground and tunnels forward, damaging and stunning enemy units above him as he resurfaces. Adds Caustic Finale poison to heroes hit

Can be put on alt-cast to immediately cast in the desired direction, without walking towards the targeted location.
lore: Crixalis often lies in wait, burrowing under the surface to ambush his adversaries.

name: Sand Storm
description_raw: Sand King creates a fearsome sandstorm that damages enemy units and grants Sand King Invisibility while he is in it. The effect ends when Sand King leaves the area.
lore: Some say Crixalis is a mirage; his carapace appearing then vanishing between the whirling sands of the Scintillant Waste.

name: Caustic Finale
description_raw: Sand King's attacks inject a venom that causes enemy units to violently explode when they die that does a flat amount of damage and an additional amount based on the dying units max health.
lore: An injection from Crixalis makes one brittle and as dry as the arid wastes, subject to implosive demise.

name: Epicenter
description_raw: After a cast point of %abilitycastpoint% seconds, Sand King sends a disturbance into the earth, causing it to shudder violently. All enemies caught within range will take damage and become slowed. Each subsequent pulse increases the radius of damage dealt.
lore: Many an explorer was lost to the quicksands of the Scintillant Waste.
scepter: When the pulses start, %scepter_explosions_per_pulse% Stinger attack areas are created every %spine_tick_rate%s at random locations, each measuring %scepter_explosion_radius_pct%%% of the Epicenter's current radius, that apply %spine_damage_pct%%% of Stinger damage to enemies hit. Shard pulses cause %shard_explosions_per_pulse% attack(s).
shard: Increases Epicenter damage per pulse. Every %shard_interval%s causes a small single Epicenter Pulse around Sand King.

name: Stinger
description_raw: Sand King strikes an area, performing an attack on all enemies in the area of effect, dealing extra damage to each. Enemies within an innermost radius of %inner_radius% take %inner_radius_bonus_damage_pct%%% extra damage. Applies Caustic Finale and a slow to all enemies hit.
lore: Crixalis is certainly capable of mercy, but the soul of the sand finds few foes worth sparing.
shard: A Caustic Finale explosion that deals %caustic_damage_pct%%% damage is created around every enemy hero hit in Stinger's innermost radius. Does not apply to strikes created by Aghanim's Scepter upgrade.

name: Disruption
description_raw: Banishes the targeted unit from the battlefield for a short duration.  Upon returning, two illusions of the banished unit with bonus base damage are created under Shadow Demon's control.
lore: The pain of deception comes not while it happens, but when it is revealed.

name: Soul Catcher
description_raw:
Shadow Demon and his illusions' attacks reduce the current health of the target by %health_lost%%% per stack. When the effect expires, the target regains %health_regain_pct%%% of the lost health.

If an enemy Hero dies under this effect, Shadow Demon creates an illusion of them that lasts until the Hero respawns or Shadow Demon dies.

name: Shadow Poison
description_raw: Deals damage in a line, and afflicts enemy units with a poison effect. The poison deals 1/2/4/8/16 times the stack damage based on the number of stacks on the target, up to %max_multiply_stacks% stacks. Additional stacks cause %bonus_stack_damage% damage each.  This deferred damage is dealt when Shadow Poison's duration is expired, or the Release sub-ability is used.
lore: The ever growing influence of the Shadow Demon can pollute the most valiant and pure of heroes.

name: Shadow Poison Release
description_raw: Releases the poison to do damage on all affected enemies. Units under the effect of Disruption can still be affected by Shadow Poison.

name: Demonic Purge
description_raw: Purges the target enemy unit, removing positive buffs, and slowing the target for the duration.  The unit slowly regains its speed until the end of the duration, upon which damage is dealt.  Units under the effect of Disruption can still be affected by Demonic Purge.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
lore: Once Shadow Demon no longer has any need for his collected cultist, he releases it from its subservience - and its life.
scepter: Causes Demonic Purge to break and gain %max_charges% charges.

name: Demonic Cleanse
description_raw:
Cleanses the target allied unit, removing negative buffs for the duration. At the end of the duration, the unit is healed. Units under the effect of Disruption can still be affected by Demonic Cleanse.

DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
lore: The only one permitted to harm his more useful followers is Shadow Demon himself.

name: Disseminate
description_raw: Whenever the target takes damage, all enemies, including the target itself if it is an enemy, within %radius% range of the target also receive a portion of that damage. Can target enemy and allied units. Effect is paused if the target is hidden by Disruption.
lore: Friends and families share in the suffering when Shadow Demon finds a new victim.

name: Menace
description_raw: Shadow Demon's Attacks apply a stacking debuff to the enemy for %duration% seconds that increases their damage taken.

name: Ether Shock
description_raw: Creates a cone of ethereal energy that strikes multiple enemy units.
lore: Originally used to open shows with the travelling con-man, Rhasta's lightning display shocks adversaries in more ways than one.

name: Hex
description_raw: Transforms an enemy unit into a harmless creature, disabling their attacks and abilities.
lore: Rhasta often ended performances by turning himself into a chicken - now, the humiliation is shared.

name: Shackles
description_raw: CHANNELED - Magically binds an enemy unit so that it cannot move or attack, absorbing their life energy over time.
lore: A self-defense incantation, Rhasta developed shackles after his master was slain in the Bleeding Hills.
scepter: Increase cast range. Every %scepter_shock_interval% seconds, shackled units emit a radial Ether Shock hitting all other units within %scepter_shock_radius% of the target for %scepter_shock_pct%%% of Ether Shock's normal damage. Shackles can now also be cast on allies and Mass Serpent Wards that stay within %ally_break_range% units of Shadow Shaman. Allied units are not disabled by Shackle.

name: Mass Serpent Ward
description_raw: Summons %ward_count% Serpent Wards to attack enemy units and structures. The Wards are immune to magic. Creeps deal half damage to the Serpent Ward.
lore: Snake charming was a big part of the Shadow Shaman's act; now Rhasta can empower the snakes to do his bidding.
shard: Allows to create a Mega Ward using the Urnaconda ability.

name: Fowl Play
description_raw: When taking lethal damage, Shadow Shaman receives a strong dispel and survives as a 1 HP chicken with increased movement speed. Incoming damage is reduced to zero for a short duration and additional chickens are created to confuse the enemy. Cooldown resets when Shadow Shaman respawns.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel
lore: Rhasta had to learn early on how to stay one step ahead of those who (rightfully or wrongfully) wished him harm.
shard: Increases the amount of time incoming damage is reduced to %damage_reduction_duration% seconds. When Fowl Play is triggered, Shadow Shaman becomes invulnerable for %invuln_duration% seconds. %chicken_illusions% additional uncontrollable chickens are created that last for %ally_voodoo_duration% seconds. While Shadow Shaman is transformed, he can now use items.

name: Chicken Fingers
description_raw: Your next attack on an enemy hero transforms them into a chicken for %voodoo_duration%s.
lore: Even a brief moment as a chicken is long enough to make most would-be aggressors rethink their mark.

name: Urnaconda
description_raw: Throw a snake jar at the target location, damaging all enemies in the AoE and creating a Massive Serpent Ward that has %megaward_multiplier_tooltip%x the base Serpent Ward damage and health there that lasts %ward_duration%s.

name: Flamethrower
description_raw: Releases a flame in the direction Timbersaw is facing. Applies a debuff that deals damage per second and slows enemy movement speed. Affects buildings for reduced damage.
lore: A single saw can only cut so much. A single spark can burn forever.

name: Whirling Death
description_raw: Timbersaw whirls extremely sharp edges, damaging enemies and destroying trees around him in an area. If an enemy hero is affected, it loses some of its primary attribute for a short duration. Whirling Death will deal bonus damage per tree destroyed.
lore: In the case that Rizzrack gets surrounded by the vines and plants of his nightmares, he has an immediate chainsaw defense.

name: Timber Chain
description_raw: Timbersaw fires a chain that embeds itself in the first tree it hits, pulling him towards it.  Any enemy in the path takes damage.
lore: You never know when you might need to escape from malevolent saplings.

name: Reactive Armor
description_raw: Each time Timbersaw is attacked, he gains increased health regen and armor. Hero attacks are counted as %stacks_per_hero_attack%x the amount.
lore: The saw-suit is equipped to react to the slightest touch with fortified defenses.
scepter: Reactive Armor can now be activated to get max stacks and %initial_shield% damage barrier. Grants Timbersaw %shield_per_sec% + %shield_per_sec_per_enemy% barrier amount per second for each enemy hero within %radius% radius of Timbersaw up to a maximum of %max_shield%. After %duration% seconds, Timbersaw deals damage to every hero within %explosion_radius% radius equal to %base_explosion% + his remaining barrier amount and loses all of his barrier.

name: Chakram
description_raw: Fires Timbersaw's main saw blade at the target location where it will spin in place, dealing damage in an area around it.  Enemies caught in the saw blade will move more slowly for every %slow_health_percentage%%% of health missing. The blade deals damage and cuts down trees in its path when fired and retracted.  While active the ability costs mana, and Timbersaw loses the ability to attack.
lore: The ultimate in anti-flora weaponry.

name: Return Chakram
description_raw: Returns the Chakram to Timbersaw.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NO_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IMMEDIATE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_CHANNEL | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_DONT_RESUME_ATTACK | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_BACKSWING

DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NO_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IMMEDIATE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_CHANNEL | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_DONT_RESUME_ATTACK | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_BACKSWING

name: Twisted Chakram
description_raw: Launches a second independent Chakram that follows a curved path and returns to Timbersaw, damaging and slowing enemies it passes through. Enemies caught in the saw blade will move more slowly for every %slow_health_percentage%%% of health missing.
lore: A happy little accident in the lab turned wild new weapon in the forest.

name: Exposure Therapy
description_raw: Whenever Timbersaw destroys a tree, he gains mana.

name: Arcane Curse
description_raw:
Curses the target area, dealing damage and causing enemies to take damage over time and slowing their movement speed.

Anytime affected enemies cast a spell, the duration is increased. The duration is paused as long as the target is silenced.
lore: Nortrom's lack of incantations is less of a problem for him than it is for his adversaries.

name: Glaives of Wisdom
description_raw: Silencer enchants his glaives with his wisdom, stealing his target's Intelligence with each hit and dealing additional damage based on his Intelligence.
lore: Although lacking in traditional incantations, Nortrom's pedigree of the Aeol Drias gives him uncanny wisdom, which he applies to physical combat.
shard: Causes Glaives of Wisdom to bounce %bounce_count% time to a random enemy within %bounce_range% range and increases intelligence steal.

name: Last Word
description_raw: Enchants a target, providing vision of them and causing them to be damaged and silenced if they cast a spell or if the enchantment timer expires. Deals extra damage based on the difference in intelligence between Silencer and the target.
lore: Nortrom ensures that spells uttered by his opponents will be their last.

name: Global Silence
description_raw: Silencer stops all sound, preventing enemy heroes and units on the map from casting spells.
lore: With a shock to the ground, all magic and sound pauses, and Nortrom fulfills his prophecy.
scepter: Global Silence applies Arcane Curse to heroes for the duration of Global Silence.

name: Suffer In Silence
description_raw:
Silencer takes less damage from and deals more damage to silenced targets.

If an enemy Hero dies within %permanent_int_steal_range% range of Silencer or was debuffed by Silencer at the time of death, Silencer permanently steals %permanent_int_steal_amount% Intelligence from them. If the victim was silenced, steal an extra %silenced_bonus_int_steal_amount% Intelligence.
shard: Increases the Intelligence stolen per kill.

name: Suffer In Silence
description_raw: Silencer takes less damage from and deals more damage to silenced targets.

name: Wraithfire Blast
description_raw: Wraith King sears an enemy unit with spectral fire, dealing damage and stunning, then dealing damage over time and slowing the target.
lore: Ostarion calls on his damned lineage, laying waste to his opponents.

name: Bone Guard
description_raw: Gains a Charge for every 2 creeps killed and 2 charges per hero killed. Activate to spend all charges, summoning skeletons that respawn once when killed. Skeletons benefit from Vampiric Spirit's lifesteal.
lore: Wraith King's blade drains his enemy's essence to feed his aura.

name: Spectral Blade
description_raw: Curses units that Wraith King attacks, dealing a flat amount of damage and a percentage of the attack damage again after a delay. Vampiric Spirit's lifesteal applies to the curse damage and a unit cannot be cursed again for a short period of time.
lore: The eternal spite of every soul stolen by Ostarion bleeds into reality with each strike of his murderous blade.

name: Mortal Strike
description_raw: Wraith King passively deals bonus damage on an attack with a cooldown.
lore: One blow to crush a foe.
shard: Mortal Strike hits curse their target, causing them to take %curse_damage_pct%%% of the initial attack damage again as <font color="#d8ae53">Pure</font> damage after a %curse_delay% second delay. Vampiric Spirit's lifesteal applies to the curse damage.

name: Reincarnation
description_raw: Wraith King's form regroups after death, allowing him to resurrect when killed in battle.  Upon death, enemy units in a %slow_radius% radius are slowed. Skeletons spawn and attack each nearby enemy hero. Can be self-cast to kill Wraith King instantly.
lore: Conspirators against the Wraith King wonder why he never stays dead.
scepter: Reduces cooldown.

name: Vampiric Spirit
description_raw: Grants Wraith King Lifesteal. When slain Wraith King turns into a free pathing Wraith with Bonus Attack and Movement Speed for a short duration, delaying his death. Wraith King cannot reincarnate after being a Wraith.
scepter: Turns Vampiric Spirit into an aura, allowing allied heroes to turn into wraiths when slain. Extends wraith duration.

name: Arcane Bolt
description_raw: Skywrath Mage launches a slow-moving bolt of arcane magic, dealing damage to an enemy unit based on Skywrath Mage's intelligence.
lore: Within the Ghastly Eyrie's endless intrigue, only the clever and calm can hope to survive.
shard: When Skywrath Mage casts Arcane Bolt, %total_bolt_count% bolts are created, one aimed at the original target, and two others aimed at random enemies within %extra_bolt_search_radius% range of the original target. Heroes will take priority.

name: Concussive Shot
description_raw: Skywrath Mage sets off a long range shot that hits the closest hero within a long range.  Upon impact, it deals damage and slows in an area of effect.
lore: Those who serve the court of the Ghastly Eyrie are ever locked in covert war. One must always know where danger lurks nearest.
scepter: When Skywrath Mage casts Concussive Shot, a different random target within %scepter_radius% range of the original target will be hit with the same ability. Heroes will take priority.

name: Ancient Seal
description_raw: Skywrath Mage seals the targeted unit with an ancient rune, silencing it and causing it to take additional damage from spells.
lore: A holy incantation, whosoever finds themselves touched by Avilliva's sigil must suffer in penitent silence.
scepter: Anytime Skywrath Mage casts Ancient Seal, a different random target within %scepter_radius% range of the original target will be affected by the same ability. Heroes will take priority.

name: Mystic Flare
description_raw: Skywrath Mage uses his ultimate magical ability to conjure a precise and violent mystical field that lays waste to his adversaries. Deals massive damage distributed evenly among any Heroes in the area over %duration% seconds.
lore: Only the most practiced of Skywrath sorcerers could hope to shape the skies into such a storm.
scepter: When Skywrath Mage casts Mystic Flare, another Mystic Flare will be created on the position of a different random target enemy within %scepter_radius% range of the original target. Heroes will take priority.

name: Shield of the Scion
description_raw: Every time Skywrath Mage deals magical damage to an enemy hero with his abilities, he gains a small magic damage barrier. Each buff stacks independently.
lore: The court mages of Skywrath may only deploy their magic in defense of the kingdom and the throne.

name: Staff of the Scion
description_raw: Every time Skywrath Mage deals magic damage to an enemy hero with an ability, he reduces all his ability cooldowns by %cooldown_reduction%s.
lore: To raise the ire of Skywrath is to invite retribution that strikes like a storm.

name: Ruin and Restoration
description_raw: Skywrath Mage has %spell_lifesteal%%% Spell Lifesteal.

name: Seaborn Sentinel
description_raw: Slardar gains bonus movement speed, health regeneration, attack damage, and armor while in a puddle, trail, or river.
scepter: Provides additional HP Regen, Armor and Status Resistance while in a puddle, trail, or river. Increases puddle/trail radius by %scepter_puddle_radius_tooltip%%% and puddle/trail duration by %scepter_puddle_duration_increase_tooltip%s.

name: Guardian Sprint
description_raw: Slardar slithers ahead, moving significantly faster and passing through units. Slardar has %slow_resistance_tooltip%%% slow resistance for the first %speed_burst_max_duration%s. The slow resistance gradually fades over the remaining sprint duration.
lore: As Slardar has made the transition from the Deeps, it has been necessary to use his powerful tail for sprinting instead of swimming.

name: Slithereen Crush
description_raw: Slams the ground, leaving a puddle of water, and stunning and damaging nearby enemy units.  After the stun, the affected units are slowed.
lore: A swift crush of might and water breaks even the toughest of defenses.
scepter: Increases Slithereen Crush puddle radius and duration.
shard: Slithereen Crush now applies Corrosive Haze for a short time to units affected.

name: Bash of the Deep
description_raw: After %attack_count% attacks, your next attack will bash the target.
lore: Thieves of the wealth of the Deep Ones meet the brutality of the Slithereen Guard in melee combat.

name: Corrosive Haze
description_raw: Reduces enemy armor to amplify physical damage and provides True Sight and vision of the targeted unit, revealing invisibility. The enemy unit leaves a trail of water behind it.
lore: Even the strongest armor counts for little when left to the brine of the sea.

name: Depth Shroud
description_raw: Creates a cloud at the target location. All allies inside the radius are hidden and affected by Shadow Dance.
lore: Nothing worse than a job going bad thanks to some clompy-footed friend.

name: Dark Pact
description_raw: After a short delay, Slark sacrifices some of his life blood, purging most negative debuffs and dealing damage to enemy units around him and to himself.  Slark only takes %self_damage_pct%%% of the damage.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel
lore: Slithereen are capable of quickly regrowing appendages, in case of critical injury, to save their own lives.

name: Pounce
description_raw: Slark leaps forward, leashing and applying Essence Shift stacks to the first hero he connects. That unit can only move a limited distance away from Slark's landing position.
lore: Time in the Dark Reef made Slark a dangerous assassin; aggressive and fearless.
scepter: Provides charges and increases range.

name: Essence Shift
description_raw: Slark steals the life essence of enemy heroes with his attacks, draining %stat_loss% of each of their attributes and converting them to bonus %agi_gain% Agility. If Slark kills an affected enemy hero, he permanently steals %stat_loss% Agility.
lore: With each strike at his adversaries, Slark's knowledge of their weaknesses improves.

name: Shadow Dance
description_raw:
When not visible to the enemy team, Slark passively gains bonus movement speed and health regeneration. If Slark is damaged by a neutral unit, the passive movement and health regeneration bonuses are lost for %neutral_disable% seconds.

When activated, Slark hides himself in a cloud of shadows, becoming immune to detection. Attacking, casting spells, and using items will not reveal Slark, but enemies can see the cloud itself.
lore: The hidden Thirteenth is a slippery foe.

name: Saltwater Shiv
description_raw:
Slark slices the target with his salty shiv, stealing a portion of the target's movement speed, Health Regen and Health Restoration.

These effects stack independently.

name: Scatterblast
description_raw: Snapfire unloads with a wide blast that damages and slows enemies in a cone. Damage is increased by %point_blank_dmg_bonus_pct%%% and Movement Slow, Attack Slow and Slow Duration are increased by %point_blank_debuff_duration_pct%%% for enemies caught at point-blank range.
lore: A favorite from her collection, Beadie crafted Ol' Rackatee as her first line of defense when she ventured into the Outlands.

name: Mortimer Kisses
description_raw: Snapfire's friend launches a barrage of firespit globs over %duration_tooltip% seconds. Globs cause impact damage and create pools of firespit, which slow and apply damage over time. Snapfire has a reduced turn rate for the duration and a minimum launch range of %min_range%. Each glob can be targeted with a right click.
lore: Little did Beadie know when she adopted Mortimer, dragon toads--which aren't even toads at all--share more than just a name with their distant draconic cousins.

name: Gobble Up
description_raw: Mortimer gobbles up a creep or an allied hero, which he can then spit towards enemies. The unit stays in his belly up to %max_time_in_belly% seconds.
lore: SHLORP!

name: Spit Out
description_raw: Mortimer spits out the unit that's in his mouth, causing impact damage and stun in a large area. The glob leaves a pool of firespit based on the current level of Mortimer Kisses, that slows and applies damage over time. Spit Out has a no minimum launch range.
lore: SPITTOOO!

name: Firesnap Cookie
description_raw: Snapfire feeds a potent cookie to Mortimer or an ally, causing them to hop a short distance. The hopping unit stuns and damages enemies in the landing zone.
lore: With the help of a secret mixture that pairs Beadie's baking skills with her passion for black powder, these battle biscuits pack a punch.
shard: Firesnap cookies become even more potent, healing the target and launching a Mortimer Kiss that does %shard_damage_multiplier_tooltip%%% impact damage to the landing destination.

name: Buckshot
description_raw: When attacking enemy heroes, Snapfire deals %damage_amp%%% more damage with her auto attacks, but has a %miss_chance%%% chance of a glancing shot, dealing %glancing_shot_damage_pct%%% damage.

name: Lil' Shredder
description_raw: Snapfire heats up her mounted turret to rapidly fire %buffed_attacks% attacks dealing fixed damage plus a percentage of her attack damage. Each attack reduces the enemy's armor. Provides bonus attack range for the duration.
lore: Beadie constantly tinkers with a design she first dreamed up plotting an exodus from her old gang.

name: Boomstick
description_raw: Snapfire deals more damage to nearby enemies.

name: Concussive Grenade
description_raw: Launches a grenade at the target area, dealing damage to enemies and knocking them and Sniper back. Enemies affected are disarmed and have their movement slowed after the knockback.
lore: ATTN: IN CASE OF DANGER PULL PIN
shard: Reduces cooldown, increases damage, and allows the knockback to affect Sniper as well.

name: Shrapnel
description_raw: Consumes a charge to launch a ball of shrapnel that showers the target area in explosive pellets. Enemies are subject to damage and slowed movement. Reveals the targeted area. Shrapnel charges restore every %abilitychargerestoretime% seconds.
lore: Kardel's modular rifle also fires incendiary rounds, useful for assaulting entrenched locations.

name: Headshot
description_raw: Sniper increases his accuracy, giving him a chance to deal %damage% extra damage and knock back his enemies. Knockback distance increases based on how close the enemy is to Sniper. Headshots briefly slow enemy movement and attack speed by %slow%%%.
lore: Taking potshots at steepstalkers in his childhood has been thoroughly refined into perfect leads on enemy combatants.

name: Take Aim
description_raw: Passively increases Sniper's attack range by %passive_attack_range_bonus%.\n\nOn cast, Sniper gains increased vision, Headshot chance, and attack range. Slows you by %slow%%% for the duration and restricts your vision to a frontal cone.
lore: Kardel always takes it upon himself to stay as far from harm as he can while still performing his role - taking perfect aim.

name: Stop Take Aim
description_raw: Stop Take Aim

name: Assassinate
description_raw: Sniper locks onto a target enemy unit and, after a short aiming duration, fires a devastating shot that deals Sniper's attack damage plus bonus damage at long range and mini-stuns the target. Whenever Sniper kills an enemy hero, Assassinate is refreshed.
lore: In order to fulfill the prophecy and return to his home town, Kardel must make another shot as perfect as the one on the day of his ancient test.
scepter: Causes Assassinate to fire quicker and stun the enemy target.

name: Keen Scope
description_raw: Sniper’s attacks deal bonus damage for every %bonus_damage_distance% units of distance Sniper is from the target.

name: Spectral Dagger
description_raw: Spectre flings a dagger to draw a Shadow Path, dealing damage and slowing the movement speed of any enemies along the trail. Units hit by the dagger also trail a Shadow Path. While treading the path, Spectre moves faster and phases through otherwise impassable terrain.
lore: Mercurial's dagger eclipses the physical plane in shadow, a state in which mortals cower, but spectres thrive.

name: Desolate
description_raw: Spectre and her illusions deal bonus Pure damage if attacking an enemy that does not have any allied units within a %radius% radius around them.
lore: Often times, warriors find themselves alone with a vision of Mercurial - the fated question is if it is the true Spectre.

name: Dispersion
description_raw: Spectre disperses part of the damage dealt to her, reflecting it to all nearby enemies. The effect lessens with distance.
lore: A daunting task lies before enemies of Mercurial - killing a shadow with blade and magic.
shard: Dispersion can be activated to increase the amount absorbed and reflected by Dispersion by %activation_bonus_pct%%% of its base values for %activation_duration%s. Cooldown %activation_cooldown%. Manacost %activation_manacost%.

name: Haunt
description_raw:
Creates a spectral nemesis to haunt all enemy Heroes.

Haunt illusions are uncontrollable, take extra damage, and deal less damage than Spectre herself. They ignore terrain.

The Reality sub-ability may be used to teleport to the illusion, destroying it.
lore: At the height of combat, Mercurial's physical manifestation shatters, and the shadowy pieces haunt those who still cling to life.
scepter:
The first time Spectre uses Reality on a Haunt illusion, enemies in a %fear_aoe% area around the target are Feared away from Spectre for %fear_duration%s and have their movement speed slowed by %fear_movespeed_slow%%%.

Reduces cooldown by %scepter_cooldown_reduction_tooltip%s.

name: Shadow Step
description_raw:
Sends an uncontrollable illusion at a target that follows and attacks the target.

The Reality sub-ability may be used to teleport to the illusion, destroying it.
lore: With great focus of will, Mercurial can sometimes limit the extent of her division.

name: Reality
description_raw: Spectre assumes the target Shadow Step or Haunt illusion, destroying it.
lore: The scattered shadows unite into the one true Spectre.
shard: Reality also casts Spectral Dagger on the illusion's target.

name: Spectral
description_raw:
When targeting a unit for attack, Spectre gains phased collision. If she moves through a unit, she gains %speed_bonus% movement speed. This effect lingers for %linger_time%s.

Spectre's illusions always have phased collision, and cannot gain the speed bonus.

name: Charge of Darkness
description_raw:
Spirit Breaker fixes his sight on an enemy unit and starts charging through all objects, starting at %min_movespeed_bonus_pct%%% of the bonus speed and reaching his max speed after %windup_time%s.

All enemy units passed through and the targeted unit will be hit by a Greater Bash. If the targeted unit dies, Spirit Breaker will change his target to the nearest enemy unit to that location.
lore: Barathrum erupts from the darkness with unwieldy force.
shard: Increases Charge of Darkness Bonus Speed by %bonus_movement_speed%.

name: Bulldoze
description_raw: Spirit Breaker gains movement speed and status resistance to ram through enemies. Can be used while charging.
lore: Barathrum warps the fabric of reality around him, lessening its influence on his physical form.

name: Greater Bash
description_raw: Gives a chance to stun and knockback an enemy unit on an attack. Deals a percentage of movement speed as damage.
lore: The signature strike of Barathrum's ghostly ball and chain.
scepter: Increases knockback. If a knocked-back enemy collides with another enemy, the second enemy is bashed (creeps only receive %cascading_bashes_creep_penalty%%% damage), and the original target takes %cascading_bashes_damage_multiplier%%% of Greater Bash's damage again.

name: Nether Strike
description_raw: Spirit Breaker slips into the nether realm, reappearing next to his hapless victim. Upon reappearing, a Greater Bash of the current level occurs and deals bonus damage. Knocks back for double the normal distance.
lore: Barathrum temporarily returns to the realm from where he came, bringing with him the retribution of both worlds.
scepter: Greatly increases knockback.

name: Planar Pocket
description_raw: Barathrum gains magic resistance and distorts reality around the selected hero, making any unit-targeted spells cast by enemy heroes get redirected towards Spirit Breaker. Can be cast on both allied and enemy heroes, but only spells cast by enemies of Spirit Breaker will be redirected.
lore: Barathrum's unyielding focus forms a pocket of planar convergence from which not even the most powerful arcane energies can escape.

name: Herd Mentality
description_raw: The hero on your team whose level is lower than anybody else's on your team gains %xp_gain_rate%%% more experience.

name: Empowering Haste
description_raw: Spirit Breaker gains bonus Movement Speed for a duration whenever he stuns an enemy. Effects from multiple stuns stack and have independent durations. Duration pauses during Charge of Darkness.

name: Electric Rave
description_raw: Grants Storm Spirit and allied heroes within %radius% AoE of him %charges% Overload charges. Provides 40 Attack Speed. Lasts up to %duration% seconds or until the charges are depleted.

name: Static Remnant
description_raw: Creates an explosively charged image of Storm Spirit that walks to the target position and lasts for %abilityduration% seconds. Will detonate and deal damage if an enemy unit comes near it.
lore: Raijin Thunderkeg's duality allows him to admire himself in shocking fashion.

name: Electric Vortex
description_raw: A vortex that pulls an enemy unit to Storm Spirit's location.
lore: Raijin's thunderous, boisterous energy often draws others into an electrifying situation.
scepter: Electric Vortex affects all enemies within a radius around Storm Spirit.

name: Overload
description_raw: Casting a spell creates an electrical charge, which is released in a burst on Storm's next attack, dealing damage and slowing nearby enemies.
lore: Pow!  Zip!  Zap!
shard: Can be activated to grant Storm Spirit and nearby allied heroes %shard_activation_charges% Overload charges. Provides bonus Attack Speed. Lasts up to %shard_activation_duration% seconds or until the charges are depleted.

name: Ball Lightning
description_raw: Storm Spirit becomes volatile electricity, charging across the battlefield until he depletes his mana or reaches his target. The activation mana cost is %ball_lightning_initial_mana_base%+%ball_lightning_initial_mana_percentage%%% of his total mana pool, and the cost per 100 units traveled is %ball_lightning_travel_cost_base%+%ball_lightning_travel_cost_percent%%% of his total mana pool.  Damage is expressed in damage per 100 units traveled.
lore: The Storm is coming in.

name: Galvanized
description_raw: Storm Spirit gains a charge of %mp_per_kill% mana regeneration per kill, and a charge every %level_divisor% levels. Loses %charges_per_death% charges per death. Additionally every time he gains a charge he also gains %perma_mp_per_kill% Mana Regen permanently.

name: Storm Hammer
description_raw: Sven unleashes his magical gauntlet that deals damage and stuns enemy units in a small area around the target.
lore: The Rogue Knight's iron gauntlet, taken from the school of his father, strikes his foes to their core.
scepter: Increases cast range and applies a basic dispel on the target. Affects invulnerable units. If alt-cast, it deals an additional %scepter_bonus_damage% damage and Sven travels with the Storm Hammer.

name: Great Cleave
description_raw: Sven strikes with great force, cleaving all nearby enemy units with his attack.
lore: The Vigil Knights still seek to reclaim the stolen Outcast Blade from Sven, a weapon capable of cutting wide swaths through lesser warriors.

name: Warcry
description_raw: Sven's Warcry heartens his allied heroes for battle, increasing their armor and movement speed. Lasts %duration% seconds.
lore: Calling a few lines from the Vigil Codex fortifies Sven's obedience to his rogue code. So poetic!
shard: Increases radius and bonus movement speed. Warcry is now undispellable and provides a %base_barrier_amount% physical damage barrier.

name: God's Strength
description_raw: Sven channels his rogue strength, granting bonus damage and slow resistance for %abilityduration% seconds.
lore: With the strength that shattered the Sacred Helm, the Rogue Knight stands unopposed in melee combat.

name: Vanquisher
description_raw: Sven's attacks deal %bonus_damage_pct%%% bonus damage to stunned enemies.

name: Wrath of God
description_raw: Sven gains additional attack damage from Strength.

name: Proximity Mines
description_raw: Plant an invisible mine that cannot be detected by True Sight, but is visible if an enemy is within the active %radius% AoE of the mine. Mines detonate if an enemy is standing within the active AoE for %proximity_threshold% seconds dealing damage and temporarily reducing the enemy's Magic Resistance. The explosion deals full damage if the target is within %min_distance% radius and decreases down to %outer_damage%%% on the edge. Deals %building_damage_pct%%% damage to buildings.
lore: The bane of Toterin!

name: Snare Trap
description_raw: Plant an invisible trap that, when triggered by a player-controlled target, does a small amount of damage over time and slows enemy cast speed. Affected units are also tethered inside of the trap radius. Snare Traps take %activation_time% seconds to activate and last for up to %duration% seconds.

name: Stasis Trap
description_raw: Plant an invisible trap that roots nearby enemy units instantly when triggered.
lore: The scourge of Trapper Town!
scepter: Increases cast range.

name: Blast Off!
description_raw: Techies hurtle themselves into the enemy's midst, detonating charges upon impact which deal massive area of effect damage and stun enemies. Upon landing, the assault deals Techies non-lethal damage equal to a percentage of their current health.
lore: Where we going?

name: Sticky Bomb
description_raw: Lobs a Sticky Bomb towards the target area. If it lands next to an enemy hero, the bomb will stick to it, slowing its movement speed. After a few seconds the bomb will explode, dealing damage in an area around the detonation and applying a secondary slow for %secondary_slow_duration% seconds.
lore: Such revolutionary brilliance was meant to be shared.

name: Reactive Tazer
description_raw:
Techies trigger an electric charge on the target ally, giving them bonus movement speed for a short period of time. Enemies attacking the target take damage and are temporarily disarmed and get a Basic Dispel.

At the end of the effect or if detonated early with the sub-ability, the charge explodes, disarming all enemies within the radius and dealing damage.
lore: A steady bomb hand prefers an abundance of personal space.

name: Detonate Tazer
description_raw: Detonate Reactive Tazer immediately.

name: Remote Mines
description_raw: Plant an invisible explosive that will only detonate after a brief delay when triggered.  Does not damage buildings.
lore: The downfall of Dredger's Bight!
scepter: Increases damage and cast range.

name: Detonate M.A.D.
description_raw: Detonate your planted M.A.D.
lore: Why light one fuse when you can light them all?

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NO_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_AOE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_UNRESTRICTED | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IMMEDIATE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN

name: PINPOINT DETONATE
description_raw: Detonate all selected remote mines.
lore: Kablooey!

name: Minefield Sign
description_raw:
Plant a warning sign, causing Proximity Mines within its radius to be invulnerable and deal %bonus_mine_damage_pct%%% more damage. Only one sign can exist at a time. Lasts %lifetime% seconds.

When an enemy Hero walks within %trigger_radius% units of a minefield sign, the %aura_radius% units area around the sign will become a minefield for %minefield_duration% seconds, dealing damage to enemy Heroes any time they move within its area. Minefield Sign is destroyed after this effect ends.
lore: Watch your step!

name: Squee's Scope
description_raw: Techies gains %attack_range_tooltip% attack range and attack projectile speed for each point of attack speed.

name: Spoon's Stash
description_raw: Techies stack all previously selected Enchantments onto newly crafted Neutral Items.

name: M.A.D.
description_raw:
Techies gain a percentage of their mana pool as bonus mana regeneration.

When Techies die, they leave behind a barrel that explodes after %explosion_delay%s, damaging enemies in an area around it. Damage is based on Techies' max mana.
shard: M.A.D. becomes an active ability. Increases max mana as damage amount. Techies plant an M.A.D. which can be detonated manually with a sub-ability. Only one M.A.D. from the active ability can be placed at a time.

name: Refraction
description_raw: Templar Assassin becomes highly elusive, gaining a small barrier and bonus to her damage.  The damage and avoidance effects are separate, and have a limited number of instances. If a barrier is consumed, a new one is created as long as there are charges left. If an instance of damage would deal more damage than the remaining barrier, all of the damage is absorbed.
lore: Manipulating her psionic veil, Lanaya bends nature's law to her will.
shard: Increases bonus damage. Refraction can be cast while disabled.

name: Meld
description_raw: Templar Assassin conceals herself, becoming invisible as long as she remains still. If Meld's invisibility is broken by attacking an enemy, Lanaya's attack will deal bonus damage to the enemy and reduce their armor for %debuff_duration% seconds. Bonus damage and armor reductions are applied to all enemies in the Psi Blades split range.
lore: Lanaya is as elusive as her covenant with the Hidden Temple.

name: Psi Blades
description_raw: Templar Assassin's psi blades slice through the attacked unit, splitting and damaging enemy units directly behind it, while gaining bonus attack range. For each unit it damages, the split damage is reduced by a percentage.
lore: Her blades pierce the skin as much as the mind, furthering her understanding of the mystery that is reality.

name: Psionic Trap
description_raw: Templar Assassin places mystical traps that invisibly monitor enemy movement. When sprung at her command, they exert a slowing influence of %movement_speed_min%%% in a %trap_radius% radius. Trap movement slow charges up to %movement_speed_max%%% after %trap_max_charge_duration% seconds. Deals damage after %trap_max_charge_duration%s.
lore: Calling upon the reach of the Hidden Temple, none escape the eye of the Templar.
scepter: When activated, traps now silence affected enemies.

name: Third Eye
description_raw: Templar Assassin and her teammates can see Roshan's respawn timer.

name: Hidden Gates
description_raw: Templar Assassin gains access to linked portals at the edges of the map usable only by her.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_INNATE_UI | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_UNIT_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_CHANNELLED | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_DONT_RESUME_ATTACK | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_DONT_CANCEL_CHANNEL |  DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_SILENCE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_ROOT_DISABLES

name: Trap
description_raw:
Springs the trap nearest to Templar Assassin, slowing nearby enemies.

If the ability is in alt-cast state, springs the trap that is closest to the mouse cursor.

name: Psionic Projection
description_raw: CHANNELED - Allows Templar Assassin to teleport to any Psionic Trap after channeling for %abilitychanneltime% seconds, detonating it upon arrival as if it was fully charged and instantly dealing %extra_damage% bonus damage. Channeling Psionic Projection does not break Meld.
lore: In reward for her service, Lanaya has been granted access to secrets that unlock new techniques for her psionic gifts.

name: Trap
description_raw: Springs the trap, slowing nearby enemies.

name: Inner Peace
description_raw: When remaining stationary and not taking damage for %time_until_meditation%s, Templar Assassin begins meditating, gaining health and mana regeneration, reaching the maximum bonus after %time_until_max_bonus%s of meditating.

name: End Meditation
description_raw: Return to your body

name: Reflection
description_raw: Terrorblade brings forth an invulnerable dark reflection of all enemy heroes in a target area. Affected enemy heroes have movement and attack speeds slowed and attacked by their reflection.
lore: In the fractal prison of Foulfell, Terrorblade learned the truth of this old tale: you are your own worst enemy.  Now it is a lesson he teaches others.

name: Conjure Image
description_raw: Creates an illusion of Terrorblade that deals damage.
lore: There's only one thing more dangerous than facing Terrorblade.  Facing MORE Terrorblades!

name: Metamorphosis
description_raw: Terrorblade transforms into a powerful demon with a ranged attack. Any of Terrorblade's illusions that are within %metamorph_aura_tooltip% range will also be transformed by Metamorphosis.
lore: Temper, temper. The rage rises up and takes control.  Meet Terrorblade's own worst self.

name: Terror Wave
description_raw: Causes a wave to travel outwards in all directions forcing enemy heroes to become Feared upon impact and dealing damage, and grants Terrorblade Metamorphosis for a short time.
lore: A shockwave of power strong enough to break the walls of Foulfell itself.

name: Demon Zeal
description_raw: Costs part of Terrorblade's current HP to cast, providing Terrorblade and nearby illusions bonus movement, HP Regen and attack speed. Does not affect Reflection illusions. Can't be cast while in Metamorphosis and Metamorphosis will remove Demon Zeal.
lore: Fear is fueled by confusion when Terrorblade's enemies see that the first cut he makes is one to embolden himself.

name: Sunder
description_raw: Severs the life from both Terrorblade and a target hero, exchanging a percentage of both units' current health. Some health points must remain.
lore: You didn't need that life, did you?  The demon marauder steals that which you hold most dear.

name: Dark Unity
description_raw: Nearby Illusions created by Terrorblade have bonus attack damage.

name: Gush
description_raw: Summons a gush of water to damage an enemy unit, reducing their movement speed and armor.
lore: During his championship of the Sunken Isles, Leviathan gained mastery over the open sea.
scepter: Gush becomes a ground targeted wave ability that affects enemy units in a line.  Decreases cooldown.

name: Kraken Shell
description_raw:
Thickens Tidehunter's hide to passively block a portion of any incoming physical attack damage. Reduced block amount versus creeps. The hide also removes negative status effects if the damage taken crosses a threshold.

Can be activated to double the block amount at the cost of %active_move_speed_penalty_pct%%% movement speed. Lasts %active_duration%s.

DISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel
lore: Claddish navymen tell tales of a mighty sea-faring beast that suffered spear and sword but continued to lay waste to the fleet.

name: Anchor Smash
description_raw: Tidehunter swings his mighty anchor to attack and deal bonus damage to nearby enemies and reduce their attack damage. The radius of Anchor Smash is Tidehunter's attack range plus %additional_range% units.
lore: Stolen from one of Admiral Kunkka's flagships, Leviathan's heavy anchor proves useful as a melee weapon.

name: Ravage
description_raw: Slams the ground, causing tentacles to erupt in all directions, damaging and stunning all nearby enemy units.
lore: Calling to the abyssal god Maelrawn has resulted in entire armadas being lost at sea.

name: Dead in the Water
description_raw: Tidehunter attaches a heavy anchor to an enemy hero. The hero is leashed while attached to the anchor. Attempting to move more than %chain_length% units away from the anchor forces the hero to %max_movement_speed% move speed, dragging the anchor behind them. The anchor can be destroyed with %attacks_to_destroy% hero attacks.
lore: Anchors Aweigh!

name: Leviathan's Catch
description_raw:
Whenever an enemy hero is killed by Tidehunter or dies under his debuffs, a fish appears in their place; Tidehunter can eat the fish to permanently gain %fish_health_bonus% Health, %fish_attack_range% Attack Range, and %fish_damage_block% Bonus Damage Block.

Tidehunter eats a free fish every time he reaches an even hero level.

name: Blubber
description_raw: Tidehunter's hide removes negative status effects if he takes more than %damage_cleanse% damage. Removes most debuffs, even if they are generally not purgable.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel

name: Defense Matrix
description_raw: Targets an allied unit, applying an all damage barrier to them that also provides Status Resistance.
lore: A gifted mind unconstrained by moral or ethical boundaries tends to attract an adversary or two.

name: Keen Conveyance
description_raw: CHANNELED - Teleport to a target friendly structure. Level 2 allows teleporting to friendly units and Level 3 to friendly heroes.
lore: As Boush likes to say, 'There is nothing the arcane can accomplish that the curious mind cannot reproduce given time. And proper funding, of course.'

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_POINT | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_CHANNELLED | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_DONT_RESUME_ATTACK | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_DONT_CANCEL_CHANNEL | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_ROOT_DISABLES | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE

name: Eureka!
description_raw: Tinker gains %one_percent_tooltip%%% item cooldown reduction per %int_per_one_cdr% Intelligence, up to a maximum of %max_cdr%%%.

name: Laser
description_raw: Fires an intense energy beam, damaging and blinding the target. Blinded targets miss all physical attacks.
lore: Boush perfected this rock cutting laser in his subterranean laboratory, never considering its combat utility.
scepter: Upgrades Tinker's Laser into a Shrink Ray, reducing the main target's size, current health, and maximum health by %scepter_reduction_pct%%% (stacking). Does not pierce debuff immunity.

name: March of the Machines
description_raw: Enlists an army of robotic minions to destroy enemy units in an area around Tinker.
lore: Even though the laboratory has since been sealed off, the ability to radio in robotic drones is still in working order.
scepter: March of the Machines applies a non-stacking heal over time when passing through allied heroes.

name: Rearm
description_raw: CHANNELED - Resets the cooldown on Tinker's abilities.
lore: A new battery here, another set of rockets there, Boush continually improves on existing technology.

name: Warp Flare
description_raw:
Throws a flare towards an enemy, dealing damage, teleporting them away, rooting them and reducing their Cast and Attack Range for %debuff_duration% seconds.

The target is teleported further the closer they are to Tinker.
lore: Tinker's deadliest weapon instantly turns an enemy into space dust. Research to resolve the annoying 'perfect copy' side effect... is ongoing.

name: Deploy Turrets
description_raw: Deploys 3 uncontrollable turrets at the target location. Enemies hit by the impact take damage and are pushed away from the landing point. If Tinker is hit, he also gets pushed by the impact. Once deployed, the turret fires missiles in the direction of the nearest enemy hero.
scepter: Turrets fire missiles %missile_attack_rate_tooltip%%% faster.

name: Avalanche
description_raw: Bombards an area with rocks, continously doing small intervals of damage and stun to enemy units.
lore: Inanimate rock becomes animate when called by the Stone Giant.

name: Toss
description_raw: Grabs the nearest unit in a %grab_radius% radius around Tiny, ally or enemy, and launches it at the target unit or rune to deal damage where they land.
lore: Tiny's gargantuan stature allows him to catapult even the sturdiest of warriors.

name: Craggy Exterior
description_raw: Enemies that attack Tiny receive a stacking debuff that lowers their attack damage with each stack.

name: Tree Grab
description_raw: Grabs a tree and causes Tiny to have bonus range, damage, and a splashing attack for a limited number of attacks.  The tree can be thrown, to deal your attack to a unit at a distance.
lore: Sticks and stones break all the bones, with structures sure to follow.

name: Tree Throw
description_raw: Throws the tree at the target unit, proccing your attack on it and splashing damage around the target.
lore: Even enemies can share in Tiny's arbor ardor.

name: Tree Volley
description_raw: CHANNELED - Tiny channels to throw random trees within range towards the targeted area. Deals Tiny's attack with Tree Throw bonuses.
lore: Sticks thrown from stones are like to shatter many bones.

name: Grow
description_raw: Tiny gains craggy mass, increasing his attack damage, movement speed and armor, and toss power while slowing his attack speed.
lore: Watching a hill become a mountain is awe-inspiring - especially if the mountain begins laying waste to adversaries.
shard: Units tossed by Toss or trees tossed by Tree Throw or Tree Volley now deal additional damage and slow in a larger area of effect at their landing location.

name: Insurmountable
description_raw: Tiny gains Status and Slow Resistance from Strength. Slow Resistance also reduces the impact of Attack Speed slows.

name: Nature's Guise
description_raw: Grants bonus movement speed when near trees. Treant Protector additionally has Tree Walking if he has not taken damage for %cooldown_time% seconds. While Tree Walking, Nature's Guise can be activated to grant Treant invisibility until he attacks or is no longer near a tree.
lore: The Protectors don't often come into vision; their natural state being nestled within their leafy brethren.

name: Nature's Grasp
description_raw: Creates vines towards the target location. Vines slow down and deal damage to enemies that walk through. Does %creep_penalty%%% less damage to creeps.
lore: The tendrils of Rooftrellen's influence stretch to all corners of the forest.

name: Leech Seed
description_raw: Treant's attack plants a life-sapping seed in an enemy unit. That unit takes additional magic damage, is rooted and disarmed for a short duration, and emits %healing_pulse_count% healing pulses to up to %max_heal_units% nearby allies of Treant Protector based on the damage dealt by the attack.
lore: Rooftrellen nurtures the beings under his stewardship, sustained by the lifeforce of trespassers into his sacred ground.

name: Living Armor
description_raw: Infuses the target hero or structure with a protective coating which heals the target and blocks damage from player-controlled sources. Each time this spell blocks damage, the block amount is decreased. If the damage block is decreased to 0, the buff is removed early.
lore: The roots and tendrils of the Treant Protectors are far-reaching, stimulating the growth and rejuvenation of all of nature.
shard: Increases the Damage Blocked by Living Armor. Treant now also passively benefits from Living Armor, with the damage block resetting after not taking damage for %passive_reset_cd% seconds.

name: Overgrowth
description_raw: Summons an overgrowth of vines and branches around Treant that deal damage to afflicted enemies and prevent them from moving, blinking, going invisible, or attacking.
lore: Rooftrellen calls the ancestral spirit of nature, releasing its power through all of his kin.
scepter: Decreases Cooldown to %AbilityCooldown% seconds. When casting Overgrowth, Treant Protector draws power from the soil, greatly increasing his size for %bloom_duration% seconds. While enlarged, he gains phased movement with a fixed speed of %movement_speed%, %strength_bonus%%% bonus Strength, and a splashing attack that deals %splash_pct%%% of his attack damage in a %splash_radius% unit radius.

name: Eyes In The Forest
description_raw: Treant Protector enchants a tree, which grants him unobstructed vision in that location. The eyes last for %duration% seconds and are invisible, but are destroyed if their host tree is destroyed or if they are attacked directly.
lore: One can never be too certain who, or what, might need protecting.

name: Super Bloom
description_raw: Treant grows massive in size for %duration% seconds. While enlarged, he gains phased movement with a fixed speed of %movement_speed%, %strength_bonus%%% bonus Strength, and a splashing attack that deals %splash_pct%%% of his attack damage in a %splash_radius% unit radius.

name: Berserker's Rage
description_raw:
While in melee form, Troll Warlord's attacks have a chance to ensnare, preventing the target from moving or using mobility spells and has additional movement speed.

When in ranged form, Troll Warlord's attacks have a chance to Maim the target, dealing bonus damage, and slowing the target's movement and attack speed.
lore: Like his anger, Troll Warlord's supply of axes is infinite.

name: Battle Stance
description_raw:
Troll Warlord swaps from using ranged to melee attacks. While melee, Troll Warlord's base attack time is improved to %base_attack_time%.

Troll Warlord gains %armor_per_interval% armor per %attack_speed_interval% bonus attack speed.
lore: Jah'rakal has a variety of ways to get under an enemy's skin.

name: Whirling Axes (Ranged)
description_raw: Troll hurls a fistful of five axes in a cone shape over %axe_range% range, slowing and damaging enemy units.
lore: Only axes fueled by hate whirl with such a deadly spin.
scepter:
Causes Whirling Axes (Ranged) to dispel enemies. Reduces cooldown and mana cost.

DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel

name: Whirling Axes (Melee)
description_raw: Troll hurls two axes around him in a close range area of effect, damaging enemy units and causing them to miss some attacks.
lore: Keep your enemies close.
scepter:
Causes Whirling Axes (Melee) to dispel Troll Warlord. Reduces cooldown and mana cost.

DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel

name: Fervor
description_raw: With each continuous blow on the same target, Troll gains increased attack speed.  If Troll changes targets, the stacks drop to zero.
lore: If at first you don't succeed, strike, strike again.
shard: Grants Troll %base_chance%%% + %extra_attack_chance_per_stack%%% chance per Fervor stack of firing an additional ranged attack to any unit within its ranged attack range plus %range_buffer% when attacking an enemy unit.

name: Battle Trance
description_raw: Troll unleashes a powerful battle trance, that forces you to continuously attack the closest enemy unit within %range% range, prioritizing heroes. Damage does not kill you during this mode. Grants you bonus lifesteal, attack speed and movement speed. Applies a Basic Dispel.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel
lore: An adrenaline rush of pure hatred quickens your blades.

name: Ensnare
description_raw: The Dark Troll Summoner tosses netting around an enemy's feet, briefly immobilizing the unit, though the unit can still attack and use abilities.

name: Raise Dead
description_raw: The Dark Troll Summoner stirs the ground underfoot, raising the remains of trolls long dead, bringing to life three skeleton Warriors who will fight at his side.

name: Ice Shards
description_raw: Tusk compresses shards of ice into a ball of frozen energy that damages all enemies it comes in contact with. When the ball reaches its target destination the shards are released, creating a barrier that lasts for %shard_duration% seconds.
lore: In the frozen tundra near the Barrier, after the last sun of autumn has set, ice can form with alarming speed.

name: Snowball
description_raw: Tusk begins rolling into a snowball. Allies within a %snowball_grab_radius% radius can also be added to the snowball by right-clicking on them, even while the snowball is moving. Once launched, any enemies caught in the snowball's path will be stunned and take damage. Each allied Hero in the snowball will add to its damage and stun duration.
lore: Tales are still told of the wild feat that ended the grand brawl at White Fields.

name: Launch Snowball
description_raw: Launch the snowball toward the target.
lore: Into the great wide white!

name: Tag Team
description_raw: Activate to temporarily apply a negative debuff aura around you, causing enemies that are attacked under it to take bonus physical damage and reduced movement speed. Lasts %debuff_duration% seconds.
lore: Even far from Cobalt, Tusk carries the 'Barrier Chill' in his very bones.

name: Drinking Buddies
description_raw: Tusk reaches out to tag an allied unit, pulling them closer. Once tagged, both Tusk and his tagged ally gain movement speed and armor.
lore: The only thing better than finding a good drinking buddy is finding an equally good enemy the two of you can punch.

name: Bitter Chill
description_raw: Passively slows the attack speed of all enemy heroes within a %radius% unit radius.

name: Walrus PUNCH!
description_raw: Tusk connects with his mighty Walrus Punch, a critical strike with bonus damage so powerful it launches its victim into the air.
lore: It never matters who throws the first punch, only who throws the last.

name: Walrus Kick
description_raw: Kicks the closest enemy unit in the drawn direction, stunning, damaging, and slowing them. Also deals damage to all heroes within %search_radius% radius of its landing area. Cooldown is reduced by %creep_cooldown_reduction_pct%%% if kicking a creep.
lore: Tusk may have made his name with his fists, but the wise enemy is wary of any and all limbs.

name: Decay
description_raw: Undying steals strength from all enemy heroes in an area, dealing base damage as he claims the enemy's strength for himself. Deals %creep_damage_multiplier%x damage to creeps.
lore: The strength of the living is simply borrowed from the strength of the dead.
scepter: Increases strength steal.

name: Soul Rip
description_raw: Undying rips health away from all nearby units and uses it to heal an ally, or damage an enemy. Soul Rip can also be used to heal Tombstone.
lore: Even allies feel despair in Undying's presence.

name: Tombstone
description_raw: Summons a tombstone at the target point.  Zombies will frequently spawn next to every enemy unit in the area around the Tombstone, and attack them.  Zombies have the Deathlust ability, which causes their attacks to slow the target, and if the target reaches below a certain amount of health, increases the attack and movement speed of the zombie.
lore: Dirge calls on his fallen brothers to fight for the Dead God.
shard: Tombstone can be cast on an allied hero to bunker inside of the tombstone. Heroes that enter the Tombstone cannot leave for %tombstone_bunker_cd% seconds nor can they re-enter after leaving. If the tombstone is destroyed with a hero inside, that hero gets stunned for %tombstone_stun_penalty% seconds.

name: Deathlust
description_raw: Slows enemy units on attack.  If the attacked unit's health goes below the threshold, the zombie receives enhanced movement and attack speed.

name: Flesh Golem
description_raw: Undying transforms into a horrifying flesh golem.  While in this state, he gains a percentage increase to strength, bonus movement speed, and causes attacks to slow, apply damage amplification, and spawn Tombstone zombies.
lore: The flesh of the recently dead add to the power of Dirge's plague.
