DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_UNIT_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_UNRESTRICTED | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_PSEUDO_QUEUE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_SILENCE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_DONT_RESUME_ATTACK | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_BACKSWING | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_CHANNEL | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IMMEDIATE

name: Ceaseless Dirge
description_raw: When Undying dies he will instantly respawn in the fountain. Begins the game on cooldown. Cannot be refreshed.
lore: Only when the Dirge of the Dead God ceases will this soldier's march finally end.

name: Earthshock
description_raw: Ursa leaps forward %hop_distance% units and slams the earth, causing a powerful shock to damage and slow all enemy units in a nearby area for %abilityduration% seconds.
lore: The very steps of a male ursine shake the ground as well as the resolve of opposing warriors.
shard: Earthshock applies %fury_swipe_stacks_on_hit% Fury Swipes to enemies hit.

name: Overpower
description_raw: Using his skill in combat, Ursa gains increased attack speed and slow resistance for a number of subsequent attacks.
lore: For a behemoth of his size, Ursa is deceptively nimble.

name: Fury Swipes
description_raw: Ursa's claws dig deeper wounds in the enemy, causing consecutive attacks to the same enemy to deal more damage.  If the same target is not attacked after %bonus_reset_time% seconds, the bonus damage is lost.
lore: In nature, the wounded rarely survive the attacks of hungry predators.

name: Enrage
description_raw: Ursa goes into a frenzy, providing damage reduction and status resistance. Removes any existing debuffs.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel
lore: Ulfsaar succumbs to his ancient spirit, becoming the most ferocious creature on the battlefield.
scepter: Reduces cooldown and allows Ursa to use Enrage while disabled.

name: Maul
description_raw: Ursa gains bonus damage equal to a percentage of his Current HP.

name: Bear Down
description_raw: Debuffs inflicted by Ursa last longer.

name: Magic Missile
description_raw: Fires a magic missile at an enemy unit, stunning and dealing damage.
lore: A simple Skywrath technique, the magic missile is Shendel's primary tool for vengeance.
shard: Bounces once on an enemy, prioritizing heroes, within %bounce_range_pct%%% of Magic Missile's current cast range from the first target.

name: Vengeance Aura
description_raw: Vengeful Spirit's presence increases the damage of nearby friendly heroes. Vengeful Spirit herself receives %self_multiplier%%% extra bonus.
lore: Although they may not share her undying passion for revenge, allies do draw on her fanaticism in combat.
scepter:
Increases self multiplier. Upon death, creates a strong illusion of Vengeful Spirit that deals full damage, and can cast all of her spells.

If the illusion is alive when Vengeful Spirit respawn, she will take its place. XP earned by her illusion is given to her. Strong Illusions are not instantly killed by spells.

name: Wave of Terror
description_raw: Vengeful Spirit lets loose a wicked cry, weakening the total attack damage and armor of enemies, and giving vision of the path ahead.
lore: Shendel's haunting voice hints at her approaching vindication.

name: Nether Swap
description_raw: Instantaneously swaps positions with a target Hero, friend or enemy. Nether Swap interrupts channeling abilities on the target. Enemy Swapped units take damage. Vengeful Spirit and allied swapped units gain a barrier equal to the damage dealt.
lore: Martyrdom is a small price to pay for vengeance.

name: Soul Strike
description_raw: Vengeful Spirit's ranged attacks behave as if they were melee attacks.

name: Retribution
description_raw:
Vengeful Spirit is considered both a ranged and a melee attacker to gain the respective bonuses.

When killed by an enemy hero, Vengeful Spirit deals %bonus_damage%%% bonus damage to her killer until their next death. Only one debuff can exist at a time.

name: Venomous Gale
description_raw: Launches a ball of venom in a line, poisoning enemy units so that they take both initial damage and damage over time, as well as suffering slowed movement.  Venomous Gale deals damage every 3 seconds over its duration.
lore: A concoction of various stings, poisons, and toxins gathered from the jungles of Jidi Isle, victims surviving it are rare.
shard: Increases cast range and projectile speed by %shard_travel_tooltip%%%. When Venomous Gale impacts enemy heroes, %num_created_wards_tooltip% Plague Wards are created around them.

name: Poison Sting
description_raw: Venomancer's attacks slow enemies and deal damage over time.
lore: The paralytic sting of the creature which caused his transformation now belongs to the Venomancer.
shard: Whenever Poison Sting is applied, it deals extra damage equal to %debuff_dmg%%% of the attacker's base damage for every debuff the enemy has from Venomancer or a unit he controls.

name: Plague Ward
description_raw: Summons a plague ward to attack enemy units and structures. The ward is immune to magic. Wards gain the Poison Sting level from Venomancer, dealing 50% of the full damage.
lore: A mixture of his old herbalist talents and newfound toxic mastery creates a living embodiment of plague.

name: Noxious Plague
description_raw: Infects an enemy with a plague that does damage on application then slows the target and deals damage over time based on their maximum health. When the debuff ends for any reason, all debuffs from Venomancer on the initial target and the plague are spread to nearby targets. Additional spreads beyond the first do not deal impact damage.
lore: Deep in the heart of the jungles of Jidi, the seeds of extermination freely grow.
scepter: Decreases cooldown by %bonus_AbilityCooldown% seconds. Infected units have decreased magic resistance. Additional spreads from hero targets deal full impact damage.

name: Snakebite
description_raw: Venomancer summons a Spawn of Aktok to sink its fangs into a target, dealing magic damage and applying a toxin that does damage every second. When the target attacks while infected, they take the initial damage again.

name: Poison Nova
description_raw: Venomancer emits a spreading ring of poison that does nonlethal damage over time to enemy units. Damage done is a base amount plus a percentage of the target's max health.
lore: In the Acid Jungles, creatures releasing noxious poison to their attackers is common; Venomancer spreads this plague beyond the Jidi Isle.

name: Septic Shock
description_raw: Venomancer's attacks deal extra damage based on how many debuffs the attack target has. Extra damage is dealt as magical damage. Only counts debuffs from Venomancer or his Plague Wards.
scepter: Increases base damage per debuff.
shard: Plague Wards also deal Septic Shock damage based on their attack damage.

name: Poison Attack
description_raw: Intensifies Viper's venom, adding an effect to his normal attack that applies a stacking movement speed slow and magic resistance deduction while dealing damage over time. Stacks up to %max_stacks% times.
lore: The Netherdrake's inborn toxic breath quickly drains the vitality of its afflicted.
shard: Increases max stacks, and causes Poison Attack to lower armor per stack and to affect buildings for reduced damage.

name: Nethertoxin
description_raw: Viper releases a Nethertoxin at the targeted area. Units in that area take an increasing damage over time based on how long they remain in it. Units in it have their attack speed slowed.
lore: Poison from the Nether Reaches turns wounds into fatalities, and fatigue into death.

name: Corrosive Skin
description_raw: Viper exudes an infectious toxin that damages and slows the attack speed of any enemy that damages it in a %max_range% radius. The acid exudate also increases Viper's resistance to magic.
lore: It is not unusual for sword and shield alike to corrode in the very hands of those who attack the Netherdrake.
scepter: Corrosive Skin applies %effect_multiplier%x the attack speed slow to enemies that are within %effect_multiplier_distance% distance of Viper.  Viper's Corrosive Skin Magic Resistance and Damage per Second are gradually increased while he is in Nethertoxin, up to %nethertoxin_bonus_pct%%% increased effect after %nethertoxin_bonus_pct_max_duration_tooltip%s.

name: Predator
description_raw: Viper's attacks deal an additional instance of physical damage per missing health percentage of the target hero.

name: Viper Strike
description_raw: Viper slows the targeted enemy unit's movement and attack speed while also disabling their passives and dealing poison damage over time. The slowing effect reduces over the duration of the poison.
lore: Once used to slay his sadistic summoner, the most powerful of Netherdrake infections spreads through the veins of those foolish enough to cross Viper.

name: Nosedive
description_raw: Viper slams into the ground, releasing a Nethertoxin and splattering each enemy in a %corrosive_radius% AoE for %effect_duration% seconds with the effect of Corrosive Skin.
lore: It was thought that Netherdrake wings touch ground only in death, but some surmise that those who've witnessed more intentional landings merely haven't survived to tell the tale.

name: Grave Chill
description_raw: Visage drains the movement and attack speed of the targeted unit, gaining the drained speed for itself and nearby Familiars.
lore: The warmth of the sun is never felt in the dark cold of the Narrow Maze.

name: Soul Assumption
description_raw: Visage gathers charges of soul essence each time nearby heroes take more than %damage_limit% damage. When the essence is released, it deals base damage as well as damage for each gathered soul charge.
lore: The collected souls of the dead reach out to bring another into their fold.

name: Gravekeeper's Cloak
description_raw:
Visage generates a layered barrier that protects him from damage. If he receives damage from a player, one layer is removed, and takes time to recover.

Visage's Familiars are protected by his cloak when within %radius% range of him, based on the number of layers Visage has.
lore: Visage's tough scales share equal properties of ghost and stone, making it nearly impervious to blade and magical assault.
shard: Gains an active component, allowing Visage to use Stone Form, stunning enemies for 0.8 / 1.0 / 1.2 seconds in an 375 area around it, dealing 60 / 100 / 140 damage and becoming invulnerable for 6 seconds. Restores up to %shard_hp_restoration_pct%%% of your health.

name: Summon Familiars
description_raw: Conjures %familiar_count% blind Familiars to fight for Visage.  Familiars possess the Stone Form ability, that allows them to turn into stone, stunning enemies upon landing.  While in Stone Form, Familiars are invulnerable, and rapidly regenerate their health.  Familiars grant high bounty when killed.\n\nThe ability can be cast in the alt-cast state to recall Visages familiars after %recall_duration%s, during which they cannot attack or act.
lore: Guardians of the Narrow Maze, Necro'lic's Familiars stand watch over his domain.

name: Silent as the Grave
description_raw: Visage gains flying movement and bonus movement speed.  Upon attacking or casting, the speed and flying movement are lost and Visage and his familiars deal additional attack damage for %bonus_duration%s.
lore: Those on the mortal plane are blind to the stirrings of the agents of the afterlife.
scepter: Increases movement speed, damage, and duration. Turns Visage and familiars invisible for the duration until the flying movement is lost.

name: Stone Form
description_raw:
Orders the Familiar closest to Visage to cast Stone Form in its current location, turning into stone and smashing into the ground, stunning and damaging all targets in the area. The Familiar becomes invulnerable, and will regain its health very rapidly. After %stone_duration% seconds, the Familiar will automatically leave Stone Form.

Can be alt-cast to order the closest Familiar to the target location to move there and cast Stone Form.
lore: There is no weapon or spell devised that can mar the wroughtstone servants of death.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NO_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IMMEDIATE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_CHANNEL | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_PSEUDO_QUEUE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_ALT_CASTABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_SILENCE

name: Stone Form
description_raw:
After a short delay, the Familiar turns into stone and smashes into the ground, stunning and damaging all targets in the area. The Familiar becomes invulnerable, and will regain its health very rapidly. After %stone_duration% seconds, the Familiar will automatically leave Stone Form.

Can be alt-cast to order the Familiar to move to the target location and cast Stone Form.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NOT_LEARNABLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_NO_TARGET | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IMMEDIATE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_CHANNEL | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_PSEUDO_QUEUE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_ALT_CASTABLE

name: Lurker
description_raw:
Visage's ability cooldown durations are accelerated as long as he's not taking damage.

Grants a stack every %stack_gain_time%s that Visage does not take damage. Each stack grants %cooldown_speed_per_stack%%% cooldown acceleration with a max of %max_stacks% stacks. Stacks fade after %linger_duration%s upon taking any damage.

name: Recall Familiar
description_raw: Recall this familiar to Visage after %recall_duration%s, during which they cannot attack or act.

name: Aether Remnant
description_raw: Void Spirit dispatches a remnant to the target location. The remnant stands watch over the region, facing the direction of his vector. When a unit crosses its gaze, the remnant pulls it in and damages it.
lore: Inai exists far beyond the scope of a single point in space and time.
shard: Creates an additional watcher path that rotates around the remnant.  The remnant now provides True Sight, and no longer triggers on creeps, instead dealing %creep_damage_pct%%% damage to them every second in both paths. Does not reveal wards.

name: Dissimilate
description_raw: Void Spirit temporarily fades into the aether, creating a number of portals through which he can reassemble himself. Upon exiting a portal, he damages all enemies in the area.
lore: Inai much prefers to observe our plane free from the confines of corporeal form.

name: Astral Step
description_raw: Void Spirit tears a rift through the astral plane to appear at the target location, attacking all enemies along the path. This attack inflicts a void mark that slows for %pop_damage_delay% seconds and then detonates.
lore: A small step for Inai creates great devastation on the mortal plane.

name: Resonant Pulse
description_raw: Void Spirit wraps himself in a protective shield that absorbs physical damage and emits a single damaging pulse around him. The shield gains increased damage absorption for each enemy hero the pulse hits.
lore: Inai never hesitates to shroud himself in the essence of his true self when forced to interact with the mortal plane.
scepter: Causes Resonant Pulse to silence and gain %max_charges% charges.

name: Symmetry
description_raw: Void Spirit gains a physical damage barrier when dealing magic damage to enemy heroes.

name: Intrinsic Edge
description_raw: Void Spirit gains %damage_stat_bonus_pct%%% more attack damage per point of each attribute, and %secondary_stat_bonus_pct%%% more HP regen from Strength, attack speed from Agility, and mana regen from Intelligence.

name: Fatal Bonds
description_raw: Binds several visible enemy units together, causing a percentage of the damage dealt to one of them to be felt by the others.
lore: An ancient incantation that links the vital energies of multiple lifeforms into one collective body.

name: Shadow Word
description_raw: Warlock whispers an incantation, casting a spell on a unit that makes it deal damage to nearby enemy units and heal nearby ally units. Target Unit will also heal or be damaged depending on whether they are ally or enemy.
lore: Demnok's arcane arts have a myriad of uses, allowing them to be powerful friendly enchantments or damaging curses.
scepter: Increases Effect Radius. Shadow Word now applies to %additional_targets% additional units in a %cast_aoe% radius, prioritizing heroes. The healing and damage on the additional targets is reduced by %secondary_reduction%%%.

name: Upheaval
description_raw: CHANNELED - A powerful slowing and damaging current that grows stronger as it's channeled. Lasts up to %abilitychanneltime% seconds. Enemies are slowed for %duration% second after leaving the area or the spell ends.
lore: Demnok manipulates space-time, impairing entire armies.
shard: While channeling, Warlock spawns a minor imp every %imps_interval% seconds that lasts for %minor_imp_duration% seconds and explodes dealing damage to all enemies around them upon death.

name: Chaotic Offering
description_raw: Summons a Golem from the depths, stunning enemies for %stun_duration% seconds. The Golem lives %golem_duration% seconds, takes reduced damage from spells, has increased Slow Resistance, has Permanent Immolation and Flaming Fists on attack.
lore: Demnok unleashes the captive spirit in his Dreadwood staff, causing destruction in enemy ranks.
scepter: Calls %number_of_golems_scepter% Golems.

name: Flaming Fists
description_raw: Deals extra damage to nearby units when attacking.

name: Permanent Immolation
description_raw: Burns the Golem's nearby enemy units, dealing damage per second.

name: Eldritch Explosion
description_raw: Shortly after dying, a burst of magic damage is dealt to all enemies in a small area. Does %explosion_nonhero_reduce%%% less damage to non-hero targets.

name: Eldritch Summoning
description_raw: Whenever an enemy unit dies while afflicted by one or more of Warlock's abilities, a minor imp is summoned that lasts for %minor_imp_duration% seconds and explodes on death. Imps will automatically seek out nearby units, favoring fatally bonded heroes, and will explode when reaching their prey.
shard: Increases the health and explosion damage of minor imps.

name: Black Grimoire
description_raw: Grants Warlock the item Black Grimoire, which can be consumed to gain experience for each kill Warlock participated in. Starts with 1 charge.

name: The Swarm
description_raw: Weaver launches a swarm of %count% young Weavers that latch on any enemy unit in their path, attacking and reducing armor until it is killed.
lore: Skitskurr opens a gap in the space time fabric, allowing young Weavers to slip through and aid him in combat.

name: Shukuchi
description_raw: Weaver shifts out of visibility, gaining max movement speed and doing harm to any enemies it passes through.
lore: As the Weavers worked in the fabric of creation, small wormholes allowed them to slip through time to better work their craft.
shard: Shukuchi puts a mark on enemies it damages that last %geminate_attack_mark_duration% seconds. %shukuchi_attack_delay%s after Weaver exits Shukuchi, enemies with a mark within %shukuchi_attack_mark_radius% range will also be attacked with a secondary Geminate attack

name: Geminate Attack
description_raw: Allows Weaver to dispatch two attacks at once.
lore: Skitskurr's relationship with time is somewhat variable, causing his actions to be witnessed - and felt - more than once.
shard: Geminate Attack will also hit units within %shard_beetle_search_range% range of the original target that have The Swarm beetles attached to them.

name: Time Lapse
description_raw: Weaver warps backward to whatever position it was in five seconds earlier--regaining the HP and mana from that time. No effect on cooldown, gold or experience.\n\nDISPEL TYPE: Strong Dispel
lore: If Skitskurr does not deem the current reality of the world to fit his desires, he simply crawls back in time to right what was wronged.
scepter: Time Lapse may target allied Heroes with %abilitycastrange% cast range.

name: Rewoven
description_raw: Every time Weaver damages an enemy hero with an ability, he gains %experience_gain% experience.

name: Threads of Fate
description_raw: Whenever Weaver deals damage to an enemy hero with an attack or ability, if he remains within %thread_setup_distance% range of them for %thread_setup_time%s, he establishes a Thread of Fate that briefly slows the enemy and ties Weaver and the enemy together. Each established thread of fate grants bonus damage to Weaver.

name: Gale Force
description_raw: Vector Targeted. Summons a strong wind that pushes all enemies in the target area towards the target direction.
lore: At last Lyralei has learned to call upon the might of her true birthright.

name: Shackleshot
description_raw: Shackles the target to an enemy unit or tree in a line directly behind it.  If no unit or tree is present, the stun duration is reduced to %fail_stun_duration%.
lore: Windranger's variety of bow skills includes an arrow with thick ropes attached to encumber any escaping target.

name: Powershot
description_raw: CHANNELED - Windranger charges her bow for up to %abilitychanneltime% second for a single powerful shot, which deals more damage the longer it is charged. The arrow damages and slows enemies' movement speed along its path. For each enemy that Powershot hits, its damage and slow is reduced.
lore: During her early years of training, Lyralei learned to fire powerful arrows that cleaved even trees to reach their targets.

name: Windrun
description_raw: Increases movement speed and adds evasion from all physical attacks.
lore: Lyralei enchants gusts of winds to fight incoming attacks.

name: Focus Fire
description_raw: Windranger channels the wind to gain %bonus_attack_speed% additional attack speed against a single enemy unit or structure, though with a reduction to her attack damage.  Extra damage from secondary item effects is not reduced.
lore: Lyralei's ability to bombard opponents with a flurry of arrows is unparalleled - even at the expense of accuracy.

name: Focus Fire Cancel
description_raw: End your Focus Fire early.

name: Easy Breezy
description_raw: Windranger's movement speed cannot be lower than %min_movespeed% and can reach %max_movespeed%.

name: Tailwind
description_raw: Using an ability conjures a stacking Tailwind that gives Windranger a brief burst of movement speed. Movement speed bonus gradually starts fading halfway through the Tailwind duration.\n\nPassively increases Windranger's max movement speed.
scepter: Attacks grant Tailwind. Tailwind lasts longer and is undispellable.

name: Arctic Burn
description_raw: Winter Wyvern soars upon an arctic wind, granting her unobstructed movement and allowing her to exhale a blistering chill into each attack. While soaring, her attacks travel further and faster, and slow enemies with a magical freeze that strips them of %percent_damage%%% of their current health each second.
lore: The same organ where some dragons stoke their inner flame is, in Auroth, a crucible of unimaginable cold. From deep within her frosty gullet, an exhalation sends enemies into burning agony.
scepter: Causes Arctic Burn to be a toggle ability, draining mana every second when active. Increases Winter Wyvern's movement speed.

name: Splinter Blast
description_raw: Launches a ball of brittle ice toward a unit. The ice shatters on impact, leaving the primary target completely unaffected, while hurling damaging splinters into nearby enemies in a %split_radius% base radius. Enemies struck by these splinters are slowed by %movespeed_slow_tooltip%%%.
lore: Produced slowly by specialized vesicles in her frozen gullet, Winter Wyvern blast shards of ice at her enemies.

name: Cold Embrace
description_raw: Encases an ally in an icy cocoon, freezing them solid while healing a base amount as well as a percentage of their maximum health each second. The cocoon blocks all physical damage.
lore: From winter's heart comes a cold, healing embrace. The ice slows the blood and allows the spell to better work its curative magic.
shard: Reduces cooldown by %shard_cooldown_reduction% seconds. Allied units gain bonus attack damage when emerging from the icy cocoon.

name: Winter's Curse
description_raw: Winter Wyvern dispells then freezes an enemy in place while striking those nearby with a maddening curse which causes them to attack their frozen ally with increased attack speed. The frozen ally and those cursed to attack their ally are immune to all damage from their enemies with the exception of damage from Winter Wyvern or her controlled units. Enemy heroes which enter the cursed area after the cast add to the duration of the curse.
lore: The oldest of the bookwurm's spells, this curse lends truth to the old saw: sometimes the enemy of my enemy is my enemy still.

name: Eldwurm Scholar
description_raw: When an enemy hero casts an Ultimate ability within %xp_gain_range% of Winter Wyvern, she receives experience equal to %mana_to_xp_percentage%%% of the ultimate's manacost.

name: Eldwurm's Edda
description_raw: Grants Winter Wyvern the item Eldwurm's Edda, which can be consumed to increase the current and maximum level of a basic ability by one and Winter Wyvern's base intelligence by %tooltip_int_pct%%% of its current value at the time of consumption.

name: Splinter Blast {s:bonus_stun_duration}s Stun
description_raw: The slow is still applied for the same duration.

name: +{s:bonus_heal_additive} Cold Embrace Base Heal Per Second
Essence of the Blueheart
description_raw: Winter Wyvern's heals also restore mana.

name: Dragon Sight
description_raw: Winter Wyvern gains bonus damage when her attack range is over %attack_range_min%.

name: Eldwurm Studies
description_raw: Winter Wyvern can skill this ability to reduce all ability and talent level requirements by 1. On the next level up, Winter Wyvern will receive an additional ability point for every level that was put into Eldwurm Studies since the last level up.

name: Tether
description_raw: Tethers Io to an allied unit, granting bonus movement speed to both. When Io restores health or mana, the tethered unit gains a portion of that amount. The tether breaks when the allied unit moves too far away, or Io cancels the tether. Tether slows enemies touching it.
lore: The benevolent touch of Io brings strength from between the planes.
shard: Tether damages enemies touching it. Io is healed for %damage_to_heal%%% of the damage done.

name: Spirits
description_raw: Summon five particle spirits that dance in a circle around Io. If a particle collides with an enemy hero, it explodes, damaging all enemy units in an area around it.  Creeps take minor damage from touching a particle spirit, but do not cause them to explode.  When its duration ends, any remaining Spirits explode.
lore: Io twists the particles of the universe with its unimaginable capabilities.
scepter: Spirits now passively spawn around Io constantly every second up to the max. Spirits colliding with enemy Heroes slows them briefly. Can be activated to explode spirits.

name: Overcharge
description_raw: Io gains attack speed, spell amplification, and health regeneration based on max health. If Io is Tethered to an ally, that unit also gains any bonuses granted by Overcharge.
lore: Drawing on the energy of matter from all worlds, Io begins the unravelling of time.

name: Relocate
description_raw: Teleports Io and a tethered ally to any location. After the spell expires, Io and the tethered ally will return to their original location. Double-click to teleport to your team's base fountain.
lore: Io is the embodiment of the mystery of the universe.

name: Break Tether
description_raw: Break the link to the tethered unit.

name: Spirits In
description_raw: Sends the spirits closer to you. Can be toggled on and off.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_TOGGLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IMMEDIATE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_SHOW_IN_GUIDES | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_BACKSWING | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_CHANNEL | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_FORCE_KEYBIND

name: Spirits Out
description_raw: Sends the spirits farther away from you. Can be toggled on and off.

raw.AbilityBehavior: DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_TOGGLE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IMMEDIATE | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_SHOW_IN_GUIDES | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_BACKSWING | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_IGNORE_CHANNEL | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_HIDDEN | DOTA_ABILITY_BEHAVIOR_FORCE_KEYBIND

name: Wellspring
description_raw: Io regenerates from consumables and the fountain %consume_speed%x faster.

name: Equilibrium
description_raw: Io gains outgoing damage amplification the closer it is to full health, and Health Restoration and Healing Amplification the closer it is to zero health.

name: Paralyzing Cask
description_raw: Launches a cask of paralyzing powder that ricochets between enemy units, stunning and damaging those it hits. Damage increases each bounce.
lore: The Witch Doctor recycles the bones of fallen friends and foes, using the powder as part of his arsenal of charms and alchemy.

name: Voodoo Restoration
description_raw: Witch Doctor focuses his magic to heal nearby allied units, costing Witch Doctor mana every second Voodoo Restoration is active.
lore: Zharvakko's hocus pocus is not limited only to hexxing his opponents and is quite adept at curing ailments.

name: Maledict
description_raw: Curses all enemy Heroes and player-controlled units in a small area, causing them to take a set amount of damage each second, as well as bursts of damage every 4 seconds based on how much health they have lost since the curse began.
lore: Certain voodoo magics can make an enemy regret engaging the Witch Doctor.

name: Death Ward
description_raw: CHANNELED - Summons a deadly ward to attack enemy heroes within its attack range. Lasts a maximum of %abilitychanneltime% seconds. Death Ward has %bonus_accuracy%%% bonus accuracy.
lore: Witch Doctor performs a ritualistic dance, one that haunts the dreams of those who live to recount it.
scepter: Death Ward attacks bounce between nearby enemies.

name: Voodoo Switcheroo
description_raw: Turns Witch Doctor into a Death Ward briefly with reduced attack speed. He is hidden during this time.

name: Gris-Gris
description_raw:
Witch Doctor gets a Gris-Gris, an item that cannot be dropped or placed in the backpack. When the owner dies, %death_gold_lost_reduction_pct_tooltip%%% of the gold lost from death is added to the item, and will be refunded when the item is consumed. The value of the Gris-Gris is increased by 1 every %gold_tick_interval_tooltip%s.

Right-click to consume and permanently remove the item.

name: Heavenly Jump
description_raw: Zeus performs a Heavenly Jump, leaping forward and shocking the closest visible nearby enemy (prioritizing heroes), dealing damage as well as reducing their movement and attack speed. Zeus gets %vision_radius% unobstructed vision around him for 3 seconds.
lore: Though temporarily barred from the heavens, Zeus can still manage a measure of godly flight.

name: Arc Lightning
description_raw: Hurls a bolt of lightning that leaps through nearby enemy units that deal damage.
lore: Arc Lightning is Zeus' favorite spell to use against puny mortals.

name: Lightning Bolt
description_raw: Calls down a bolt of lightning to strike an enemy unit, causing damage and a mini-stun. When cast, Lightning Bolt briefly provides unobstructed vision and True Sight around the target in a %sight_radius_night% radius. Can be cast on the ground, affecting the closest enemy hero in %spread_aoe% range.
lore: A shocking punishment for rebellious heathen.

name: Nimbus
description_raw: Creates a storm cloud anywhere on the map that automatically casts Lightning Bolt on nearby enemies.
lore: Where the thunder god's ire grows, storm clouds quickly gather.

name: Static Field
description_raw: Zeus shocks any enemy that he attacks or is hit by his abilities, causing damage equal to a percentage of their current health.
lore: The air crackles with static when the Thundergod walks the world.

name: Thundergod's Wrath
description_raw: Strikes all enemy heroes with a bolt of lightning, dealing damage no matter where they may be. Provides True Sight around each hero before they are struck.
lore: The Lord of Heaven smites all who oppose him, near or far.

name: Lightning Hands
description_raw: Zeus gains bonus attack speed and his attacks create Arc Lightnings that deal a percentage of its damage. Can be toggled off to stop this effect.
lore: A helping hand from Aghanim lets the fallen Lord of Heaven tap into some of his old strengths.
